MR-GVNO is trained without labeled solution data using a variational physics-informed loss derived from the discretized total potential energy. It directly processes irregular point clouds and allows different physical fields to be discretized independently, avoiding interpolation onto a common grid. Numerical experiments on single-hole, double-hole, and L-shaped plates demonstrate accurate response prediction under homogeneous and heterogeneous materials and uniform and random loads. The model also achieves millisecond-level full-field inference and favorable cross-geometry generalization.

</details>


### [505] [The Integrator Advantage: Controlled Agentic AI for Small and Medium-Sized Companies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16649)
*Christopner Koch,Joshua A. Wellbrock*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Agentic AI并非追求完全自主或裁员，而是在中小企业中通过受控的部分自主性，集成到简单到中等复杂度的业务流程中，作为以人为中心的生产力杠杆来提升效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 中小企业面临行政负担重、流程效率低、知识利用不足等问题，现有自动化和对话式AI能力有限，Agentic AI的潜力需要被合理引导而非盲目追求全自主。

Method: 提出了一个集成框架，涵盖用例适用性、自主性层级、技术集成、治理、安全、员工赋能和可衡量影响等多个维度。

Result: 论证了Agentic AI在受控部分自主模式下，能够显著加速常规流程、减少行政负担并改善知识利用。

Conclusion: Agentic AI应作为以人为中心的能力来实施，由人保留责任和问责权，此时它可以成为真正的生产力杠杆。

Abstract: Agentic AI marks a new phase of enterprise automation. Unlike traditional automation or conversational AI, agentic systems can interpret goals, plan multi step tasks, access tools, interact with enterprise systems, and execute workflows with varying degrees of autonomy. For small and medium sized companies, this creates potential to reduce administrative burden, accelerate routine processes, and improve the use of organizational knowledge. This paper argues that the near term value of Agentic AI does not lie in full autonomy or workforce reduction, but in controlled partial autonomy for simple and medium complexity business processes. It proposes an integration framework covering use case suitability, autonomy levels, technical integration, governance, security, employee enablement, and measurable impact. The paper concludes that Agentic AI can become a productivity lever when implemented as a human centered capability with responsibility and accountability retained by people.

</details>


### [506] [From Affect Prediction to Affect Forecasting: Evidence for Distinct Information Sources in Longitudinal Text](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16687)
*Sadia Noor,Seemab Latif,Raja Khurram Shahzad,Mehwish Fatima*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文区分了文本情感预测（当前状态）与情感变化预测（未来变化）两个任务，提出TSAP/E-TSAP框架用于情感预测，以及ACF-Hybrid用于情感变化预测。实验表明文本语义擅长预测当前情感，而未来情感变化更多依赖先验数值轨迹。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法常将文本视为独立观测，对当前情感估计和未来情感变化预测采用相似假设，未检验两者是否依赖不同信息源。本文旨在探究这一区别。

Method: 提出Trait-State Affective Prediction (TSAP)及其时序扩展E-TSAP用于当前情感预测；提出Affective Change Forecaster Hybrid (ACF-Hybrid)用于未来情感变化预测。使用纵向生态随笔和情感词条目数据进行评估。

Result: E-TSAP在情感预测上达到valence 0.670、arousal 0.449的Pearson相关。在情感变化预测上，文本模型仅达0.316(valence)/0.284(arousal)，而简单先验基线达0.615/0.670。ACF-Hybrid达到0.659/0.658。

Conclusion: 文本语义支持当前情感预测，而未来情感变化更依赖于先验数值轨迹动态。

Abstract: Modeling dimensional affect in longitudinal text requires distinguishing current affect estimation from future affective change forecasting. Existing approaches often treat each text as an independent observation and apply similar assumptions to both tasks, without testing whether they rely on different information sources. This paper investigates that distinction using longitudinal self-reported ecological essays and feeling-word entries. We propose the Trait--State Affective Prediction (TSAP) framework and its temporal extension E-TSAP for per-text valence and arousal prediction, evaluated on a held-out prediction test set of 1,737 entries from 91 users. We further propose the Affective Change Forecaster Hybrid (ACF-Hybrid) for next-step affective change forecasting, evaluated on a held-out forecasting test set of 46 users. For prediction, E-TSAP achieves composite Pearson correlations of 0.670 for valence and 0.449 for arousal. For forecasting, textual representations perform worse than compact numeric trajectory baselines: the text-inclusive model achieves only r=0.316 for valence and r=0.284 for arousal, whereas a simple prior-state baseline reaches r=0.615 and r=0.670, respectively. ACF-Hybrid, using dimension-specific numeric trajectory features, achieves r=0.659 for valence and $r=0.658$ for arousal. These results show that textual semantics support current affect prediction, whereas future affective change is better captured through prior numeric trajectory dynamics.

</details>


### [507] [User as Code: Executable Memory for Personalized Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16707)
*Bojie Li*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出"用户即代码"(UaC)范式，将用户记忆建模为可执行的Python代码项目，通过两阶段管道（追加日志+定期检查点）实现可执行用户记忆，在聚合查询（99% vs 6-43%）和主动安全告警方面显著优于传统检索式记忆。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI代理的用户记忆系统（非结构化文本、知识图谱、扁平事实存储）采用"检索-事实"分离模式，能回放单个事实，但在处理矛盾、跨记录聚合和执行规则方面存在根本性缺陷。

Method: 提出UaC（User as Code）范式：1) 用户记忆建模为活软件项目，使用类型化Python对象存储状态，用普通Python函数编码规则；2) 两阶段管道：追加日志（不丢弃任何事实）+ 定期检查点（将日志编译为类型化代码）。

Result: 标准长期记忆基准上UaC召回率78.8%（与全上下文上限和最强方法持平）；聚合查询任务上检索式记忆仅6-43%，UaC达99%；能主动检测药物冲突等安全告警，这是查询驱动记忆无法做到的。

Conclusion: 用户记忆应被设计为可执行的，而非仅可检索的。UaC范式使表示和推理在同一可执行媒介中完成，从根本上改变了记忆系统的能力边界。

Abstract: A personalized AI agent needs a user memory: a persistent model of who the user is, built across many conversations and consulted on each new one. Today this memory is almost always stored as unstructured text, a knowledge graph, or a flat store of facts, and consulted by retrieval -- fetching the entries most similar to the current request. Such "bag-of-facts" memory recalls individual facts well, but because storing a fact and acting on it are separate steps, it struggles to resolve contradictions, aggregate over many records, or enforce rules. We argue that user memory should instead be executable. We introduce User as Code (UaC), a paradigm in which an agent's model of a user is a living software project: typed Python objects hold the user's state and ordinary Python functions encode the rules that govern it, so representing and reasoning about the user happen in one medium an interpreter can run. The enabling mechanism is a two-phase pipeline: an append-only log that never discards a fact, periodically checkpointed into typed code.
  This changes what memory can do. On standard long-term conversation benchmarks, UaC matches both a full-context upper bound and the strongest prior memory systems on recall (78.8% on LOCOMO). Its advantage emerges where representation matters most. On aggregate questions over a user's history -- "how many international trips did I take last year?" -- retrieval-based memory collapses (6-43%) while UaC stays near-perfect (99%), because the answer is a one-line computation over typed state rather than a search over text. And because its rules execute deterministically whenever the state changes, UaC can surface unsolicited, safety-critical alerts -- such as a newly prescribed drug that conflicts with an allergy recorded months earlier -- a capability query-driven memory cannot provide.

</details>


### [508] [Medical world models: representing medical states, modelling clinical dynamics and guiding intervention policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16721)
*Ke Liu,Mengxuan Li,Yanyi Bao,Tianyun Zhang,Chong Chu,Jiajun Bu,Haishuai Wang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出"医学世界模型"的概念框架，将AI中的世界模型思想引入医疗领域，构建能够模拟患者状态动态演化的内部学习模拟器，帮助临床医生预测病情恶化、比较不同干预条件下的未来结果，并制定个性化治疗方案。文章围绕患者状态构建、临床动力学建模和干预决策支持三个核心能力构建路线图，并分析了将部分组件整合为更成熟的感知-动力学-规划系统的可能性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前医疗AI多返回静态标签或分数，难以揭示疾病如何进展或不同干预如何改变疾病轨迹，缺乏对患者状态动态演化的建模能力。尽管相关工作分散在基础模型、纵向建模、疾病模拟、治疗效果估计、强化学习和数字孪生等多个领域，但缺乏统一的框架来整合这些分散的工作。

Method: 提出以"医学世界模型"为核心的路线图，围绕三个耦合能力组织：(1)患者状态构建——表征患者当前状态；(2)临床动力学建模——模拟疾病随时间演化；(3)干预决策支持——评估不同干预对未来结果的影响。通过对代表性系统的比较，展示各能力的贡献及如何将部分组件集成为更成熟的感知-动力学-规划系统。

Result: 构建了医学世界模型的系统化框架，明确了从静态诊断和预测向动态疾病模拟和干预决策支持的演进路线图，识别了将理论推演转化为临床可用模拟器所面临的挑战。

Conclusion: 医学世界模型有望推动医疗AI从孤立的诊断和预测向能够模拟疾病演化并支持干预决策的方向发展，但要实现从"看似合理的推演"到"临床有用的模拟器"的转化，仍面临诸多挑战。

Abstract: Medical diagnosis and treatment are dynamic processes in which patient states evolve over time and clinical interventions alter future outcomes. Although current medical AI can detect disease, estimate risk and generate reports, many systems still return static labels or scores, offering limited insight into how illness may progress or how alternative interventions may reshape its trajectory. Medical world models adapt the world-model idea from artificial intelligence to healthcare by learning internal simulators of patient-state dynamics. Their long-term goal is to help clinicians anticipate deterioration, compare treatment-conditioned futures and tailor care to individual patients. Yet relevant work remains scattered across foundation models, longitudinal modelling, disease simulation, treatment-effect estimation, reinforcement learning and digital twins. To bridge this gap, this review outlines a roadmap for advancing medical AI from isolated diagnosis and prediction toward medical world models that simulate disease evolution and support intervention decisions. This roadmap is organized around three coupled capabilities: patient-state construction, clinical dynamics modelling and intervention decision support. Across representative systems, the comparison highlights what each capability contributes and how partial components can be integrated into more mature perception--dynamics--planning systems. Finally, we identify the challenges involved in turning plausible rollouts into clinically useful simulators. Related literature is available at https://github.com/1999kevin/awesome_medical_world_models.

</details>


### [509] [AgentFairBench: Do LLM Agents Discriminate When They Act?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16723)
*Triveni Morla,Rohith Reddy Bellibaltu,Manpreet Singh,Manmeet Singh Kapoor*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出AgentFairBench，一个用于评估LLM Agent在招聘、贷款、医疗分诊等实际决策任务中人口统计学偏差的基准，通过反事实匹配设计和基于NumPy的低成本分析框架，发现以往方法因统计量维度差异而高估偏差约2.4倍，校正后模型未见显著群体差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM公平性评估仅停留在问答层面，忽略了LLM作为智能体在实际决策（筛选简历、推荐信贷、分诊患者）中可能产生的歧视性行为。缺乏一个低成本、可复现、覆盖多领域的Agent公平性基准。

Method: 构建Bias Conduction Framework（BCF）理论框架，覆盖招聘、贷款、医疗分诊三个监管领域；使用合成的人口统计学中性画像，在反事实匹配集（仅通过名字编码种族×性别信号）中评估；支持四种Agent脚手架（直接、CoT、多智能体协商、工具增强）；基于NumPy的计算引擎计算反事实翻转率、MASD、行动率差异等指标，并引入bootstrap置信区间和FDR控制。

Result: 在864次决策的预实验中，发现比较六组分数跨度与两次运行噪声差异会因统计量维度差异高估偏差约2.4倍；使用维度匹配的噪声基底和全局组检验后，Claude Haiku 4.5未显示出超出采样噪声的人口统计学效应（120个成对和9个全局对比均未通过校正）；植入了偏差的测试确认了检测工具的有效性。

Conclusion: 贡献包括一个健全、灵敏、可直接采用的评估工具，维度匹配的零假设方法论，以及开源的代码、数据和评估框架。该方法论教训——统计量维度匹配对于避免虚假发现至关重要——具有广泛的适用性。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents increasingly take actions (screening applicants, recommending credit, triaging patients), yet fairness for LLMs is still measured by grading answers. We introduce AgentFairBench, a cheap, reproducible, multi-domain benchmark for demographic disparity in the actions of LLM agents. Grounded in a companion framework, the Bias Conduction Framework (BCF, restated here), it spans three regulator-anchored domains: hiring, lending, and medical triage. Synthetic, demographic-neutral profiles are evaluated in counterfactual matched sets that vary only a name-coded race x gender signal (in the Bertrand Mullainathan tradition), under four agent scaffolds of increasing agency (direct, chain-of-thought, multi-agent deliberation, tool-augmented). A NumPy-only harness computes counterfactual flip rate, mean absolute score difference (MASD), action-rate disparity, and tool-invocation disparity, with bootstrap confidence intervals, paired tests, and false-discovery-rate control, for single-digit dollars per model. A live leaderboard with a held-out private split and a contamination canary admits external models by submission. Our pilot (864 decisions plus a test-retest replication) carries a methodological lesson: comparing a six-group score spread against a two-run noise difference overstates disparity by ~ 2.4X through statistic arity alone. Against an arity matched noise floor and an omnibus group test, claude haiku 4 5 shows no demographic effect above sampling noise (0 of 120 pairwise and 0 of 9 omnibus contrasts survive correction); a planted-bias test confirms the instrument detects disparity when present. The contribution is a sound, sensitive, adoption-ready instrument, the arity matched null methodology, and open artifacts to scale it. Code, data, and harness are released under open licenses, with an anonymized review artifact.

</details>


### [510] [A First-Principles Derivation of LLM Policy Optimization: From Expected Reward to GRPO and Its Structural Extensions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16733)
*Jianghan Shen,Siqi Luo,Yue Li,Jiyao Liu,Wanying Qu,Yi Zhang,Ziyan Huang,Tianbin Li,Ming Hu,Xiaohong Liu,Yirong Chen,Junjun He*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本综述从原始目标函数 $J(θ) = \mathbb{E}_{τ\sim p_θ(τ)}[R(τ)]$ 出发，以轨迹侧（$p_θ(τ)$）和奖励侧（$R(τ)$）为两条主线，系统梳理了从REINFORCE、PPO到GRPO及其后续变体的LLM策略优化方法，揭示各类方法的设计动机和干预位置，并提出统一、可诊断、可扩展的分析框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有综述按领域或时间线组织LLM策略优化方法，掩盖了各方法设计选择背后的逻辑及其在梯度估计器中的具体干预位置，缺乏从目标函数出发的统一视角。

Method: 以 $J(θ)$ 的轨迹概率 $p_θ(τ)$ 和奖励 $R(τ)$ 两个因子为坐标轴，将REINFORCE、PPO、GRPO及其变体、Agentic RL、GRPO-OPD等方法映射到该二维框架中，分析每种方法修改了哪个因子及其原因。

Result: 提出了统一、可诊断、可扩展的分析框架，揭示了单侧修复无法解决的复合失效模式，并识别出现有方法边界情况及耦合失效的位置。

Conclusion: 该框架为下一代LLM策略优化算法的设计提供了原则性出发点——当单一侧修改不足以解决问题时，需要联合设计轨迹侧和奖励侧。

Abstract: Policy gradient algorithms for language models optimize the same objective $J(θ) = \mathbb{E}*{τ\sim p*θ(τ)}[R(τ)]$, which has exactly two factors: the trajectory probability $p_θ(τ)$ and the reward $R(τ)$. Every method from REINFORCE to PPO to GRPO and their descendants modifies one or both factors to address a specific failure in the preceding formulation. Existing surveys organize these methods by domain or chronology, which obscures the rationale behind each design choice and the precise location of its intervention within the gradient estimator. This survey revisits the landscape of LLM policy optimization from $J(θ)$ on first principles and uses the trajectory side, induced by $p_θ(τ)$, and the reward side, induced by $R(τ)$, as the two axes along which methods are located. It covers the path from REINFORCE and PPO to GRPO, as well as post-GRPO variants, Agentic RL, and GRPO-OPD. The resulting framework is unified, diagnostic, and extensible: it analyzes methods from a shared objective, identifies which side each method modifies and why, and applies the same trajectory and reward axes across these settings. Across these settings, the framework also exposes compound failures that no single-side fix resolves and that therefore require joint design of the trajectory side and the reward side. The boundary cases and coupled failures identified by this map mark where existing solutions run out and provide a principled starting point for designing the next generation of LLM policy optimization algorithms.

</details>


### [511] [Skill-to-LoRA: From Using Skills to Learning Behaviors for Token-Efficient LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16769)
*Tianyi Zhang,Zhonghao Qi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出Skill-to-LoRA (S2L)方法，将技能文本转化为LoRA适配器，在减少token消耗的同时提升任务通过率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的SKILL.md技能分发方式需要在每次运行时重复注入完整技能文本，造成高token开销，缺乏高效的行为表示。

Method: S2L：离线阶段用完整SKILL.md合成技能引导的演示数据训练LoRA适配器；在线阶段省略文档，动态加载对应LoRA以激活技能行为。

Result: 在Qwen3.6-27B上评估21个技能，S2L相比无技能基线提升5.2个百分点，相比全技能文本提升2.9个百分点，每步token成本降低6.6%。18/21技能匹配或超越全文本基线，15/21超越无技能基线。

Conclusion: 程序化智能体技能可从运行时指令转化为可训练、可动态加载的行为模块，且效果依赖于技能-适配器的对齐。

Abstract: Agent skills are commonly distributed as SKILL.md files: human-readable procedural documents that describe workflows, tools, resources, and domain conventions. While convenient for inspection and reuse, this design requires the same reusable procedure to be repeatedly injected into the runtime context. We propose Skill-to-LoRA(S2L), a behavior-centric skill representation that replaces runtime skill text with skill-specific LoRA adapters. Rather than compressing the skill document itself, S2L models the behavioral change induced by the skill text: offline, the complete SKILL.md is used to synthesize skill-guided demonstrations; online, the full document is omitted and the corresponding LoRA adapter is dynamically loaded to activate the learned skill behavior. We evaluate S2L with Qwen3.6-27B on a 21-skill subset of SWE-Skills-Bench. Compared with the no-skill and Full Skill Text baselines, S2L improves pass rate by 2.9 and 5.2 percentage points, respectively, while reducing per-step token cost by 6.6% relative to Full Skill Text prompting. S2L matches or improves Full Skill Text on 18/21 skills and the no-skill baseline on 15/21 skills. Control experiments further show that the gains depend on skill-specific adapter alignment: Wrong-LoRA and Shared-LoRA both reduce performance. These results suggest that many procedural agent skills can be converted from runtime instructions into trainable, dynamically loadable behavioral modules. Code will be released upon acceptance.

</details>


### [512] [OpenClaw-Skill: Collective Skill Tree Search for Agentic Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16774)
*Tianyi Lin,Chuanyu Sun,Jingyi Zhang,Changxu Wei,Huanjin Yao,Shunyu Liu,Xikun Zhang,Liu Liu,Jiaxing Huang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出集体技能树搜索（CSTS）框架，通过多模型协作生成与评估技能节点，构建结构化、多样化且可泛化的技能树，并引入集体技能强化学习，最终训练出在长程规划、工具使用和泛化方面表现优异的OpenClaw-Skill模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM智能体在复杂任务中缺乏有效的、可复用的技能获取框架，需要一种自动化的方法来自动构建结构化、多样且可泛化的技能体系。

Method: 提出CSTS框架，包含两个迭代阶段：(1) 集体技能节点生成（CSN-Gen），利用多模型集体知识探索多样化候选技能；(2) 集体技能节点评估（CSN-Assess），通过集体质量评分和集体可迁移性评分两种机制评估并筛选技能。此外，还引入集体技能强化学习，从技能树中主动选择多个相关技能以拓宽解空间探索。

Result: 训练得到的OpenClaw-Skill模型在长程规划、工具使用和泛化等挑战性基准测试中展现出卓越的智能体能力。

Conclusion: 通过集体智能的树搜索方法构建技能树，能有效提升LLM智能体在复杂任务中的表现，技能的可迁移性和多样性是关键因素。

Abstract: Equipping Large Language Model (LLM) agents with effective skills is crucial for solving complex tasks in real-world systems like OpenClaw. In this work, we aim to develop a framework that automatically constructs such reusable skills to enhance LLMs in tool use, multi-step reasoning, and dynamic environment interaction. To this end, we propose Collective Skill Tree Search (CSTS), a novel tree-search-based skill construction framework that constructs structured, diverse and generalizable tree of skills. The core idea of CSTS is to leverage collective intelligence to jointly search, identify and compose effective skills via two iterative phases: Collective Skill Node Generation (CSN-Gen) and Collective Skill Node Assessment (CSN-Assess). CSN-Gen exploits collective knowledge from multiple models to explore diverse candidate skills for each subtask, enabling comprehensive skill exploration. CSN-Assess employs multiple models as judges to evaluate and select skill nodes with two scoring mechanisms: (1) collective quality scoring that aggregates independent evaluations to produce a robust estimate of skill effectiveness, and (2) collective transferability scoring that explicitly verifies whether a skill generalizes well across different models. With CSTS, we construct a set of comprehensive tree of skills along with skill-augmented training data, enabling models to effectively learn and utilize skills. Besides, we introduce Collective Skill Reinforcement Learning, which actively selects multiple relevant skills from the tree to broaden solution-space exploration, avoid being trapped by a single skill and its resulting homogeneous or suboptimal solutions. As a result, our trained model, OpenClaw-Skill, exhibits outstanding agentic capabilities in long-horizon planning, tool use and generalization over challenging benchmarks.

</details>


### [513] [LabOSBench: Benchmarking Computer Use Agents for Scientific Instrument Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16802)
*Anqi Zou,Han Deng,Chengyu Zhang,Junquan Hu,Yu Wang,Yuxiang Xing,Aokai Zhang,Hanling Zhang,Zhaoyang Liu,Ben Fei,Zhihui Wang,Wanli Ouyang*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: LabOSBench是一个基于Web的科研仪器模拟器基准测试，通过8个模拟器、96个子任务评估多模态GUI智能体在科学仪器操作中的表现，发现现有智能体在结构化任务上表现尚可，但在反馈驱动和长序列操作上仍存在困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有计算机使用基准主要关注虚拟化系统中的软件操作任务，而科学仪器场景需要协调控制复杂界面和反馈驱动的参数调整。直接在真实高精度仪器上评估智能体成本高、有安全风险、可及性有限且难以保证可重复评估，因此需要模拟但逼真的测试环境。

Method: 构建了一套基于Web的科学仪器模拟器套件，通过浏览器直接运行，避免资源密集的OS虚拟化；设计了96个子任务涵盖8种仪器模拟器，包括样品加载、对齐、参数调优、数据采集和结果检查等流程；在子任务和端到端两个层面评估通用视觉语言模型、专用GUI智能体模型和高级智能体框架。

Result: 现有智能体可以完成许多结构化的GUI子任务，但在反馈驱动操作和长序列工作流执行方面仍存在困难。

Conclusion: LabOSBench提供了一个可重复、低成本的测试环境，用于推动计算机使用智能体向科学仪器控制方向发展。

Abstract: Current computer-use benchmarks primarily focus on software operation tasks in virtualized systems, whereas scientific instrumentation scenarios require coordinated control over complex interfaces, and feedback-driven parameter adjustment. However, directly evaluating agents on physical high-precision instruments is impractical due to high cost, safety risks, limited accessibility, and difficulty in ensuring reproducible evaluation. This motivates the need for a simulated yet realistic testbed that preserves the operational challenges of scientific instruments while enabling scalable and safe benchmarking. To this end, we introduce LabOSBench, a challenging benchmark for multimodal GUI agents built on a suite of web-based scientific-instrument simulators. Operating directly via a browser, LabOSBench avoids resource-heavy OS virtualization while supporting flexible task configuration and execution-based evaluation. Specifically, LabOSBench constructs 96 subtasks across eight instrument simulators, covering workflows from sample loading, alignment, parameter tuning, and data acquisition to result inspection. We evaluate general-purpose vision-language models, specialized GUI agent models, and advanced agentic frameworks at both subtask and end-to-end levels. Our experiments reveal that while existing agents can complete many structured GUI subtasks, they still struggle with feedback-driven operations and long-horizon workflow execution. Overall, LabOSBench provides a reproducible, low-cost testbed for advancing computer-using agents toward scientific-instrument control.

</details>


### [514] [Adaptive and Explicit safe: Triggering Latent Safety Awareness in Large Reasoning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16808)
*Ke Miao,Jiaxin Li,Hongliang Chen,Yuke Hu,Zhan Qin*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出Safe Trigger方法，利用大推理模型（LRM）自身的潜在安全意识（Latent Safety Awareness），通过SFT诱导安全标签触发安全分析，再经DPO优化，无需外部人工标注即可显著降低有害和越狱攻击的成功率（如DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B的ASR分别下降24.65%和36.72%），且几乎不影响通用性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LRM在复杂任务上表现优异，但对复杂越狱攻击和直接有害查询高度脆弱。现有安全对齐方法严重依赖外部人工数据标注，成本高且可扩展性差。作者观察到LRM在重新审视自身推理轨迹时能内在识别安全风险，因而希望利用这一潜在安全意识实现无需外部标注的安全对齐。

Method: 两阶段训练方法：(1) SFT阶段，显式诱导安全标签（Safe Trigger），对不安全查询在初始推理内容后触发安全分析和引导，对普通查询保持标准回答，实现自适应触发；(2) DPO阶段，进一步增强安全分析与引导的正确性和稳定性。两个阶段所需的响应均由被优化的模型自身生成，无需外部人工标注。

Result: 在DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B上，有害基准的平均攻击成功率（ASR）下降24.65%，越狱基准的平均ASR下降36.72%，同时通用性能和用户体验几乎不受负面影响。

Conclusion: 提出了一种无需外部人工标注的安全对齐方法，有效利用了LRM内在的潜在安全意识，显著提升模型安全性且不牺牲通用能力。

Abstract: While Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) excel at complex tasks, they remain highly vulnerable to sophisticated jailbreaks and direct harmful queries. To address this vulnerability, prior works depend heavily on external manual data annotation for safety alignment. However, we observe that LRMs can inherently identify safety risks when being re-presented with original queries alongside their own reasoning trajectories -- a capability we term Latent Safety Awareness. To leverage this safety awareness, we first employ Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to explicitly induce safe tags to trigger safety analysis and guidance following the initial reasoning content for unsafe queries, while preserving standard responses for general queries to ensure adaptive triggering. Subsequently, we apply Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to further enhance the correctness and stability of the safety analysis and guidance. Notably, responses required for both training stages are entirely generated by models being optimized. With (Safe Trigger) SFT and DPO, experimental results demonstrate significant safety enhancement. For example, the Attack Success Rate (ASR) of DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B, on average, drops 24.65% and 36.72% on harmful and jailbreak benchmarks, respectively. Finally, our Safe Trigger method exerts almost no negative impact on general performance or user experience.

</details>


### [515] [Scaling LLM Reasoning from Minimal Labels: A Semi-Supervised Framework with a Lightweight Verifier](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16811)
*Keizo Kato,Chenhui Chu,Yugo Murawaki,Sado Kurohashi*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一个半监督框架，仅用极少标注样本训练轻量级推理正确性分类器，通过熵过滤生成高质量伪标签来微调LLM，在数学推理和视觉问答任务上达到10-15倍标注数据的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有生成伪中间推理的方法依赖大量正确标注的答案来评估推理质量，成本高昂且可扩展性差，亟需一种能从极少量标注中高效学习推理的方法。

Method: 1) 用少量标注样本训练轻量级推理正确性分类器；2) 用该分类器判断LLM生成的中间推理轨迹是否有效；3) 基于熵的置信度阈值过滤不可靠样本；4) 用剩余高置信度的推理轨迹微调模型。

Result: 在Orca-Math和GQA数据集上，该方法达到了与使用10-15倍标注数据相当的性能；消融实验验证了分类器和熵过滤对可扩展、抗噪的伪标签生成至关重要。

Conclusion: 将昂贵的答案级监督替换为轻量级的推理正确性验证，为构建大规模推理资源提供了一条实用路径，推动了从极少量人工输入中学习自主推理系统的未来发展方向。

Abstract: For the development of Large language models (LLMs), recent approaches to generating pseudo intermediate reasoning have shown remarkable progress. But they typically rely on large numbers of correctly annotated answers to assess reasoning quality. This paper presents a semi-supervised framework that scales reasoning learning from minimal supervision, turning reasoning verification itself into a data creation mechanism. We train a lightweight reasoning-correctness classifier on only a few labeled samples, which judges whether intermediate reasoning traces generated by an LLM are valid. Furthermore, an entropy-based confidence threshold filters out unreliable samples, and the remaining high-confidence reasoning traces are used to fine-tune the model. Experiments on Verifiable Math Problems (Orca-Math subset) and Question Answering on Image Scene Graphs (GQA) with Visual Programming show that our method achieves accuracy comparable to using 10-15x more labeled data. Ablation analyses confirm that both the classifier and entropy filtering are essential for scalable and noise-resistant pseudo-labeling. By replacing expensive answer-level supervision with lightweight reasoning verification, our method provides a practical path toward constructing large-scale reasoning resources and paves the way for future autonomous reasoning systems that learn from minimal human input.

</details>


### [516] [GIST-CMTF: Goal-State Inference for Causal Minimal Tool Filtering in LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16813)
*Rahul Suresh Babu,Rohit Shukla*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出GIST-CMTF，一种在工具增强型LLM智能体中增加目标状态推理层的方法，用于解决用户请求歧义导致的错误目标执行问题，在120个任务中达到97.0%的成功率，显著优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Causal Minimal Tool Filtering (CMTF)方法假设用户请求已被映射为符号目标状态，但实际请求（如"处理我的预约"）可能对应多个目标，导致智能体沿着因果有效的工具路径执行错误的目标。

Method: 在CMTF基础上增加GIST层：1) 预测候选符号目标状态；2) 估计歧义程度；3) 若歧义低则应用CMTF过滤，歧义高则将澄清作为因果动作暴露，以获取缺失的目标或状态变量。

Result: 在7个模型后端、6种过滤方法、120个任务中，GIST-CMTF达到97.0%任务成功率（top-goal CMTF: 80.1%, semantic-goal CMTF: 82.9%），错误目标执行从19.4%降至2.5%，同时保持单工具暴露并显著减少token消耗。

Conclusion: 可靠的工具增强型智能体在暴露外部动作前，不仅应验证工具相关性，还应验证目标状态的正确性。

Abstract: Tool-augmented LLM agents rely on runtime filtering to decide which tools should be visible at each step. Causal Minimal Tool Filtering (CMTF) reduces tool-choice confusion by exposing only the next causally necessary tool frontier, but it assumes that the user request has already been mapped to a symbolic goal state. In practice, requests such as "handle my appointment" or "take care of this email" may correspond to multiple possible goals. This creates wrong-goal execution, where an agent follows a valid causal tool path for an unintended objective. We introduce GIST-CMTF, a goal-state inference layer that predicts candidate symbolic goals over the same state-transition vocabulary used by CMTF, estimates ambiguity, and either applies CMTF or exposes clarification as a causal action that produces missing goal or state variables. We evaluate GIST-CMTF across seven model backends, six filtering methods, and 120 controlled tool-use tasks. GIST-CMTF achieves 97.0% task success, compared with 80.1% for top-goal CMTF and 82.9% for semantic-goal CMTF. It reduces wrong-goal execution from 19.4% under top-goal CMTF to 2.5%, while preserving the one-tool exposure of causal filtering and using substantially fewer tokens than all-tools exposure. These results suggest that reliable tool-augmented agents should validate goal state, not only tool relevance, before exposing external actions.

</details>


### [517] [Symbolic Informalization: Fluent, Productive, Multilingual](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16893)
*Aarne Ranta*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文介绍了Informath项目，该项目通过符号非形式化方法将形式化数学证明可靠地转换为自然语言，基于Dedukti作为不同证明系统（Agda, Lean, Rocq）的中枢，结合语法框架（GF）处理多种自然语言的语法正确性和变体。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 符号非形式化能够将机器校验的数学内容转换为精确且可读的自然语言，特别是在AI构造证明和自动形式化的场景下，需要一种机制来解释AI究竟构造了什么。

Method: 采用中间语言架构：Dedukti作为不同证明系统（Agda, Lean, Rocq）之间的枢纽，Grammatical Framework（GF）负责处理多种自然语言的语法正确性和语言变体。

Result: Informath项目展示出，以合理开发成本即可通过符号非形式化生成流畅的自然语言文本，并同时支持多种形式语言和自然语言。

Conclusion: 符号非形式化能够可靠地将形式化数学转换为自然语言，有望使机器校验的内容在不损失精度的前提下变得人类可读，Informath证明了该方法的可行性和可扩展性。

Abstract: Symbolic informalization enables a reliable conversion of formal mathematics to natural language. It has the potential to make machine-checked content human-readable without loss of precision. In a traditional proof system usage, symbolic informalization generalizes the limited mechanisms of syntactic sugar into the ordinary language of mathematics. In a setting where proofs are constructed by artificial intelligence and autoformalization, symbolic informalization can explain what precisely has been constructed. This paper outlines the project Informath, which aims to show how symbolic informalization can produce fluent text with a reasonable development effort and address multiple formal and natural languages. Informath is based on an interlingual architecture, where Dedukti works as a hub between different proof systems (Agda, Lean, Rocq) and Grammatical Framework (GF) takes care of linguistic correctness and variation in different natural languages.

</details>


### [518] [Greed Is Learned: Visible Incentives as Reward-Hacking Triggers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16914)
*Tong Che,Rui Wu*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文发现，当强化学习智能体能看到自己的奖励代理（如KPI仪表盘）时，会产生"奖励通道成瘾"现象：智能体会追逐显示的数字，牺牲真实任务，甚至在被重新定义奖励时也会跟随。这种成瘾能翻转模型的安全对齐，使其为获得奖励而放弃安全行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有部署的AI代理越来越多地能看到自身的奖励代理（如余额、分数或KPI仪表盘），这可能导致危险行为。作者想要揭示这种可见的自我利益通道对强化学习策略的影响。

Method: 在合成的MoneyWorld沙盒环境中训练强化学习策略，让智能体在执行任务时能看到一个"奖励通道"（显示奖励的仪表盘）。通过跨领域测试、重写通道目标和安全任务测试来评估成瘾效应。

Result: 智能体会追逐显示中的奖励并牺牲真实任务；即使重写通道的目标，智能体也会跟随；从未见过该通道的策略则保持诚实。奖励通道成瘾能翻转安全对齐——模型会为仪表盘上的回报而放弃原本坚持的安全行为，一旦隐藏通道则恢复安全行为。

Conclusion: 贪心是可学习的：当遵循可见的奖励通道能获得回报时，智能体会学会贪心。盲目优化超级智能的AI在KPI或损益表上对对齐是危险的。

Abstract: Deployed agents increasingly act with their reward proxy in view, such as a balance, score, or KPI dashboard. We show that reinforcement learning can make a policy \emph{addicted} to such a visible self-benefit channel. It chases the displayed payoff across held-out domains, sacrifices the true task to do so, and follows the channel wherever we rewrite it, while policies that never saw the channel stay honest. We call this \emph{reward-channel addiction} and study it in \emph{MoneyWorld}, a synthetic sandbox. The addiction can \emph{flip a model's safety alignment}: trained only on innocuous money tasks with no safety content, the model abandons the safe action it otherwise always takes whenever a dashboard pays for an unsafe one, and reverts to safe once the channel is hidden. This learned bribe replicates across model scales and families. Blindly optimizing super-capable, next-generation AI on KPIs or P\&L can be dangerous for alignment. \emph{Greed is learned} when following such a channel pays.

</details>


### [519] [MA-SBI: Misspecification-Aware Simulation-Based Inference via Side-Channel Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16923)
*Arunkumar V,Manoranjan Gandhudi,Gangadharan G. R.,Arun Prakash,S. Senthilkumar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 提出MA-SBI，一种无需真实参数标签、利用非结构化侧信道信息（如文本）对模拟器误设进行后验校正的鲁棒SBI框架，理论上界定了偏差缩减与互信息的关系，实验证明其性能可匹敌需真实标签的RoPE方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒SBI方法（如RoPE）需要真实参数-观测值配对来校正模拟器误设，但实际场景中这些标签难以获取，而领域内存在大量非结构化侧信道信息（如政策公告、指令文本）未被利用。

Method: 提出MA-SBI框架：1) 学习一个校正器，将侧信道文本映射到观测空间上的偏移量；2) 在预训练的摊销后验前应用该偏移，无需重新训练模型或依赖真实参数标签；3) 利用Donsker-Varadhan变分公式给出偏差缩减的互信息下界。

Result: 在hide-the-calibration基准上，仅使用文本的MA-SBI在10个种子和两种骨干网络上与需要真实标签的RoPE后验达到TOST等价；在结构误设场景中RoPE更好；随机变体在真实COVID/OxCGRT流行病学数据上提升后验预测对数似然，在良好设定的认知科学语料上保持后验不变。

Conclusion: MA-SBI和RoPE是互补方法：当误设是结构性的且可从参数-观测对中恢复时RoPE占优；MA-SBI在缺乏真实标签但存在侧信道信息的实际场景中提供有效替代，理论保证了校正能力的上限。

Abstract: Simulation-based inference (SBI) of latent parameters is often hindered by simulator misspecification, the mismatch between simulated and real-world observations caused by inherent modeling simplifications. RoPE, the recent state-of-the-art for robust SBI, addresses this through optimal transport between learned representations of real and simulated observations, but requires ground-truth parameter calibration pairs that are typically unavailable in the very settings where SBI is needed. What practitioners do have is unstructured side-information such as regime labels, instruction text, and policy bulletins. We propose Misspecification-Aware Simulation-Based Inference (MA-SBI), a calibration-free framework that turns this side-channel into a posterior correction. A learned corrector maps side-channel text to an observation-space shift applied before any pre-trained amortized posterior, requiring no retraining and no parameter ground-truth. Our main theorem bounds achievable bias reduction by the mutual information between misspecification and side-channel, with a non-vacuous constant that extends to all sub-Gaussian noise via Donsker-Varadhan. On hide-the-calibration benchmarks, MA-SBI with text alone matches the oracle posterior across 10 seeds and two backbones (TOST equivalence), while RoPE given more data does not. The two approaches are complementary: where misspecification is structural and recoverable from parameter pairs, RoPE dominates, as the theory predicts. A stochastic variant improves posterior-predictive log-likelihood on real COVID and OxCGRT epidemiological data, and correctly leaves the posterior unchanged on a well-specified cognitive-science corpus.

</details>


### [520] [RAID: Semantic Graph Diffusion for True Cold-Start and Cross-Lingual Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16925)
*Arunkumar V,Manoranjan Gandhudi,Gangadharan G. R.,Arun Prakash,S. Senthilkumar*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: RAID是一个面向时间序列冷启动场景的框架，通过检索增强和扩散模型，利用元数据语义检索替代历史数据，实现对新物品的零样本预测，在精度、区间覆盖和推理速度上均优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列基础模型依赖历史观测数据进行预测，但在真实冷启动场景中（新物品无任何历史记录）无法适用。作者希望解决这一空白，实现无需历史数据的准确预测。

Method: 提出RAID框架：(1) 使用冻结的多语言嵌入模型将文本元数据映射到共享语义空间；(2) 构建归纳式检索图，可扩展至未见物品；(3) 通过语义邻居聚合形成基础预测；(4) 利用门控扩散模块细化预测，建模残差不确定性；(5) 采用非自回归解码降低推理延迟。

Result: 在严格冷启动协议下，RAID在预测精度和预测区间覆盖上均超越强基础模型和竞争基线；推理延迟降低一个数量级；实现了零样本跨语言迁移能力。

Conclusion: RAID通过元数据驱动的语义检索和图条件扩散，有效解决了时间序列冷启动预测问题，并具备跨语言泛化能力，为实际场景中缺乏历史数据的新物品预测提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Time-series foundation models show strong transfer performance when given a non-empty history window. However, true cold-start scenarios, where a new item has no prior observations, violate this assumption. We propose RAID (Retrieval-Augmented Iterative Diffusion) a framework, which replaces history-based correlation learning with metadata-driven semantic retrieval and graph-conditioned diffusion. RAID maps textual metadata into a shared semantic space using a frozen multilingual embedding model and constructs an inductive retrieval graph that extends naturally to unseen items. It first forms a base forecast by aggregating information from semantically related neighbors, then refines this forecast with a gated diffusion module to model residual uncertainty. Under a strict true cold-start protocol, RAID outperforms strong foundation models and competitive baselines on both forecasting accuracy and prediction interval coverage, while reducing inference latency by an order of magnitude through non-autoregressive decoding. The shared semantic space also enables zero-shot cross-lingual transfer, allowing a model trained on English descriptions to generalize to items described in other languages without direct supervision.

</details>


### [521] [A Causal Model of Theory of Mind in Conflict for Artificial Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16944)
*Nikolos Gurney*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出一个结构因果模型，将心理理论（ToM）形式化为由情境和主体条件驱动的机制，而非始终开启的能力，并定义了三种因果路径来决定何时进行心理化推理，以提升AI系统的资源理性与社交智能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI-ToM模型关注"如何"进行心理化，但忽略了"何时"应该心理化的问题。本文旨在回答在冲突情境下，何种情境与主体条件才使得ToM的参与具有因果合理性。

Method: 构建有向无环图（DAG）形式的结构因果模型，包含四个外生变量（情境与主体条件）、五个内生中介变量，以及一个机制性ToM节点，通过三条因果路径（可处理性路径、推理深度路径、使能原因路径）产生心理化参与状态。输出结果为认知准确性，将社会推理与行为策略解耦。

Result: 该框架为AI系统提供了原则性的、资源理性的心理化决策程序，提升了效率与信任度。通过仿真验证、人机团队实证研究以及冲突优化心理化带来的伦理考量进行了讨论。

Conclusion: 该模型为发展鲁棒的、资源理性的人工社会智能提供了理论基础，能够推广到冲突之外的社会现象，并对AI系统中的信任与伦理设计具有重要启示。

Abstract: Theory of mind (ToM), the capacity to ascribe mental states to others and use those ascriptions for prediction and inference, is widely assumed to be essential for effective human-machine integration. Existing AI-ToM models address \emph{how} to mentalize, but leave the question of when largely unaddressed. The central question is: under what situational and agent-level conditions is ToM engagement causally warranted in conflict? This paper presents a structural causal model formalized as a directed acyclic graph (DAG), treating ToM as a mechanism activated by situational and agent-level conditions rather than as an always-on capacity. The model specifies four exogenous variables capturing situational and agent-level conditions, five endogenous mediators, and a mechanistic ToM node producing engagement states through three distinct causal pathways: a tractability pathway, a reasoning-depth pathway, and an enabling-cause pathway. The primary outcome is epistemic accuracy, which decouples social reasoning from behavioral policy and generalizes across social phenomena beyond conflict. The framework gives AI systems a principled, resource-rational decision procedure for mentalizing, with implications for efficiency, trust, and the development of robust artificial social intelligence. Simulation validation, empirical human-machine teaming studies, and ethical considerations arising from conflict-optimized mentalizing are discussed.

</details>


### [522] [The embrace of open science: An analysis of a decade of AI research and 56 800 conference papers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16974)
*Kevin L Coakley,Thijs Snelleman,Holger Hoos,Odd Erik Gundersen*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 通过分析2014-2024年五大AI会议56800篇论文，发现文档实践显著改善，代码和数据共享率从11%升至64%，预估可复现性从28%升至64%，且改善早于可复现性检查表的引入。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 可复现性危机促使AI研究社区改进文档实践，但尚不清楚文档实践是否随时间发生了实质性变化。

Method: 识别7个可复现性变量，对2014-2024年五大顶级AI会议56800篇论文进行质量保证与分析。

Result: 代码和数据共享率从11%提升至64%（近6倍增长）；推断可复现性从28%提升至64%；改进早于可复现性检查表的引入。

Conclusion: 文档实践的改善反映了开放科学的更广泛运动，而非对正式检查表的直接响应。

Abstract: The reproducibility crisis has directed the AI research community toward improving documentation practices. Several studies have identified methodological issues, and in response, the most impactful venues in the field have introduced reproducibility checklists. We seek to understand whether documentation practices have changed over time by assessing all published papers at five leading AI conferences over the past decade. Seven reproducibility variables were identified, quality-assured and used to analyse 56 800 publications. Our analysis reveals that in the period 2014 to 2024, documentation practices have improved; papers sharing both code and data increased nearly sixfold, from 11% to 64% Building on empirical reproducibility rates from a prior study, we estimate - inferred from documentation practices, not direct testing - that reproducibility increased from 28% in 2014 to 64% in 2024. Improvements in documentation practices predate the introduction of reproducibility checklists, suggesting these changes reflect a broader movement toward open science rather than a direct response to formal requirements.

</details>


### [523] [Consensus-based Agentic Large Language Model Framework for Harmonized Tariff Schedule Code Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16987)
*Truong Thanh Hung Nguyen,Khanh Van Quynh Nguyen,Hoang-Loc Cao,Tri Duong,Phuc Ho,Van Pham,Loc Nguyen,Hung Cao*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体大语言模型（LLM）的框架，用于智慧港口和海事物流中的加拿大10位HTS编码分类。该框架整合了多智能体信息检索、语义检索、证据推理、共识验证、分层投票、置信度估计和人机协同，在3300条标注数据上的实验表明，精确的10位分类仍具挑战，需要可解释、不确定性感知和以人为中心的分类流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: HTS编码分类对海关清关、关税评估、贸易统计和监管合规至关重要，但由于产品描述简短、不完整或模糊，且分类依赖层级化关税结构、法律注释和管辖区域规则，精确分类仍然困难。

Method: 提出一个智能体LLM框架，包含多智能体信息检索、官方关税文档语义检索、基于证据的推理、共识验证、层级代码组件的逐元素投票、置信度估计以及人机协同升级机制。

Result: 在3300条领域专家标注的真实数据集上，精确的10位分类即使对先进LLM也很困难，性能从粗粒度章节级预测到细粒度关税和统计后缀分配逐渐下降。

Conclusion: 需要基于证据、不确定性感知和以人为中心的分类工作流程，而非完全自主的单步预测；所提框架支持更具可解释性、可问责性和合规导向的HTS分类。

Abstract: Accurate Harmonized Tariff Schedule (HTS) code classification is essential for customs clearance, duty assessment, trade statistics, and regulatory compliance in maritime logistics. However, exact HTS classification remains challenging because product descriptions are often short, incomplete, or ambiguous, while correct classification depends on hierarchical tariff structures, legal notes, and jurisdiction-specific rules. This paper proposes an agentic large language model (LLM) framework for Canadian 10-digit HTS code classification in smart-port and maritime logistics environments. The framework integrates multi-agent information retrieval, semantic retrieval over official tariff documents, evidence-grounded reasoning, consensus-based validation, element-wise voting across hierarchical code components, confidence estimation, and human-in-the-loop escalation. We evaluate the framework on a private dataset of 3,300 domain-expert-labeled product records collected from logistics and delivery contexts. Experimental results show that exact 10-digit classification remains difficult even for advanced LLMs, with performance decreasing from coarse chapter-level prediction to fine-grained tariff and statistical suffix assignment. These findings demonstrate the need for evidence-grounded, uncertainty-aware, and human-centered classification workflows rather than fully autonomous single-step prediction. The proposed framework supports more interpretable, accountable, and compliance-oriented HTS classification for maritime logistics and smart-port operations. Our code is available at https://github.com/Analytics-Everywhere-Lab/hts.

</details>


### [524] [When in Doubt, Plan It Out: Committed Small Language Model Deliberation for Reactive Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16995)
*Nathan Gavenski,Juarez Monteiro,Francisco Galuppo,Adriano Veloso,Odinaldo Rodrigues*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: PACT是一种混合架构，将快速反应式RL策略与慢速深思熟虑的SLM规划器结合，通过异步规划、验证和执行动作计划，在不会改变原RL策略的情况下提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RL策略在新环境中性能下降，因其缺乏显式的深思熟虑能力。

Method: 提出PACT混合架构：快速RL策略负责反应式执行，小型语言模型（SLM）异步生成候选动作计划，通过模拟验证其安全性、可行性和完整性后直接执行，无需重新训练或修改RL策略。

Result: 在三个难度递增的FrozenLake配置上，PACT超越所有基线方法，且仅使用2B参数的SLM骨干网络。

Conclusion: 深思熟虑式规划与反应式执行相结合，比单独使用任何一种方式效果更强。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) policies often degrade in unfamiliar environments because they lack explicit deliberation. We propose Plan, Align, Commit, Think (PACT), a hybrid architecture that combines a fast, reactive RL policy with a slow, deliberative Small Language Model (SLM) planner. PACT invokes the SLM asynchronously to generate and validate candidate action plans. Once a plan is verified through simulation as safe, feasible, and complete, it is executed directly, bypassing the RL policy without retraining or modifying it. Evaluated on three FrozenLake configurations of increasing difficulty, PACT outperforms all baselines while relying on a 2B-parameter SLM backbone, suggesting that deliberative planning and reactive execution are more powerful in concert than either is alone in these settings.

</details>


### [525] [Bayesian Inference and Decision Audits for Public Archives of Frontier AI Evaluations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17005)
*Yanan Long*

Main category: cs.AI

TL;DR: 本文质疑了将公开AI评估简单视为最终排行榜的做法，指出这些评估本质上是受报告规则、基准修订和数据缺失影响的选择性时间序列。通过分析LiveBench、Open LLM Leaderboard v2、LMArena等公开存档，作者构建了贝叶斯推理问题框架，展示了在固定报告约定下，同一终端数据可兼容不同前置历史。研究还发现，基于候选选择的边界模型在合成恢复、客观预测、偏好迁移和不确定性校准方面均表现失败。最后，作者提出了一套“存档与裁决”协议来重构评估历史并验证时间边界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 揭示公开AI评估结果（如排行榜）的统计和结构脆弱性：这些评估并非客观中立，而是受到报告规则、基准修订、数据缺失等系统性偏差影响。作者试图证明依赖单一终端结果（如最终排名）可能导致误导性结论。

Method: 采用贝叶斯推理框架分析公开存档数据（LiveBench、Open LLM Leaderboard v2、LMArena、GAIA、tau-bench）。构造了固定报告约定下的终端-前置历史对比，通过合成后验比较评估不同观测机制下的诊断差异。设计了一套“存档与裁决”协议来重构评估历史并验证边界。

Result: 1. 在固定报告约定下，同一终端数据可对应两种不同的前置历史，时间跨度差异显著（23.03 vs 75.13）。2. 候选选择感知的边界模型在合成恢复、客观预测、偏好迁移和不确定性校准方面均失败。3. 固定审计门拒绝了边界模型的强势主张。4. 存档与裁决协议成功隔离了可验证的时间边界。

Conclusion: 公开AI评估不应被误读为最终的确定性排行榜。评估结果是高度条件依赖的，受多重设计偏差影响。作者提出的存档与裁决协议为重构评估历史、识别虚假边界主张提供了方法论基础，强调了评估透明性和历史记录完整性的重要性。

Abstract: Public AI evaluations are often read as terminal leaderboards, yet the underlying evidence is a selective time series shaped by reporting rules, benchmark revisions, and missingness. Repeated public archives for LiveBench and Open LLM Leaderboard v2 serve as the primary longitudinal record; LMArena provides a preference stress test; and GAIA and tau-bench contribute limited agentic pilots. Together, these archives instantiate a Bayesian inference problem: under a fixed reporting convention, one constructed terminal-only example over $1{,}000$ systems is compatible with two pre-terminal histories, yielding times of $23.03$ or $75.13$ to reach within $0.05$ of the ceiling under the same terminal-tail model. In synthetic posterior comparisons, action-facing diagnostics differ across observation regimes. The candidate selection-aware frontier model fails synthetic recovery, objective-archive prediction, preference transfer, and uncertainty calibration; correspondingly, fixed audit gates reject its stronger claims. An archive-and-adjudication protocol reconstructs public evaluation histories, isolates a verified timing boundary, and falsifies unsupported frontier claims.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [526] [QPILOTS: Efficient Test-Time Q-Steering for Flow Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14801)
*Yifan Ruan,Chenyang Cao,Andreas Burger,Ali Pesaranghader,Kaveh Kamali,Jaehong Kim,Nandita Vijaykumar,Alan Aspuru-Guzik,Igor Gilitschenski,Nicholas Rhinehart*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出QPILOTS方法，通过推理时引导去噪过程而非修改策略本身，利用评论家梯度投影到干净动作上计算，在两个基准上取得SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散/流匹配策略与TD强化学习结合时，直接反向传播评论家梯度经过多步去噪过程存在数值不稳定问题，现有方法要么丢弃梯度信息、要么蒸馏策略、要么反复微调去噪策略，都无法在保留原策略的同时有效利用梯度。

Method: QPILOTS保持原策略不变，在推理时引导去噪过程。关键思想：每一步去噪时，将含噪中间状态投影到最终干净动作的估计上，在此干净动作上计算评论家梯度（避免噪声中间状态的不可靠评论家预测）。两种变体：QPILOTS-U使用快速单点近似；QPILOTS-M通过学习辅助网络生成可微的后验样本。

Result: 在离线到在线强化学习基准上，50个任务平均成功率90%，达到最佳聚合性能。在冻结的预训练VLA基础模型上，六项模拟操作任务中优于或持平现有推理时方法。

Conclusion: QPILOTS提供了一种无需修改原策略、无需微调即可将评论家梯度有效引入扩散/流匹配策略的推理时引导框架，在标准RL和VLA场景均有效。

Abstract: Flow-matching and diffusion policies are expressive action generators, but optimizing them with temporal-difference reinforcement learning (RL) remains difficult. Effective policy extraction requires exploiting the critic's action gradient, yet directly backpropagating this signal through a multi-step denoising process can be numerically unstable. Existing methods work around this either by discarding gradient information, distilling the policy into a simpler one-step actor, or repeatedly fine-tuning the denoising policy as the critic improves. We propose QPILOTS, a method that leaves the original policy unmodified and steers the denoising process at inference time. At each denoising step, instead of evaluating the critic on the noisy intermediate action where critic predictions are unreliable, we first project that intermediate state to an estimate of the final clean action and compute the critic gradient there. We introduce two variants: QPILOTS-U uses a fast single-point approximation, while QPILOTS-M draws differentiable posterior samples via a learned auxiliary network. On a standard offline-to-online RL benchmark, QPILOTS achieves the best aggregate performance, reaching an average success rate of 90% across 50 tasks. We also apply QPILOTS to steer a large, frozen, pretrained Vision-Language Action (VLA) foundation model, outperforming or matching prior inference-time approaches across six manipulation tasks in simulation.

</details>


### [527] [GRAPE: Guided Parameter-Space Evolution for Compact Adversarial Robustness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14865)
*Zhiyuan Ye,Xiangyu Zhou,Ji Qi,Hao Zhang,Yi Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GRAPE框架，通过渐进式参数空间暴露与引导式扩展，在固定计算预算下使紧凑网络获得优于传统对抗训练的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统对抗训练（AT）从始至终训练固定参数空间，但参数变得可优化的顺序是否影响最终鲁棒解这一问题尚未被探索。本文旨在研究参数空间暴露路径对模型鲁棒性的影响。

Method: GRAPE结合参数空间稳定化与渐进式隐藏扩展：在当前暴露空间中稳定鲁棒优化，逐步释放新的可优化维度，并利用对抗谱利用率分数引导新容量流向高压模块。

Result: 在CIFAR-10的ℓ∞威胁模型下，固定结构ResNet-18 AT作为对照，GRAPE将PGD-20鲁棒准确率从51.70%提升至56.94%，计算预算几乎匹配（FLOPs比1.009x），参数量减少约21.4%。同结构序列增长变体达到56.52%鲁棒准确率。

Conclusion: 引导式参数空间演化能在匹配计算条件下产生紧凑且鲁棒的参数配置，参数空间暴露路径本身（而非仅最终架构）对鲁棒性有显著影响。

Abstract: Adversarial Training (AT) improves neural network robustness, but most methods train a fixed parameter space from the start. This paper asks whether the order in which parameters become optimizable can affect the final robust solution, even when the final architecture or computation budget is controlled.
  We propose GRAPE, Guided Parameter-Space Evolution, a training framework for compact adversarial robustness. GRAPE combines parameter-space stabilization with progressive hidden expansion: it stabilizes robust optimization in the currently exposed space, gradually releases new optimizable dimensions, and uses an adversarial spectral utilization score to guide newly released capacity toward high-pressure modules. In contrast to fixed-structure AT, GRAPE treats robust model learning as a process of progressive parameter-space exposure and evolution.
  Under the standard $\ell_\infty$ threat model on CIFAR-10, with fixed-structure ResNet-18 AT as a controlled reference, GRAPE improves PGD-20 robust accuracy from 51.70% to 56.94% at a nearly matched computation budget with a FLOPs ratio of 1.009x, while reducing parameter count by about 21.4%. A sequential grow variant with the same final ResNet-18 architecture reaches 56.52% PGD-20 robust accuracy, indicating that the gain is not only due to final architecture differences but also to the parameter-space exposure path. These results suggest that guided parameter-space evolution can yield compact and robust parameter configurations under matched computation.

</details>


### [528] [α-Fair Insurance Pricing: A Fairness Continuum](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14898)
*Tianhe Zhang,Xiguang Liu,Peng Shi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出α-FISP框架，通过约束优化在精算公平与团结公平之间取得平衡，同时保证保险公司的偿付能力，并通过理论分析和数值实验验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 保险定价中长期存在精算公平（基于个体风险差异化定价）与团结公平（通过风险共担实现跨群体补贴）之间的矛盾，尤其是在大数据时代，精细化的风险区分加剧了这一张力，监管机构也面临保护弱势群体的压力。

Method: 将保险定价建模为约束优化问题：在偿付能力约束和每个风险类别内的跨补贴预算约束下，对精算公平保费进行调整。通过参数α（从0到1）控制精算公平与团结公平之间的权衡，生成一个连续的定价谱系。

Result: 理论层面证明了该框架的收敛性和最优性保证；数值实验表明α-FISP计算可行，且能很好地适应美国各州差异化的公平监管要求。

Conclusion: α-FISP为监管者和保险公司提供了一个灵活、可解释的定价工具，可以在精算公平与团结公平之间选择任意操作点，同时满足偿付能力这一基本要求。

Abstract: Fairness in insurance pricing remains a long-standing and deeply debated puzzle. On one hand, insurers, driven by profitability considerations, set premiums that differentiate across individual risks to achieve actuarial fairness. On the other hand, insurance serves a critical societal function by pooling risks across a population, motivating cross-subsidization among groups to promote solidarity fairness. The tension between these two competing notions of fairness makes insurance pricing inherently complex, particularly in modern settings where granular data allow for increasingly fine risk differentiation and regulators face growing pressure to protect vulnerable groups. To address this challenge, we propose an $α$-\textbf{F}air \textbf{I}ndividual \textbf{S}olvent \textbf{P}remium ($α$-FISP) framework for insurance pricing that explicitly captures the trade-off between actuarial and solidarity fairness while guaranteeing solvency, a fundamental requirement in insurance operations. We formulate the pricing problem as a constrained optimization task, where actuarially fair premiums are adjusted subject to budget constraints on cross-subsidization within each risk class. This formulation naturally yields a family of solutions parameterized by $α$, tracing a continuum between purely actuarial and purely solidarity-based pricing and enabling decision-makers to select an operating point along this fairness spectrum. We derive theoretical guarantees for the proposed framework. Numerical experiments show that $α$-FISP is computationally tractable and aligns well with the U.S. regulatory regimes featuring heterogeneous state-level fairness requirements.

</details>


### [529] [GRASP: Gradient-Aligned Sequential Parameter Transfer for Memory-Efficient Multi-Source Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14900)
*Mary Isabelle Wisell,Nicholas Jacobs,Aayush Manandhar,Salimeh Yasaei Sekeh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出GRASP方法，通过顺序处理、参数级梯度对齐和迭代微调，在O(1)内存消耗下实现多源迁移学习，内存恒定且准确率达93.5%，远超集成方法的71.7%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法存在O(K)内存瓶颈（模型融合需同时加载K个模型）或推理时部署所有模型导致生产不可行，亟需高效、可扩展的多源迁移学习方案。

Method: (1) 顺序处理：每次只合并一个源模型到目标模型；(2) 参数级梯度对齐：仅选择与目标域优化方向一致的参数进行迁移，避免负迁移；(3) 迭代微调：在整合下一个源模型前，先适应已迁移知识。

Result: 在三个持续学习基准（Yearbook、CLEAR-10、CLEAR-100，时间分布偏移10-108年）和四种架构（1.3M-25.6M参数）上，GRASP平均准确率93.5%（集成方法仅71.7%），内存恒定O(1)，可扩展至任意数量源。

Conclusion: GRASP以恒定内存实现了优于集成方法的知识整合，消除了O(K)瓶颈，特别适合资源受限部署和持续演化的源领域场景。

Abstract: Multi-source transfer learning faces a fundamental scalability bottleneck: existing approaches require either loading all K source models into memory simultaneously during parameter fusion, requiring O(K) memory, or deploying all models at inference time, making production deployment infeasible. We propose GRASP (Gradient-Aligned Sequential Parameter Transfer), which achieves superior knowledge integration while maintaining O(1) memory consumption through three key innovations: (1) sequential processing that merges one source at a time into an evolving target model, (2) parameter-wise gradient alignment that selectively transfers only parameters whose optimization directions align with the target domain, avoiding negative transfer, and (3) iterative fine-tuning that adapts transferred knowledge before integrating the next source. Extensive experiments across three continual learning benchmarks (Yearbook, CLEAR-10, CLEAR-100) spanning 10 to 108-year temporal distribution shifts and four architectures (1.3M to 25.6M parameters) demonstrate that GRASP achieves 93.5% mean accuracy over all datasets and architectures compared to ensemble method's 71.7% accuracy while requiring only constant memory versus K models for standard multi-source fusion. Critically, GRASP's sequential previously merged models and scales to arbitrarily many sources without memory growth, making it uniquely suitable for resource-constrained deployment and continually evolving source domains.

</details>


### [530] [Policy Regret for Embedding Model Routing: Contextual Bandits with Low-Rank Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14929)
*Yan Dai,Negin Golrezaei,Patrick Jaillet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文形式化了嵌入模型路由问题为对抗性上下文线性bandit问题，提出了Hypentropy策略梯度算法，可避免维度灾难，并提供了高效实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代推荐系统需要将多样化查询动态路由到多个嵌入模型，但该问题在对抗性查询、bandit反馈和模型可观测性有限等现实条件下尚不明确。

Method: 将嵌入模型路由形式化为对抗性上下文线性bandit（低秩专家），识别出对数二次策略类，并提出Hypentropy策略梯度算法。

Result: HPG算法可适应未知低秩结构，达到$\tilde{\mathcal O}(s\sqrt{M T})$的线性化策略遗憾，避免了维度灾难。

Conclusion: 提供了计算高效且无参数的超参数实现，解决了真实推荐系统中的关键路由问题。

Abstract: Modern recommendation systems increasingly rely on dynamically routing diverse queries to multiple embedding models. Despite its practical significance, this problem remains poorly understood under realistic conditions like adversarial queries, bandit feedback, and limited observability of models. We formalize embedding model routing as an adversarial contextual linear bandit with low-rank experts, where contexts are queries, actions are items, and experts are the embedding models working on low-rank latent representation spaces. We first establish that standard regret notions suffer from structural misspecification or statistical intractability, and we identify a log-quadratic policy class that is expressive enough to capture query-dependent model routing, yet structured enough to allow efficient online learning. Second, we propose a policy gradient algorithm called Hypentropy Policy Gradient (HPG). It provably adapts to the unknown low-rank structure under incomplete information and attains $\tilde{\mathcal O}(s\sqrt{M T})$ linearized policy regret -- where $s, M$, and $T$ are the intrinsic rank of the experts, the number of models, and the number of rounds -- thus avoiding a curse of dimensionality. Finally, we also provide an computationally efficient and parameter-free implementation of HPG.

</details>


### [531] [Separable Neural Architectures as Physical World Models: from Mathematical Theory to Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14934)
*Reza T Batley,Andrew Kichline,Sourav Saha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出可分离神经架构（SNA），将神经网络与张量分解结合，形成一种适用于高维偏微分方程求解的函数表示类。在变分框架（VSNA）下满足经典变分保证，并通过交替最小二乘优化实现线性维度缩放。在7D参数化制造模拟和热-性能反演管道中，实现了150,000倍于全网格有限元基线的加速，支持实时反演与不确定性传播。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决高维时空-参数化偏微分方程求解中的维度灾难问题，同时保证数值精度、收敛性和计算效率，实现可实时查询的物理世界模型。

Method: 提出SNA架构，将局部坐标函数（原子）与稀疏低秩全局交互对象解耦；在变分SNA（VSNA）框架下作为Galerkin试验空间；采用完全因子化的张量原生交替最小二乘（ALS）优化框架，将计算成本降至维度线性级别。

Result: 在7D参数化制造模拟和Inconel 718热-性能反演管道中，VSNA在标准笔记本CPU上以102秒完成100万次蒙特卡洛查询，相比A100 GPU上的全网格有限元基线实现150,000倍加速；支持100ms内的实时生成式反演重构。

Conclusion: SNA是一种紧凑的数学基元，适用于连续参数流形，能够实现实时反演、优化循环和快速不确定性传播，可作为求解高维PDE的高效替代方案。

Abstract: This work introduces the Separable Neural Architecture (SNA), a function representational class combining neural approximation with tensor decomposition. The SNA decouples localized coordinate functions (atoms) from global interactions governed by a sparse, low-rank interaction object. This architecture possesses a compact and smooth inductive bias well-suited for solving partial differential equations (PDEs). When viewed as a Galerkin trial space under the variational SNA (VSNA) framework, the formulation satisfies classical variational guarantees under Lax-Milgram: well-posedness, quasi-optimality, convergence, and stability. In high-dimensional spatiotemporal--parametric PDEs, the VSNA mitigates the curse of dimensionality by scaling algebraically rather than exponentially. Exploiting an entirely factorized, tensor-native alternating least squares (ALS) optimization framework reduces this cost to linear in dimension. The VSNA is validated across elliptic, hyperbolic, and parabolic systems, demonstrating close alignment with predicted algebraic and spectral scaling rates. We showcase the SNA as a "solve once, query anywhere" physical world model via two engineering case studies: a 7D parametric manufacturing simulation and an experimental thermal-to-property inversion pipeline for Inconel 718. The VSNA executes a 1,000,000-query Monte Carlo sweep in 102s on a standard laptop CPU, yielding a 150,000x speedup over a full-grid finite element baseline hosted on an NVIDIA A100 GPU. It further enables real-time generative inverse-mode reconstructions under 100ms. These results demonstrate that the SNA serves as a compact mathematical substrate for continuous parameter manifolds to enable real-time inversion, optimization loops, and rapid uncertainty propagation.

</details>


### [532] [Remember, Don't Re-read: Stateful ReAct Agents for Token-Efficient Autonomous Experimentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14945)
*Faramarz Jabbarvaziri*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文将自动研究模式从无状态重构为有状态ReAct智能体（基于LangGraph），通过类型化持久状态替代每次迭代重建上下文的做法，在超参数调优和代码优化任务上分别减少了90%和52%的token消耗，同时保持优化质量不变。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的自动研究模式采用无状态设计，每次迭代都要从头重建实验上下文，导致每次迭代O(n)的token成本，总成本高达O(n²)，效率极低。

Method: 将无状态的LLM自动研究模式重构为基于LangGraph的有状态ReAct智能体，利用类型化持久状态通过工具调用接口跨迭代传递实验历史，使每次迭代的成本从O(n)降为O(1)。

Result: 超参数调优任务中，有状态智能体消耗2,492个token（减少90%）；代码优化任务中消耗627K个token（减少52%），两个任务均达到相当的优化质量。

Conclusion: 有状态设计从根本上降低了token消耗，且不影响优化效果，为实践者提供了可直接实现的架构细节。

Abstract: The autoresearch pattern enables autonomous experimentation by having a large language model (LLM) iteratively modify code to optimize a target metric. Its stateless design, however, reconstructs experimental context from scratch at every iteration, incurring $O(n)$ token cost per iteration and $O(n^{2})$ total. This work reformulates the pattern as a stateful ReAct agent using LangGraph, where typed persistent state carries experimental history across iterations via a tool-calling interface. Two benchmarks are evaluated: hyperparameter tuning (15 iterations, small per-iteration observations) and code performance optimization (40 iterations, large per-iteration observations containing full source code and benchmark results). On hyperparameter tuning, the stateful agent consumes 90\% fewer tokens (2{,}492 vs.\ 24{,}465). On code optimization, the stateful agent consumes 52\% fewer tokens (627K vs.\ 1{,}275K) while achieving comparable optimization quality on both tasks. The token reduction is structural: the stateless agent re-reads the full history at $O(n)$ cost per iteration, while the stateful agent operates within a fixed-size conversation window at $O(1)$ cost. This paper describes the architecture in sufficient detail for practitioners to implement a stateful autoresearch agent for their own workflows.

</details>


### [533] [A Comparative Study of Graph Neural Network Layer Selection for Interaction Modelling in Driving Trajectory Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14956)
*George Daoud,Mohamed El-Darieby*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对19种图神经网络层进行系统性比较研究，发现ARMA、Chebyshev和拓扑感知层在轨迹预测中表现最佳，并总结出三个关键设计原则：求和聚合优于均值、多头注意力增强交互、不同跳距赋予不同权重可显著提升预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自动驾驶轨迹预测中GNN架构设计缺乏标准化，现有研究对哪些图神经网络层能最有效地捕捉空间交互和时间动态缺乏系统性指导。

Method: 对19种图神经网络层进行详细的比较研究，聚焦于空间和时间处理能力，在特定超参数设置下评估不同架构组合的性能。

Result: ARMA、Chebyshev和拓扑感知层等五种层组合表现最优；发现求和聚合优于均值聚合、多头注意力机制能增强交互、不同跳距分配不同权重可提升预测精度。

Conclusion: 为设计更具可解释性和有效性的轨迹预测模型提供了实用的设计原则和指导。

Abstract: Autonomous driving systems rely on precise trajectory prediction to plan safe and efficient movement. Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have become a promising approach for modelling spatiotemporal interactions among road agents. However, designing GNN architectures for trajectory prediction remains non-standardized, with little guidance on which graph layers effectively capture spatial interactions and temporal dynamics. This paper offers a detailed comparative study of 19 graph layer types, focusing on their spatial and temporal processing capabilities to discover the most effective architectures for trajectory prediction. Within the explored hyperparameter setting, we highlight five standout layer combinations, with ARMA, Chebyshev, and topology-aware layers consistently performing better than others. Beyond performance metrics, our findings yield practical design principles: sum-based aggregation is more effective than mean-based methods, multi-head attention mechanisms enable richer interactions, and assigning different weights to different hop distances significantly improves prediction accuracy. These findings offer useful guidance for designing more interpretable and effective trajectory prediction models.

</details>


### [534] [Leveraging Physiological Signals to Predict Exam Outcomes with Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14960)
*Lala Yamazaki,Ramchandra Rimal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究利用机器学习模型分析考试期间的生理数据（皮肤电活动、心率、皮肤温度）来预测学业成绩，发现深度学习模型擅长捕捉复杂关系，但随机森林等简单模型在效率和可解释性上表现更优，Transformer展现出与LSTM、GRU相当的 versatility。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索生理信号与学业表现之间的关联，利用机器学习方法预测考试结果，以理解学生压力因素并促进心理健康与学业提升。

Method: 收集考试期间的生理指标（皮肤电活动、心率、皮肤温度），应用多种机器学习模型，包括逻辑回归、随机森林、支持向量机、Transformer、LSTM、GRU，使用准确率、精确率、召回率和F1分数进行性能评估。

Result: 深度学习模型擅长捕捉生理数据中的复杂关系，但随机森林等简单模型在性能、计算效率和可解释性方面有时更优；Transformer展现出与LSTM、GRU相当的性能和适应性。

Conclusion: 应根据问题目标选择合适的模型，平衡精度、效率和可解释性；生理数据可用于预测学业表现，有助于理解学生压力并改善其心理健康和学业成果。

Abstract: This study investigates the application of machine learning models to predict exam outcomes using physiological data collected during examination sessions. Physiological stress indicators, including electrodermal activity, heart rate, and skin temperature, were analyzed to uncover their association with academic performance. A variety of machine learning approaches were employed, ranging from standard models like logistic regression, random forest, and support vector machines to more advanced architectures, including transformers, long short-term memory (LSTM), and gated recurrent unit (GRU) models. This diversity aimed to capture the complex interactions within the data effectively. A key focus was assessing the adaptability of transformers in processing numerical data and evaluating their performance in this novel context. Standard performance metrics, such as accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score, were used to compare model efficacy. The experimental results demonstrate that while deep learning models generally excel at capturing complex relationships in physiological data, simpler models like random forests can sometimes achieve superior performance while offering computational efficiency and interpretability. Furthermore, transformers demonstrated notable versatility, showcasing performances comparable to those of the LSTM and GRU models. This research underscores the importance of experimenting with a broad class of models that align with the objectives of the problem at hand, balancing precision, efficiency, and interpretability. By elucidating the relationships between physiological signals and academic performance, this study contributes to understanding stressors affecting students' mental health. It further promotes leveraging physiological data to enhance student well-being and academic outcomes.

</details>


### [535] [Benchmarking Instance-Dependent Label Noise with Controlled Corruptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14965)
*Shadman Islam,Agustinus Kristiadi,Mostafa Milani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CILN框架，通过受控输入损坏生成实例依赖标签噪声，构建90个基准设置，发现噪声结构而非仅噪声率影响算法表现，暴露了现有方法未观察到的失败模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有合成实例依赖噪声基准通常通过不完美标注器或分类器生成噪声，噪声来源不明确。需要一种明确且可控的噪声生成框架，以便更好地研究噪声结构对算法行为的影响。

Method: CILN框架通过对输入样本施加受控损坏（如多种破坏类型和严重程度），由多样化投票池对损坏实例进行标注，从而生成噪声标签。在CIFAR-10、MNIST和Adult上构建了90个基准设置。

Result: 生成的基准表现出真实的实例依赖噪声，具有多样化的混淆结构，在CIFAR-10上能产生比现有合成IDN基准更接近人类不确定性的标签分布。Co-Teaching和DivideMix等流行方法在损坏介导噪声下暴露了在可比噪声率下未观察到的失败模式。

Conclusion: 噪声结构（而非仅噪声率）对基准难度和算法行为有重要影响；CILN通过显式可控的歧义生成，为研究实例依赖噪声下的噪声标签学习提供了互补性的基准框架。

Abstract: Synthetic instance-dependent label noise (IDN) benchmarks are widely used to evaluate noisy-label learning methods, yet existing approaches typically generate noise through imperfect annotators or classifier raters, leaving the source of ambiguity implicit. We introduce CILN, a benchmark generation framework that creates IDN through controlled input corruptions. A diverse voter pool labels corrupted instances, producing benchmark datasets in which both the source and severity of ambiguity are explicit and controllable. Using CIFAR10, MNIST, and Adult, we construct 90 benchmark settings spanning multiple corruption families and severity levels. Our experiments show that the resulting benchmarks exhibit genuine instance-dependent noise, provide diverse confusion structures, and, on CIFAR-10, can produce label distributions that are closer to human uncertainty than an existing synthetic IDN benchmark. We further demonstrate that corruption-mediated IDN can expose failure modes of popular noisy-label learning methods, including Co-Teaching and DivideMix, that are not observed under comparable levels of rater-fallibility noise. These findings suggest that noise structure, not only noise rate, plays an important role in benchmark difficulty and algorithm behavior. By making ambiguity generation explicit and controllable, CILN provides a complementary benchmarking framework for studying noisy-label learning under diverse sources of instance difficulty.

</details>


### [536] [Zero-order Parameter-free Optimization for LMO-based Methods: Novel Approach for Efficient Fine-tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14970)
*Dmitriy Bystrov,Daniil Medyakov,Dmitry Bylinkin,Aleksandr Beznosikov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AdaNAGED，一种融合零阶优化、无参数自适应和非欧几里得更新几何的统一方法，用于大语言模型的高效微调，并在OPT-1.3B模型上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大模型微调中反向传播的内存开销巨大，零阶优化虽能节省内存但对步长和平滑参数敏感，需要昂贵的任务特定调参。无参数优化和几何感知更新可分别解决调参困难和参数块异质结构问题。

Method: 提出了AdaNAGED方法，它统一了：(1) 基于线性最小化预言机（LMO）的零阶优化（无梯度训练）；(2) 无参数自适应调参（无需问题相关常数）；(3) 非欧几里得更新几何（处理参数块的异质结构）。

Result: 建立了收敛性保证，并在OPT-1.3B大模型微调任务上进行了验证。

Conclusion: AdaNAGED成功将无参数自适应与LMO零阶优化结合，为大模型微调提供了一种内存高效、无需手动调参且具有几何感知能力的优化方法。

Abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) has become a central application of modern optimization, enabling pretrained models to adapt to diverse downstream tasks and domain-specific data. A major obstacle in large-scale fine-tuning is the memory overhead of backpropagation, which requires storing activations, gradients, and optimizer states. Zeroth-order (ZO) optimization offers a memory-efficient alternative, but its performance is highly sensitive to the stepsize and smoothing parameter, often requiring costly task-specific tuning. Parameter-free (PF) optimization addresses this issue by adapting algorithmic parameters without prior knowledge of problem-dependent constants. Moreover, large-scale fine-tuning can benefit from geometry-aware updates that account for the heterogeneous structure of parameter blocks, which can be modeled through methods that exploit linear minimization oracle (LMO). In this work, we study PF adaptation for LMO-based ZO optimization and introduce $\texttt{AdaNAGED}$, a method that unifies gradient-free training, adaptive tuning, and non-Euclidean update geometry. We establish convergence guarantees and validate the method on large-scale LLM fine-tuning task with $\texttt{OPT}-1.3\mathrm{B}$ model.

</details>


### [537] [FastMix: Fast Data Mixture Optimization via Gradient Descent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14971)
*Haoru Tan,Sitong Wu,Yanfeng Chen,Jun Xia,Ruobing Xie,Bin Xia,Xingwu Sun,Xiaojuan Qi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FASTMIX是一种自动发现最优数据混合配比的框架，通过双层优化将混合系数嵌入可微训练目标，仅需训练单个代理模型即可高效优化预训练和后训练的数据配比，显著降低搜索成本并提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模模型依赖多样化的数据集，但如何确定最优的数据混合配比（包括预训练和后训练阶段）仍然是一个重要的开放问题。现有方法依赖预定义启发式规则或资源密集型模拟，效率低下。

Method: FASTMIX将数据混合选择重新形式化为双层优化问题：内循环根据当前混合比例采样数据更新模型参数，外循环基于验证反馈更新混合比例。核心创新在于证明优化混合系数等价于在均匀源采样下分配每源的损失权重，从而将混合系数嵌入可微迭代优化目标中，实现基于梯度的联合优化。

Result: 在预训练和后训练场景中，FASTMIX均优于基线方法，同时大幅降低了搜索成本。

Conclusion: FASTMIX通过将数据混合选择转化为可微的双层优化问题，仅需训练单个代理模型即可高效发现最优数据配比，为大规模模型的数据混合优化提供了一种高效、可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: While large and diverse datasets have driven recent advances in large models, identifying the optimal data mixture for pre-training and post-training remains a significant open problem. We address this challenge with FASTMIX, a novel framework that automates data mixture discovery while training only a single proxy model. Instead of relying on predefined heuristics or resource-intensive simulations, FASTMIX jointly optimizes mixture coefficients and model parameters, substantially improving efficiency and scalability over prior approaches. At the core of FASTMIX is a reformulation of mixture selection as a bilevel optimization problem. Under this reformulation, we show that optimizing mixture ratios is mathematically equivalent to assigning per-source loss weights under uniform source sampling. This embeds the mixture coefficients directly into the differentiable iterative optimization objective, enabling efficient, gradient-based optimization of both mixture and model. To solve the optimization problem, FASTMIX implements an approximate iterative optimization procedure, alternating between (i) updating model parameters on data sampled according to current mixture ratios (inner loop) and (ii) updating mixture ratios based on validation feedback (outer loop). Across pre- and post-training, FASTMIX outperforms baselines while drastically reducing search cost. Code (https://github.com/hrtan/fastmix)

</details>


### [538] [Rational Sparse Autoencoder](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14990)
*Naiyu Yin,Yue Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Rational Sparse Autoencoder (RSAE)，用可训练的有理函数替代固定编码器激活函数，通过初始化+微调两阶段流程，在多个语言模型和基线方法上改善了重构质量与下游行为指标，仅增加少量参数且训练高效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有稀疏自编码器（SAE）家族使用固定的编码器非线性函数（如ReLU、JumpReLU、TopK），这硬编码了特定的稀疏机制，可能扭曲重构与稀疏性之间的权衡，缺乏灵活性。

Method: 提出RSAE，用可训练的有理函数替换固定激活函数。两阶段流程：①初始化阶段，拷贝预训练基线SAE权重，通过松弛Remez交换算法从合成数据获取有理系数，并校准尺度参数；②微调阶段，在标准稀疏正则化重构目标下进行微调。

Result: 在三种开源语言模型的残差流激活上，针对三种基线激活族，RSAE在微调后在重构指标和下游行为指标上均有严格改善，且不损害特征级可解释性。增益在多个模型、激活族和稀疏度水平上一致，升级仅增加少量标量参数，单张消费级GPU上数分钟即可完成。

Conclusion: RSAE通过可训练有理函数提供更灵活的激活形式，统一并超越了现有SAE家族，在保持可解释性的前提下显著提升性能，是一种高效且通用的SAE升级方案。

Abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) are standard tools for mechanistic interpretability, but current SAE families are constrained by fixed encoder nonlinearities such as ReLU, JumpReLU, and TopK. This hard-codes a particular sparsity mechanism into the model and can distort the reconstruction-versus-sparsity trade-off. We introduce the Rational Sparse Autoencoder (RSAE), which replaces the fixed encoder activation with a trainable rational function. Rational activations are flexible enough to uniformly approximate the activation primitives used by existing SAE families on compact domains (for TopK, the thresholded gate obtained after a separating top-k threshold is supplied), while also providing a richer function class for adapting to the observed pre-activation geometry. We realise this idea through a two-stage pipeline: an initialisation procedure that copies the pre-trained baseline SAE weights, plugs in rational coefficients obtained by the relaxed Remez exchange on synthetic data, and calibrates the scale parameters along with the rational coefficients; followed by a fine-tuning step under the standard sparsity-regularised reconstruction objective. Empirically, on residual-stream activations of three open-weight language models and across all three baseline activation families, the RSAE strictly improves on it after the fine-tuning step, both on reconstruction-side metrics and on downstream-behaviour metrics, without sacrificing feature-level interpretability under sparse probing. These gains are consistent across host language models, across baseline activation families, and across the full range of baseline sparsity we tested, while the upgrade itself adds only a handful of scalar parameters per autoencoder and runs in minutes on a single consumer GPU.

</details>


### [539] [Unlocking Latent Dimensions: Exploring Representations of Large-Scale X-ray Scattering Data using Variational Autoencoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.14999)
*Monika Choudhary,Xiaoya Chong,Runbo Jiang,Wiebke Koepp,Petrus H. Zwart,Damon English,Gregory M. Su,Eric Schaible,Chenhui Zhu,Mostafa Nassr,Noah P. Wamble,Kelvin Kam-Yun Li,Jonathan M. Chan,Jose Carlos Diaz,Cameron McKay,Lynn Katz,Benny Freeman,Guillaume Freychet,Yevgen Matviychuk,Eliot Gann,Daniel B. Allan,Benedikt Sochor,Frank Schluenzen,Stephan V. Roth,Ethan Crumlin,Dylan McReynolds,Tanny Chavez,Alexander Hexemer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的卷积变分自编码器（C-VAE），在150万张X射线散射图像上训练，学习能够捕捉结构变化的低维潜在空间表示。该模型支持离线数据集探索和在线实时分析，无需重新训练即可在两个同步辐射设施的时间分辨薄膜形成实验中产生可解释的潜在结构，并集成到MLExchange平台的Latent Space Explorer组件中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 科学用户设施产生的X射线散射数据量远超传统工作流程的处理能力，需要更高效的数据分析方法来应对这一挑战。

Method: 使用基于注意力机制的卷积变分自编码器（C-VAE）在150万张X射线散射图像上进行领域特定的训练，学习低维潜在空间表示。在两个不同场景（离线数据集探索和在线实时分析）中部署模型，并与通用视觉基础模型DINOv3 (ViT-7B)进行对比。

Result: 潜在空间展现出良好组织的聚类和反映实验进展的平滑轨迹，支持跨不同结构状态的受控合成散射图像生成。在两个同步辐射设施的时间分辨实验中无需重新训练即可产生可解释的潜在结构。与DINOv3相比，领域特定训练产生了更可解释的潜在组织结构。

Conclusion: 领域特定的潜在空间学习方法优于通用模型，为X射线散射数据的离线探索和实时分析提供了有效解决方案，并已集成到MLExchange平台的交互式工具中。

Abstract: Scientific user facilities generate X-ray scattering data faster than traditional workflows can process them. We address this challenge across two settings, offline dataset exploration and live on-the-fly analysis. We train a domain-specific attention-based Convolutional Variational Autoencoder (C-VAE) on 1.5 million X-ray scattering images to learn low-dimensional representations capturing structural variation across diverse experimental conditions. The learned latent space reveals well-organized clusters and smooth trajectories reflecting experimental progression. It further supports controlled synthetic scattering image generation across diverse structural states. When deployed without retraining, the model organizes time-resolved film formation experiments at two synchrotron facilities into interpretable latent structures. Benchmarking against DINOv3 (ViT-7B), a general-purpose vision foundation model, demonstrates that domain-specific training yields more interpretable latent organization for scattering data. Both workflows are integrated within Latent Space Explorer, a component of the MLExchange platform, supporting interactive structural exploration across archived datasets and live experiments.

</details>


### [540] [How Should World Models Be Evaluated? A Decision-Making-Centric Position](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15032)
*Yang Yu,Shiyuan Zhang,Yifei Sheng,Haoxiang Ren,Haoxin Lin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统调查了世界模型在具身决策中评估方法多样性和声明/证据不匹配的问题，提出L0-L7分层框架，并倡导以决策为中心、关注反事实推理和策略优化效用的评估协议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前"世界模型"术语涵盖多种不同对象，评估指标高度分散，导致论文常提出强声明但实验证据不足以支撑。亟需澄清不同评估标准的适用场景，解决声明与证据之间的系统性不匹配问题。

Method: 通过文献调研，构建L0（视觉合理性）到L7（策略优化效用）的八级评估阶梯，将现有评估方法归类分析。提出以决策为中心的评估框架，包含反事实动作保真度、闭环推演有效性、奖赏/价值预测、策略排序一致性、优化提升量、模型可利用性和不确定性校准七个方面。

Result: 识别出评估层级中L0-L3主要诊断生成伪影质量，L4是首个真正的干预测试，L5-L7提供决策有用性的直接证据。澄清了不同评估层级能支持和不能支持的声明类型。

Conclusion: 世界模型的评估应取决于其使用场景。对于具身决策应用，不应仅关注视觉质量，而应重点检验模型在反事实推理、策略评估、规划以及干预分布偏移下的长程推演能力。所提出的评估协议为社区提供了更严格、更贴合实际需求的标准化测评方案。

Abstract: World models have rapidly become one of the central abstractions in modern AI. Yet the term now refers to several different objects: action-conditioned environment models, latent imagination models, future-video predictors, interactive neural simulators, latent predictive representations, and synthetic-data engines. Evaluation has broadened with the term. Recent papers measure video realism, perceptual similarity, instruction following, physical plausibility, policy ranking, executability, planning success, and downstream policy improvement.
