Method: 将 Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) 与 Full-Gradient Class Activation Mapping (FullGrad) 相结合，利用 FullGrad 的完整梯度分解和主观逻辑的不确定性量化，通过信念加权归因生成 vacuity 和 dissonance 激活图。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上的广泛评估表明，该框架有效弥合了不确定性量化与可解释性之间的关键差距，提供直观的视觉反馈以评估模型在复杂视觉识别任务中的可靠性。

Conclusion: UAM 框架能有效定位模型缺乏知识的区域（vacuity）与遭遇模糊证据的区域（dissonance），为安全关键领域的模型部署提供了可靠的可视化工具。

Abstract: Understanding when and why deep neural networks are uncertain is crucial for deploying reliable machine learning systems in safety-critical domains. While existing uncertainty quantification methods provide scalar measures of model confidence, they offer limited insight into which spatial regions of an input contribute to different types of uncertainty. We propose a novel visualization framework, Uncertainty Activation Map (UAM), that combines Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) with Full-Gradient Class Activation Mapping (FullGrad) to generate interpretable spatial uncertainty activation maps. Our approach distinguishes between two fundamental types of uncertainty: vacuity, representing lack of evidence, and dissonance, capturing conflicting evidence between competing hypotheses. By leveraging the complete gradient decomposition property of FullGrad and the principled uncertainty quantification of Subjective Logic, our method produces theoretically grounded visualizations that highlight specific image regions responsible for model uncertainty. With this framework, vacuity and dissonance activation maps are generated by computing belief-weighted attributions, enabling identification of where models lack knowledge versus where they encounter ambiguous evidence. Extensive evaluations across multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework effectively addresses the critical gap between uncertainty quantification and explainability, providing intuitive visual feedback to assess model reliability in complex visual recognition tasks.

</details>


### [614] [Bayesian Networks with Latent Time Embedding for Stage-Aware Causal Modeling of Alzheimer's Disease Progression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15784)
*Nguyen Linh Dan Le*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出BN-LTE，一个贝叶斯结构框架，通过潜在时间嵌入和AT(N)约束来建模阿尔茨海默病进展，并在ADNI数据上实现了优于基准的tau蛋白扩散预测，同时可解释阶段依赖的病理机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AD进展模型要么将生物标志物视为固定序列，要么作为黑箱预测任务，难以判断生物标志物关系何时影响未来区域病理。需要一种既能预测又能揭示阶段依赖机制的框架。

Method: BN-LTE结合贝叶斯网络与潜在时间嵌入：从基线生物标志物中估计疾病伪时间，依据AT(N)层级约束有向依赖关系，通过后验样条变结构方程将基线多模态测量与未来年度区域tau-PET变化关联。

Result: 在ADNI数据上多次交叉验证中，BN-LTE在tau蛋白扩散的空间重建上优于所有基线模型，并识别出中伪时间段的淀粉样蛋白敏感性窗口，经多种敏感性分析验证。

Conclusion: BN-LTE是一个能够在预测tau扩散的同时检验阶段依赖的AT(N)级联机制的可解释贝叶斯结构框架，为观察性神经影像数据提供了因果推断工具。

Abstract: Alzheimer's disease (AD) progression is often described through the amyloid-tau-neurodegeneration, or AT(N), cascade. However, most longitudinal models represent this cascade either as a fixed sequence of biomarkers or as a black-box forecasting task. This makes it difficult to determine when biologically guided biomarker relationships influence future regional pathology. In this study, we introduce Bayesian Networks with Latent Time Embedding (BN-LTE), a Bayesian structural framework for stage-aware modeling of AD progression. BN-LTE estimates disease pseudotime from baseline biomarker profiles and constrains directed dependencies according to biologically plausible AT(N) ordering. Posterior spline-varying structural equations are then used to link initial multimodal measurements with future annualized regional tau-PET change. Across repeated subject-disjoint evaluations using ADNI data, BN-LTE shows strong spatial reconstruction of tau progression compared with the included forecasting baselines. Beyond spatial reconstruction, BN-LTE recovers posterior stage-varying AT(N)-constrained effects and identifies a mid-pseudotime window of amyloid sensitivity. This window is supported by model-implied g-formula contrasts, root-adjusted AIPW, mechanism-sensitive ablations, and robustness analyses across spline and prior specifications. Overall, these findings position BN-LTE as a Bayesian structural framework for forecasting tau progression while examining stage-dependent AT(N)-cascade mechanisms in observational longitudinal neuroimaging data. Our code is available at https://github.com/danleneurocom/BN-LTE.

</details>


### [615] [Proximal Policy Optimization for Amortized Discrete Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15793)
*Anna Zykova-Myzina,Timofei Gritsaev,Daniil Tiapkin,Nikita Morozov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次将近端策略优化（PPO）成功应用于生成流网络（GFlowNets），在结构化离散概率分布的采样任务中，相比标准训练目标展现出更快的收敛速度和更高的数据效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索在GFlowNet框架下训练随机策略以从结构化离散概率分布中采样的策略梯度算法，并建立GFlowNets与熵正则化强化学习之间的理论联系。

Method: 基于GFlowNets与熵正则化强化学习的理论联系，推导了适用于GFlowNets的标准策略梯度算法等价形式，并实验性地研究了基线训练和优势估计等方法论方面。最关键的是首次推导并成功应用了近端策略优化（PPO）到GFlowNets中。

Result: PPO相比标准GFlowNet训练目标，在从合成能量到分子图生成等基准任务上，展现出更快的收敛速度和更高的数据效率。

Conclusion: 策略梯度方法（尤其是PPO）可有效应用于GFlowNet训练，且PPO在收敛速度和数据效率方面优于现有标准方法。

Abstract: This paper explores policy gradient algorithms for training stochastic policies to sample from structured discrete probability distributions under the Generative Flow Network (GFlowNet) framework. Building on extensive theoretical connections between GFlowNets and entropy-regularized reinforcement learning, we derive equivalents of standard policy gradient algorithms for training GFlowNets, as well as experimentally explore their various methodological aspects, including baseline training and advantage estimation. Most importantly, our work is the first to derive and successfully apply proximal policy optimization to GFlowNets, showing its improved convergence speed and data efficiency compared to standard GFlowNet training objectives on benchmarks ranging from synthetic energies to molecular graph generation.

</details>


### [616] [Mean-Field Parallel Decoding for Discrete Diffusion Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15805)
*Tamim Zoabi,Ameen Ali,Liran Ringel,Lior Wolf*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种无需训练的解码框架，通过在并行更新时引入提交分数和成对交互修正，协调离散扩散语言模型中的token选择，改善生成质量与延迟的平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离散扩散语言模型虽能并行生成token实现低延迟，但基于边际置信度的独立选择会导致位置间不兼容的配置，限制了并行性的有效性。

Method: 提出无需训练的解码框架：为每个掩码位置分配提交分数，利用模型预测分布推导的成对交互来修正这些分数；通过变分松弛得到简单的固定点更新，在单次前向传播中抑制冲突的并行提交。

Result: 在推理和代码生成基准上，该方法在生成质量与延迟的权衡上取得了一致改善。

Conclusion: 该方法轻量级、无需辅助模型或重训练，可直接嵌入现有扩散解码流程，有效提升了并行提交的token数量同时保持生成质量。

Abstract: Discrete diffusion language models enable parallel token generation, offering a pathway to low-latency decoding. However, selecting tokens independently by marginal confidence limits effective parallelism: tokens that appear reliable in isolation can form incompatible configurations when several positions are updated at once. We introduce a training-free decoding framework that coordinates these parallel updates. At each forward pass, the method assigns a commit score to each masked position and refines these scores using pairwise interactions derived from the model's predictive distributions. A variational relaxation yields a simple fixed-point update that suppresses conflicting simultaneous commitments within a single forward pass. This mechanism allows the decoder to commit more tokens in parallel while maintaining competitive generation quality. The method is lightweight, requires no auxiliary model or retraining, and drops into existing diffusion decoding pipelines without modification. Experiments on reasoning and code-generation benchmarks show consistent improvements in the quality-latency trade-off.

</details>


### [617] [Continuous Cross-Domain Traffic State Prediction via Memory-Augmented Graph Liquid Time-Constant Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15807)
*Jinrong Xiang,Ming Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出记忆增强图液体时间常数网络（MA-GLTC），通过时空单元分解、图液体时间常数网络和记忆迁移存储机制，解决跨域交通预测中的细粒度知识对齐、未见过模式处理和连续时间动态建模问题，在五个数据集上取得最优结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有跨域交通预测方法存在三个局限：源域与目标域适应粒度粗糙、难以处理目标域未见模式、对不规则/异构时间条件下的连续交通动态建模不足。

Method: 1）构建时空单元（STU）将交通网络分解为可迁移的局部单元，实现细粒度跨域知识对齐；2）提出图液体时间常数网络（GLTC），引入图耦合循环电导到液体时间常数动力学中，支持泄露、自适应时间常数和邻域感知反馈的节点状态演化；3）设计基于记忆的迁移存储机制（MTS），保留源域知识、检索匹配交通模式、更新未见状态下的目标域模式。

Result: 在五个公开交通数据集上，MA-GLTC在短时与长时预测任务中均优于代表性域内和跨域基线方法，相比第二优方法，平均预测误差分别降低3.02%、0.33%、8.92%、10.09%和2.11%。

Conclusion: MA-GLTC通过细粒度对齐、连续时间建模和记忆迁移机制，有效解决了跨域交通预测中的关键挑战，验证了其在数据稀缺场景下的优越性。

Abstract: Traffic state prediction is a fundamental task in intelligent transportation systems. In practical applications, some regions suffer from limited traffic observations due to insufficient sensing infrastructure, making cross-domain knowledge transfer an important solution for data-scarce traffic prediction. However, existing cross-domain traffic prediction methods still face several limitations, including coarse-grained source-target adaptation, limited capability in handling unseen target-domain patterns, and insufficient modeling of continuous traffic dynamics under irregular or heterogeneous temporal conditions. To address these issues, this paper proposes a continuous cross-domain traffic prediction framework, termed Memory-Augmented Graph Liquid Time-Constant Network (MA-GLTC). Specifically, we first construct spatio-temporal units (STUs) to decompose traffic networks into transferable local units, enabling fine-grained knowledge alignment across domains. Then, a graph liquid time-constant network (GLTC) is developed to model graph-coupled traffic evolution in continuous time. Different from generic graph neural ODE-based models, GLTC introduces graph-coupled recurrent conductance into liquid time-constant dynamics, allowing node states to evolve with leakage, adaptive time constants, and neighborhood-aware feedback. Furthermore, a Memory-based Transfer Storage (MTS) mechanism is designed to preserve source-domain knowledge, retrieve matched traffic patterns, and update reliable target-domain patterns when unseen states emerge. Experiments on five public traffic datasets demonstrate that MA-GLTC consistently outperforms representative innerdomain and cross-domain baselines in both short-term and longterm prediction tasks. Compared with the second-best method, MA-GLTC reduces the average prediction errors by 3.02%, 0.33%, 8.92%, 10.09%, and 2.11%, respectively.

</details>


### [618] [Brownian Kernel Ladders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15812)
*Mahdi Mohammadigohari,Giuseppe Di Fatta,Giuseppe Nicosia,Panos M Pardalos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出布朗核梯（BKL）——一种通过递归积分构造的层级再生核希尔伯特空间，该空间具有深度编码的分层组合表示能力。作者证明了BKL空间是拟巴拿赫空间，满足随深度递增的Hölder正则性估计，且高斯复杂度界限可随维度和深度均匀控制，最终实现了近参数阶的过量风险保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建可数学处理且能捕捉层级组合表示的函数空间是统计学习理论的核心挑战，现有方法在处理深度层级结构时面临困难。

Method: 提出布朗核梯（BKL）框架：从线性泛函出发，通过布朗核积分构造递归层级。每个层级通过在前一层子集上对概率测度积分布朗核得到。采用递归子集分解和布朗核阈值表示的组合证明技术建立理论性质。

Result: 证明了BKL空间是拟巴拿赫空间，满足深度依赖的Hölder正则性估计，具有严格的深度单调性；证明了正则化经验风险最小化存在性；推导出维度和深度均匀可控的高斯复杂度界；给出近参数阶的过量风险保证。

Conclusion: BKL为深度学习中的组合表示研究提供了一个数学上可处理的层级函数空间框架，有助于理解深度架构的表达能力和泛化特性。

Abstract: Constructing mathematically tractable function spaces that capture hierarchical compositional representations remains a central challenge in statistical learning theory. We introduce Brownian kernel ladders (BKLs), a recursively defined hierarchy of integral reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces generated through Brownian-kernel integral constructions. Starting from linear functionals, each layer is obtained by integrating Brownian kernels over probability measures supported on subsets of the previous layer, yielding a recursive function-space model in which depth is encoded directly through the hierarchy.
  Based on this framework, we define canonical BKL spaces together with an associated complexity functional. We establish several analytical and statistical properties of these spaces. In particular, we show that BKL spaces form quasi-Banach spaces, satisfy depth-dependent Hölder regularity estimates, and exhibit strict monotonicity with respect to depth. We further prove existence results for regularized empirical risk minimization and derive Gaussian complexity bounds that remain uniformly controlled with respect to both the ambient dimension and the hierarchy depth.
  A key ingredient of the analysis is a combinatorial proof technique based on recursive subset decompositions and Brownian-kernel threshold representations. These estimates yield excess-risk guarantees of near-parametric order for regularized empirical risk minimization over BKL spaces. Our results provide a mathematically tractable hierarchical function-space framework for studying compositional representations in deep learning.

</details>


### [619] [SILAGE: Memory-Efficient, Full-Gradient-Free Nonconvex Optimization for Nested Finite Sums](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15832)
*Igor Sokolov,Laurent Condat,Peter Richtárik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SILAGE是一种利用双层有限和结构的大规模非凸优化方差缩减算法，通过消除全局全梯度刷新并将内存降低到O(n)，同时自适应数据结构中的组间和组内异质性，在多个实际场景中达到最先进复杂度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方差缩减方法（如PAGE）在大规模双层求和结构数据上存在计算瓶颈：递归方法需要周期性全局全梯度刷新（计算成本高），而单循环方法（如SILVER）需要O(nm)的过大内存来存储控制变量。论文旨在打破这一权衡。

Method: 提出SILAGE算法，主动利用数据的双层求和结构（N=nm，n组每组m样本），每轮迭代最多只计算一个局部组梯度，避免全局全梯度刷新，仅需O(n)内存。收敛分析引入组间异质性δ1和组内异质性δ2两个几何度量，避免最坏情况Lipschitz常数。

Result: SILAGE在保持O(n)低内存的同时消除了全局全梯度刷新，收敛复杂度自适应地依赖于数据的内在异质性（δ1和δ2），在多个实际区域改进了现有最优边界。

Conclusion: SILAGE有效解决了大规模非凸优化中计算成本与内存开销之间的权衡问题，其适应性复杂度分析为实际部署提供了更紧的理论保证。

Abstract: Empirical risk minimization on massive datasets naturally exhibits a nested double finite-sum structure, where $N=nm$ total samples are logically or physically partitioned into $n$ blocks of size $m$ (e.g., in pooled data silos, out-of-core learning, or deliberate stratification). While variance-reduced methods achieve optimal oracle complexities for nonconvex objectives, they suffer from severe scaling bottlenecks in this centralized regime. Recursive estimators, such as PAGE, require periodic global full-gradient refreshes over all $nm$ samples, which are computationally expensive. Conversely, single-loop methods, such as SILVER, avoid such refreshes but require an impractical $\mathcal{O}(nm)$ memory footprint to store a control variate for every sample. In this paper, we propose SILAGE, a variance-reduced algorithm that addresses this trade-off. By actively exploiting the double-sum structure, SILAGE eliminates periodic global full-gradient refreshes over all $nm$ components (evaluating at most one local group gradient per iteration) while requiring only $\mathcal{O}(n)$ memory. Furthermore, we provide a tight convergence analysis that avoids pessimistic worst-case Lipschitz constants. Instead, SILAGE's complexity natively adapts to the underlying data geometry via nested functional similarities: across-group ($δ_1$) and within-group ($δ_2$) heterogeneity. Our results improve existing state-of-the-art bounds in several practically relevant regimes.

</details>


### [620] [Wasserstein Convergence of ODE-Based Samplers in Decentralized Diffusion Model via Velocity Field Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15835)
*Chencheng Tang,Xuanyu Xue,Fangyikang Wang,Chao Zhang,Hubery Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了基于ODE采样的去中心化扩散模型的收敛性，证明了在Wasserstein-2距离下，N步离散化的分布以O(N^{-1/2}+ε)的速率收敛到解析解，其中ε为神经逼近误差。这是首个针对去中心化扩散模型在W_2距离下的收敛结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准扩散模型已有较好的收敛理论，但去中心化架构（多个局部专家+路由机制）引入随机专家切换，超出了现有扩散收敛分析框架，缺乏理论保证。

Method: 采用随机速度场和ODE采样方案，在Wasserstein-2距离下建立收敛性分析，将神经逼近误差作为额外项纳入收敛速率。

Result: 证明N步离散化与解析解之间的W_2距离收敛率为O(N^{-1/2}+ε)。

Conclusion: 首次为去中心化扩散模型（ODE采样方案）提供了W_2距离下的收敛理论保证。

Abstract: Diffusion models have achieved impressive empirical success in generative tasks, and their convergence theory is now relatively well understood. Motivated by privacy and scalability, recent decentralized diffusion architectures replace a single global velocity field with multiple local experts and a routing mechanism, yielding a sampling dynamics with stochastic expert switching that falls outside standard diffusion convergence analyses. In this work, We study a decentralized diffusion framework with stochastic velocity fields and ODE-based sampling. We establish a convergence guarantee in Wasserstein-2 distance, showing that the distribution of the $N$-step discretization converges to the analytical solution at rate $\mathcal{O}(N^{-1/2}+\varepsilon)$ in $W_2$, where $\varepsilon$ captures the neural approximation errors. To our knowledge, this is the first $W_2$ convergence result for decentralized diffusion models with an ODE-based sampling scheme.

</details>


### [621] [David vs. Goliath in Next Activity Prediction: Argmax vs. LSTM, Transformer, and LLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15868)
*Hans Weytjens,Ingo Weber*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文对预测性流程监控中的下一活动预测任务进行了系统基准测试，比较了LLM、Transformer、LSTM和简单计数基线等方法。结果显示，预训练并非始终优于从头训练，模型大小对性能影响不大，在大多数数据集上，简单的argmax基线可与数十亿参数的LLM相媲美。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管预测性流程监控领域从经典机器学习发展到LLM等复杂模型，但目前缺乏一个统一的基准来系统比较LLM、Transformer、LSTM和简单基线方法在下一活动预测任务上的表现。

Method: 在7个真实事件日志上，系统比较了词汇适配的LLM、从头训练的Transformer、LLM蒸馏的Transformer、LSTM以及简单的基于计数的argmax基线方法。

Result: 预训练没有带来一致的性能提升，模型大小对效果影响很小，在大多数数据集上，简单的argmax基线的表现接近甚至超过了数十亿参数的大型语言模型。

Conclusion: 该研究揭示了一个"大卫与歌利亚"式的故事：复杂的深度学习模型和大型语言模型在下一活动预测任务上，并不比简单基线方法有显著优势，暗示该领域可能需要重新审视模型复杂度的必要性。

Abstract: Next activity prediction (NAP) is a cornerstone of predictive process monitoring (PPM), enabling organizations to move from retrospective analysis to proactive process steering. The PPM field has progressed from classical machine learning through deep learning architectures such as LSTMs and Transformers to large language models (LLMs). Despite growing model complexity, no benchmark jointly compares LLMs, Transformers, LSTMs, and simple baselines in a direct sequence modeling setting for NAP. In this paper, we fill this gap with a systematic benchmark. We compare vocabulary-adapted LLMs, Transformers trained from scratch, LLM-distilled Transformers, and LSTMs against a simple counting-based argmax baseline across seven real-life event logs. Our results tell a David vs. Goliath story: pretraining confers no consistent improvement over training from scratch, model size shows little effect on performance, and on most datasets the argmax baseline matches or approaches the performance of billion-parameter LLMs.

</details>


### [622] [Intelligence Is Not the Bottleneck: Validating an LLM First-Pass Manuscript Score Against Peer-Review Outcomes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15887)
*Costa Georgantas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了AIPR系统，它仅通过提示（prompting）方式为论文在五个维度上打分（0-100），并生成加权总分。在300篇ICLR投稿上的验证显示，AIPR的总分能够区分被拒和被接收的论文（AUROC 0.82），结果单调递增且与评审平均分一致。信号最强处在于最低分五分之一的论文被拒率远高于基线，且没有oral论文。有效性主要来自模型本身，而工程化部分提供了可靠性和结构化的评审文本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM辅助同行评审的评价多聚焦于生成文本的流畅性，而非评分数值的有效性。作者希望验证一个仅通过提示（无微调）的LLM系统能否给出有判别力的、与真实决策一致的论文评分。

Method: AIPR系统通过单个提示（prompt）读取论文，输出五个0-100质量维度分及加权总分。在300篇ICLR投稿上进行评估，使用冻结的pipeline和预注册假设，对比系统评分与公开的决策结果及评审评分。

Result: AIPR总分区分被拒与接受论文（AUROC 0.82, 95% CI 0.78-0.87），分数在各决策层级单调递增，与评审平均分一致。最低分五分之一论文的被拒率远高于基线，且无oral论文。仅使用单段提示的模型表现与完整管线差距不大（p=0.09）。AIPR的重复运行标准差（0.7分）远低于裸提示（2.8分）。

Conclusion: AIPR系统能够有效区分论文质量，评分与真实同行评审结果一致。其有效性主要来自底层LLM模型，工程化设计提升了可靠性并提供了结构化的评审文本，但最终决策仍应由人类保留。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) systems are increasingly proposed to assist peer review, yet most evaluations judge the prose of machine-generated review text, not the validity of the numeric score a system assigns. We validate AIPR, which reads a submitted manuscript and emits five 0-100 quality dimensions and a weighted overall score, against the public decision outcomes of a major machine learning venue. AIPR grades by prompting alone, with no fine-tuning on reviews or decisions. Across 300 ICLR submissions with public decision tiers and reviewer ratings, graded under a frozen pipeline with hypotheses pre-registered before any score met any outcome, the overall score separates rejected from accepted submissions (AUROC 0.82, 95% CI 0.78-0.87), rises monotonically across tiers, and tracks the mean reviewer rating. The signal is strongest where we claim it: the lowest-scoring fifth is rejected far above the base rate, with oral papers absent. The validity comes mostly from the model: a one-paragraph prompt on the same model discriminates almost as well as the full pipeline (the small gap favours the pipeline but does not meet the pre-declared criterion, p = 0.09). What the engineering adds is reliability and a grounded review: AIPR's score barely moves across repeated runs (0.7 vs. 2.8 points within-paper SD) where the bare prompt swings, and the same pass returns a rubric-structured, evidence-grounded review rather than a bare number, with the human keeping the decision.

</details>


### [623] [Scalar-pathway fidelity improves physical accuracy in short-range equivariant interatomic potentials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15892)
*Jia Bi,Alin Marin Elena,Samuel Pinilla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PAN（物理感知邻域池化）和PGS（物理引导频谱混合器）两种轻量级标量路径修正方法，在不改变等变张量主干的情况下仅作用于ℓ=0通道，将MACE等势函数的力误差降低22-27%，能量误差降低19-22%，揭示了标量路径保真度是短程等变原子间势的重要设计维度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 等变神经网络势函数虽改进了局部几何表示，但其能量表面最终通过不变标量通道汇聚，而标量通道的聚合与频谱分辨率尚未被充分研究。作者希望探究标量路径的修正能否提升势函数精度。

Method: 提出PAN（基于配位数的幅度调制池化）和PGS（径向与锥形谱基增强的边/读出标量特征混合器）两种轻量级、对称性保持的标量路径修正方法，以MACE为高体序机械框架，仅在ℓ=0通道操作，保持等变张量主干不变。

Result: 在金属Ag、共价Si、短程离子LiF/Li-F子集及MD17/rMD17分子上，力误差降低22-27%，能量误差降低19-22%；含应力标签的系统应力误差降低27-28%，仅增加约5%推理FLOPs。在Allegro和NequIP上方向性一致的改进表明该修正可移植，但效果程度依赖于架构。

Conclusion: 标量路径保真度是短程等变原子间势的一个实用设计维度，简单修正即可显著提升精度。

Abstract: Accurate interatomic potentials enable molecular dynamics of materials, molecules, and interfaces beyond density-functional-theory length and time scales. Equivariant neural network potentials have improved the representation of local geometry. However, their deployable energy surfaces ultimately manifest through invariant scalar channels, whose aggregation and spectral resolution remain comparatively underexamined. Here we use Physics-Aware Neighborhood (PAN) pooling and Physics-Guided Spectral (PGS) mixers as controlled scalar-pathway probes: lightweight, symmetry-preserving modifications that act only on \(\ell=0\) channels while leaving the equivariant tensor backbone unchanged. Using MACE as a high-body-order mechanistic scaffold, PAN adds coordination-sensitive amplitude modulation, whereas PGS augments edge and readout scalar features with radial and tapered spectral bases. Across metallic Ag, covalent Si, a short-range ionic LiF/Li--F subset, and MD17/rMD17 molecules, this scalar-pathway correction reduces MACE force errors by 22--27\% and energy errors by 19--22\%; on systems with stress labels, stress errors decrease by 27--28\%, at approximately 5\% additional inference-FLOPs cost. Directionally consistent gains in Allegro and NequIP further indicate that the correction is portable across distinct short-range equivariant backbones, although effect sizes remain architecture-dependent. These results identify scalar-pathway fidelity as a practical design dimension for short-range equivariant interatomic potentials.

</details>


### [624] [Topological Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15897)
*Kacper Wyrwal,İsmail İlkan Ceylan,Alexander Tong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出拓扑流匹配，通过拉普拉斯衍生漂移注入拓扑信息，将流匹配推广到结构化空间，在脑fMRI、洋流、地震、交通流等数据上验证有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准流匹配将结构化空间信号视为欧氏空间点，忽略了其域上的拓扑特征。

Method: 将流匹配解释为退化薛定谔桥问题的求解，并通过在参考过程中添加拉普拉斯衍生漂移来注入拓扑信息，保持稳定、无模拟目标和确定性样本路径等优点。

Result: 在脑fMRI、洋流、地震事件、交通流等多种结构化数据集上验证了有效性。

Conclusion: 拓扑流匹配可作为标准流匹配的即插即用替代方案，能更好处理结构化空间数据。

Abstract: Flow matching is a powerful generative modeling framework, valued for its simplicity and strong empirical performance. However, its standard formulation treats signals on structured spaces, such as fMRI data on brain graphs, as points in Euclidean space, overlooking the rich topological features of their domains. To address this, we introduce topological flow matching, a topology-aware generalization of flow matching. We interpret flow matching as a framework for solving a degenerate Schrödinger bridge problem and inject topological information by augmenting the reference process with a Laplacian-derived drift. This principled modification captures the structure of the underlying domain while preserving the desirable properties of flow matching: a stable, simulation-free objective and deterministic sample paths. As a result, our framework serves as a drop-in replacement for standard flow matching. We demonstrate its effectiveness on diverse structured datasets, including brain fMRIs, ocean currents, seismic events, and traffic flows.

</details>


### [625] [On-Policy Distillation with Curriculum Turn-level Guidance for Multi-turn Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15912)
*Gengsheng Li,Mao Zheng,Mingyang Song,Ruiqi Liu,Tianyu Yang,Jie Sun,Qiyong Zhong,Haiyun Guo,Junfeng Fang,Dan Zhang,Jinqiao Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Guided-OPD算法，通过在 rollout 中混合教师和学生生成的回合，并采用逐步衰减的课程式干预策略，解决多轮智能体在策略蒸馏（OPD）中因小模型错误累积导致的分布偏移问题，在多个基准上显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多轮智能体依赖大模型，推理成本过高；OPD虽可蒸馏到小模型，但小模型错误会随轮次累积，导致轨迹偏离教师分布，此时教师提供的监督信号恰好最不可靠。

Method: 提出Guided-OPD：在每次rollout中混合教师和学生生成的回合，并设计一个从强干预逐步衰减到零的课程式调度，早期保持轨迹接近教师分布，后期恢复纯在策略（on-policy）状态以匹配推理场景。

Result: 在ALFWorld、ScienceWorld、WebShop上，使用Qwen3-30B-A3B教师蒸馏Qwen3学生，Guided-OPD相比原始OPD平均提升Score 21.1%，提升Success Rate 25.5%，且学生越小收益越大。

Conclusion: Guided-OPD是一种简单有效的蒸馏算法，能缓解多轮场景下OPD的分布偏移问题，显著提升小模型的工具调用和多轮交互能力。

Abstract: Multi-turn agents that plan, invoke tools, and interact with environments offer a promising paradigm for solving complex tasks, yet their capabilities typically rely on very large models whose inference cost is prohibitive in practice.On-Policy Distillation (OPD) is a natural recipe for transferring such capabilities to smaller students, but we find that it suffers a characteristic failure mode in this setting: small student errors compound across turns and push the trajectory out of the teacher's familiar state distribution, so the teacher's supervision becomes least reliable precisely where the student needs it most.We propose Guided On-Policy Distillation (Guided-OPD), a simple yet effective algorithm that mixes teacher- and student-generated turns within each rollout and schedules the teacher's intervention probability along a curriculum that decays to zero.Strong guidance keeps early trajectories close to the teacher distribution and is then gradually withdrawn to recover the purely on-policy regime used at inference.On ALFWorld, ScienceWorld, and WebShop, distilling Qwen3 students from a Qwen3-30B-A3B teacher, Guided-OPD improves Score by 21.1\% and Success Rate by 25.5\% over vanilla OPD on average, with larger gains on smaller students.

</details>


### [626] [Reinforcement Learning for LLM-based Event Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15917)
*Amit Arnold Levy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文使用GRPO强化学习方法对1.5B至14B参数的预训练LLM进行微调，使其能通过Wikipedia和新闻工具获取实时信息以预测未来事件。结果表明，1.5B参数模型在预测性能上超越了Claude Sonnet 3.5。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索利用强化学习（GRPO）微调小参数LLM，使其具备获取实时信息的能力，从而突破知识截止日期限制，实现对未来事件的预测，并研究其扩展能力。

Method: 采用Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)方法，对1.5B至14B参数的LLM进行微调，赋予模型通过Wikipedia修订工具和新闻摘要获取最新信息的能力，并设计模拟不同训练动态的问题进行实验。

Result: 1.5B参数的Qwen 2.5模型在经过GRPO训练后，在预测未来事件的交叉熵指标上超过了Claude Sonnet 3.5。

Conclusion: 小参数LLM通过GRPO强化学习微调和实时信息获取能力，可以在预测任务上超越大参数模型；同时讨论了判断性预测在可验证/不可验证领域分类中的定位，以及内在不确定性（aleatoric uncertainty）对预测的影响。

Abstract: We use Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), a recently devised sample and memory efficient reinforcement learning method, to finetune pretrained LLMs in the range of 1.5B to 14B parameters equipped with the ability to get current information through the use of a Wikipedia revisions tool, or news summaries, to forecast real events beyond the knowledge cutoff of the LLM, as well as problems made to simulate different aspects of the dynamics of that training.
  We use the results of these experiments to comment on the scaling capability of LLMs for forecasting, as well as classify how judgmental forecasting fits into the verifiable/unverifiable domain taxonomy, considering the impact of the inherent aleatoric uncertainty when forecasting future events (e.g. the roll of a die).
  As a result of the GRPO training, we manage to bring a 1.5B parameter transformer (Qwen 2.5 1.5B) to forecasting performance superior to Claude Sonnet 3.5 over the same dataset as measured by cross entropy from the market agreed probabilities. We also discuss various dead ends on the path to this result.

</details>


### [627] [An Exploratory Study of Blood Glucose Estimation from Photoplethysmography Signals using Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15927)
*Ruhani Bhatia,Vijval Ekbote*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个由智能手表PPG信号与CGM血糖值组成的配对数据集，并进行了初步实验探索，结果表明PPG信号中可能包含预测血糖的线索，但需要更多数据验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统CGM技术为侵入式，存在皮肤刺激等风险，亟需准确、非侵入式、可大规模部署的连续血糖监测方法。

Method: 构建了智能手表连续PPG信号与CGM血糖值的配对数据集，并进行了初步的机器学习/深度学习探索实验。

Result: 初步实验结果表明PPG信号中可能存在预测血糖水平的信号，但需要更多个体、更大量数据的进一步探索。

Conclusion: 非侵入式PPG信号结合深度学习预测血糖具有潜力，当前数据集为后续研究提供了基础，但距离实际应用仍需更大规模验证。

Abstract: Diabetes and extreme blood sugar levels are some of the major health problems faced by humans today across the world. While Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) has emerged as an effective technology for management of diabetes as well as for monitoring blood sugar levels, this technology has traditionally been invasive (that is, requiring the piercing of the skin) and carries the risk of irritation, induration, etc. This highlights the need for accurate and non-invasive CGM methods that can be deployed at scale. With the emergence of various sensing technologies and their integration in wearables like the smart-watch, we now have the capability to continuously monitor body signals like the Photoplethysmogram (PPG) in a non-invasive manner. Having the ability to continuously monitor blood glucose through CGMs and continuously monitor PPG signals through a smart-watch offers an opportunity to get dense data on these two, opening the possibility of building machine learning and deep learning based models to estimate blood glucose level from PPG signals. In this work, we first present a paired dataset comprising continuous PPG signals from a smartwatch along with glucose values recorded using a CGM device. We also present the results of some preliminary experimental explorations performed on our dataset. These preliminary results suggest that some predictive signals may exist, though more exploration is needed with more data from a larger number of individuals. The dataset can be accessed at https://zenodo.org/records/20577959

</details>


### [628] [Causal-Privacy Audit Workflow for Synthetic and Distilled Data in Dropout Support](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15940)
*Hanghang Zheng,Xiwei Zhuang,Zhong Wang,Hong Liu,Xiao Chen,Jingwen He,Xia Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CaP-Eval决策导向因果隐私审计流程，评估不同生成学生数据在保持辍学预测中的财务状态因果效应、预测效用及隐私风险上的表现。发现DPGNet和蒸馏数据在因果保真度上优于对手和基线方法，但不同生成数据在效用、隐私与因果保真度上存在分歧，需联合审计后方可用于决策。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 合成和蒸馏学生数据越来越多地被用于隐私保护的学习分析，但它们是否适合面向决策的机构支持（如辍学预警、经济援助指导）尚不确定。现有评估多关注预测效用或分布相似性，忽略了因果结构（尤其是财务状态对决策的影响）的保真度。

Method: 提出CaP-Eval流程，在固定因果估计量、时序调整设计、估计器集合和经验隐私治理筛选框架下，对比原始数据、蒸馏数据、对抗合成数据、统计合成数据和DPGNet等隐私导向生成数据在预测效用、治疗效应保真度、对替代估计器的鲁棒性以及局部训练记录接近度上的表现。

Result: DPGNet和蒸馏数据比对抗和Gaussian Copula基线更可靠地保留了原始财务状态的治疗效应结构。DPGNet在多个ε水平上保持完整的方向和秩一致性；ε=10时非原始IPW和DML偏差最小。蒸馏数据保真度高但局部记录接近度信号最强。Gaussian Copula压缩了效应幅度。

Conclusion: 预测效用、隐私导向、经验披露信号和因果保真度之间存在分歧；生成的学生数据在用于决策前，需对方向、幅度、重叠度和发布治理风险进行联合审计。

Abstract: Synthetic and distilled student data are increasingly used to enable privacy-conscious learning analytics, yet their suitability for decision-facing institutional support remains uncertain. In dropout support, generated data must preserve not only predictive utility or distributional resemblance, but also the financial-status evidence used to guide advising, payment-plan assistance, and scholarship-related decisions. Method: This study introduces CaP-Eval, a decision-facing causal-privacy audit workflow for evaluating generated student data under a fixed estimand, timing-aware adjustment design, estimator set, and empirical privacy-governance screen. The workflow compares original, distilled, adversarial synthetic, statistical synthetic, and DPGNet privacy-oriented generated data on predictive utility, treatment-effect fidelity, robustness to alternative estimators, and local training-record proximity. Results: DPGNet and distilled data preserved the original financial-status treatment-effect structure more reliably than the adversarial and Gaussian Copula baselines. DPGNet preserved full direction and rank agreement across epsilon levels; epsilon = 10 produced the smallest non-original IPW and DML deviations, while epsilon = 1 and epsilon = 5 amplified several financial-status contrasts. Distilled data remained highly faithful but retained the strongest local training-record proximity signal. TabularGNet preserved qualitative directions with moderate attenuation, and Gaussian Copula compressed effect magnitudes. Conclusions: Predictive utility, privacy orientation, empirical disclosure signals, and causal fidelity diverged; generated student data require joint audits of direction, magnitude, overlap, and release-governance risk before decision use.

</details>


### [629] [Scalar-Stepsize Nonuniform Monte Carlo Optimistic Policy Iteration: A Certified Counterexample](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15978)
*Yuanlong Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明在非均匀更新频率下，蒙特卡洛乐观策略迭代（使用标量步长、非归一化异步状态值递归）可能不收敛，通过一个三状态-二动作MDP实例展示了非均匀采样导致的各向异性扭曲会生成吸引性混合周期轨道，使随机递归以正概率陷入循环而无法收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Tsitsiklis证明了均匀更新结构下蒙特卡洛乐观策略迭代的收敛性，但指出非均匀更新频率是一个微妙的障碍。本文旨在严格验证这一障碍是否确实导致不收敛。

Method: 构造一个三状态、二动作的折扣MDP反例，分析非均匀状态选择概率下，贪婪策略均值场的动力学行为，结合有界无偏几何视界估计器和Robbins-Monro步长，证明原始随机递归以正概率被困在吸引性混合周期轨道附近。

Result: 非均匀更新频率诱导出对角缩放的贪婪策略均值场，产生一个非恒定的吸引性混合周期轨道；原始随机递归以正概率无法逃离该周期轨道，因此不收敛。

Conclusion: 均匀采样带来径向残差收缩，而标量非均匀采样各向异性地扭曲残差动力学，可能产生切换型吸引性周期轨道，从而破坏收敛性。这为Tsitsiklis所指出的非均匀更新频率障碍提供了严格的反证。

Abstract: Tsitsiklis proved convergence of Monte Carlo optimistic policy iteration under a uniform update structure and identified nonuniform update frequencies as a delicate obstruction. We give a certified negative answer for the natural scalar-stepsize, unnormalized asynchronous state-value recursion with fixed nonuniform state-selection probabilities. In a three-state, two-action discounted MDP, the nonuniform update frequencies induce a diagonally scaled greedy-policy mean field with a certified nonconstant attracting hybrid periodic orbit. With a bounded unbiased geometric-horizon estimator and Robbins--Monro stepsizes, the original stochastic recursion remains trapped near the cycle with positive probability and therefore fails to converge. The example pinpoints a geometric obstruction: uniform sampling gives radial residual contraction, whereas scalar nonuniform sampling anisotropically distorts the residual dynamics and can generate switched attracting cycles.

</details>


### [630] [Do Safety Monitors Stay Reliable After an Update? Benchmarking and Predicting Activation-Monitor Staleness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15980)
*Evan Duan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统测试了激活监控器在模型更新（量化、微调等）后的可靠性，发现量化更新基本保持有效，而微调更新常导致监控器失效，且退化程度可从部署前特征预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实部署中模型常被量化、微调或适配LoRA，但激活监控器（基于基础模型训练）通常保持冻结。这种"隐式契约"是否成立此前未被系统验证。

Method: 在多个安全相关监控器、模型深度、更新类型和开源模型上进行系统性对比实验，测试量化风格和微调风格更新对冻结监控器性能的影响。

Result: 量化更新基本保持监控器性能；微调更新常导致监控器失效（尤其是隐私/PII监控器）；QLoRA危害最大；退化程度可从部署前特征预测。

Conclusion: 模型微调应默认触发激活监控器重新验证，且可利用预测手段优先检查最可能失效的监控器。

Abstract: Activation monitors-lightweight probes trained on a language model's internal representations-are an increasingly common layer in deployment safety stacks. Deployed models however are rarely static: they are quantized, fine-tuned, adapted with LoRA, or served with merged adapters while the monitor remains frozen. We present the first systematic test of whether this implicit contract holds: whether activation monitors trained on a base model remain reliable after these routine model updates. Across multiple safety-relevant monitors, model depths, update families, and open-weight models, we find a sharp split: quantization-style updates largely preserve frozen probe performance, while fine-tuning-style updates frequently make probes stale. Fragility is highly monitor-dependent, with privacy/PII probes most affected and refusal-compliance probes comparatively stable, showing that retraining a behavior need not stale its corresponding monitor. QLoRA is especially damaging despite NF4 quantization alone being relatively benign, suggesting that quantization becomes riskier when combined with adaptation. We further show that degradation is predictable from pre-deployment features, enabling revalidation budgets to be triaged toward the monitors most likely to fail. These results suggest that fine-tuning should trigger activation-monitor revalidation by default, while prediction can help prioritize which monitors to check first.

</details>


### [631] [Decomposing one-class support vector machine into an ensemble of one-data support vector machines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16002)
*Toshitaka Hayashi,Dalibor Cimr,Hamido Fujita,Richard Cimler*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种加速OCSVM的策略，通过将数据集分解为样本、为单个数据点训练OCSVM模型，再使用集成学习合并所有模型，同时采用数据缩减策略进一步加速。实验表明，该方法在保持类似分类效果的同时比传统OCSVM更快。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统OCSVM在处理大规模数据集时存在可扩展性问题，需要更高效的加速策略。

Method: 首先将数据集分解为单个样本，为每个数据点训练OCSVM模型；然后通过集成学习合并所有模型来计算完整数据集的OCSVM模型；此外，使用数据缩减策略（基于训练样本均值的OCSVM模型）进一步加速。

Result: 与传统的OCSVM相比，所提出的策略速度更快，同时实现了相似的分类结果，并且能够在样本和模型之间建立一一对应关系。

Conclusion: 提出的加速策略有效地解决了OCSVM在大规模数据集上的可扩展性问题，在保持分类性能的同时显著提升了速度。

Abstract: One-class classification (OCC) is a classification problem in which the training data contains only one class. The one-class support vector machine (OCSVM) is one of the most competitive OCC algorithms. However, OCSVM has scalability issues with large-scale datasets. This paper proposes the acceleration strategy of OCSVM. The idea is to decompose the dataset into samples and train OCSVM models for single data points. Subsequently, ensemble learning is applied to combine all models to compute the OCSVM model for the dataset. In addition, further acceleration is achieved through a data-reduction strategy with an OCSVM model trained on the average of the training samples. The experiment compared the proposal and traditional OCSVM using the Python package. The proposed strategy is faster than traditional OCSVM, while achieving similar classification results. Moreover, the proposed strategy can create one-to-one correspondence between samples and models. Source code is uploaded at https://github.com/ToshiHayashi/ODSVM

</details>


### [632] [IBAD: Interpretable Behavioral Anomaly Detection on Human Mobility Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16023)
*Bita Azarijoo,John Krumm,Cyrus Shahabi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出IBAD框架，利用LDA学习可解释的日常移动行为模板，并通过层次自监督模型检测个体行为异常，在真实与合成数据集上验证了模板的可迁移性与异常检测的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人类日常移动看似多样，实则可由少量重复行为模板解释（如通勤、上学、看护、夜生活等），现有方法缺乏对这类可解释模板的建模与异常检测能力。

Method: 先使用LDA从全局数据中发现行为模板，再用层次自监督模型学习个体在软模板分布上的正常行为模式，并引入splicing benchmark构造控制性行为不匹配。

Result: 在真实与合成数据集上，IBAD将日常行为有效分解为少量可解释模板，学习到的行为模板可跨地理和人口统计背景迁移，且在所有设置中保持鲁棒的竞争性能。

Conclusion: IBAD证明了基于行为模板的个体建模方法有效且可迁移，为可解释的移动行为异常检测提供了新范式。

Abstract: Human mobility appears highly diverse, yet much of a person's daily mobility can be explained by a small set of recurring behavioral templates, such as commuting, school-centered activities, caregiving, nightlife, or errand patterns. We present \texttt{IBAD} (\underline{I}nterpretable \underline{B}ehavioral \underline{A}nomaly \underline{D}etection), a framework that learns interpretable daily mobility templates and represents each individual as a distribution over mixtures of these templates. Rather than focusing on specific locations, IBAD characterizes activities that individuals perform across locations. This approach first discovers global behavioral templates using Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA), then employs a hierarchical self-supervised model to learn normal behavior of individuals from their soft behavioral templates. We also introduce a \emph{splicing benchmark} that creates controlled behavioral mismatches between an individual's historical profile and injected mobility patterns. Experiments on real-world and synthetic datasets show that daily behavior can be effectively decomposed into a small number of interpretable templates. Crucially, we show that the learned behavioral archetypes \emph{transfer} across distinct geographic and demographic contexts. Furthermore, IBAD maintains a robust competitive performance across all settings. For reproducibility purposes, the code is accessible at ~\href{https://github.com/USC-InfoLab/IBAD}{https://github.com/USC-InfoLab/IBAD}.

</details>


### [633] [The Information-Theoretic Benefit of Shared Representations under Orthogonality Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16028)
*Thomas Dittrich,Oliver Potocki,Philipp Grohs*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了多任务学习在正交约束下的描述长度复杂度，通过构建Rademacher-Haar小波与Sawtooth-Walsh读出层的组合函数类，证明了联合近似相比独立近似需要严格更少的编码位数，从而揭示了组合式多输出架构在描述长度效率上的理论优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代深度学习模型日益趋向多任务、多模态，虽然多任务学习的泛化性和样本复杂度已被广泛研究，但联合近似与独立近似之间的参数复杂度差异尚未被充分理解，尤其是在模型需要满足等变性、守恒律或正交性等结构约束时。

Method: 1) 构建一类正交函数：将共享的硬特征（Rademacher-Haar小波级数）与Sawtooth-Walsh读出层组合，实现输出坐标的正交性；2) 利用信息论框架，推导联合编码与独立编码的最优逼近率之间的严格差距；3) 利用Heaviside激活函数的神经网络通过三角波逼近实现该分离结果。

Result: 在正交约束下，只要任务共享一个潜在的硬特征，联合近似所需的编码位数严格少于独立近似。Rademacher-Haar小波的二叉结构将逼近难度集中在共享特征组件上，而读出层作为任务特定的头部。

Conclusion: 联合近似在组合式架构中具有描述长度效率优势，这为理解神经网络在几何约束下保持表达性的能力提供了理论依据，也阐明了组合式多输出架构的编码效率优势。

Abstract: Modern deep learning architectures are increasingly multi-task and multi-modal, using a pretrained foundation model combined with task-specific, fine-tuned models. Empirically, exploiting similarity across different problems, instead of solving them individually, can significantly improve overall performance. While the generalization and sample complexity properties of multitask learning have been widely studied, the parametric complexity of joint approximation in comparison to separate approximation remains less well understood. The question is particularly relevant in modern deep learning, where models are increasingly required to satisfy structural constraints such as equivariance, conservation laws, or orthogonality. We prove lower and upper bounds on the description-length for separate and joint approximation classes, respectively, in uniform norm. We build a class of orthogonal functions by composing a shared hard feature, realized by a Rademacher-Haar wavelet series, with Sawtooth-Walsh readouts to enforce orthogonality of output coordinates. The dyadic tree structure of the Rademacher-Haar wavelet concentrates the approximation hardness in the common feature component, while the readouts act as task-specific heads. Using an information-theoretic framework, we obtain a sharp gap between the optimal approximation rates achievable by joint and separate coding. Finally, we realize this separation in a neural network model using Heaviside activations via reduction to triangle-wave approximation. Our results show that even under an orthogonality constraint joint approximation requires strictly fewer bits in compositional architectures, provided the tasks share a latent hard feature. This provides theoretical insight into the description-length-efficiency of compositional multi-output architectures and clarifies how neural networks can retain expressivity under geometric constraints.

</details>


### [634] [Inference-Time Decision Calibration for Temporal Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16034)
*Arthur Chagas,Arthur Buzelin,Yan Aquino,Pedro Bento,Gisele L. Pappa,Wagner Meira,Cristiano Arbex Valle*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种将时间分类错误分解为表征缺失和决策校准不足的方法，通过保留预训练模型不变，引入残差多尺度分支和后缀分支感知校准器，在多个时序数据集上验证了两种干预手段在不同场景下的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统观点将时间分类错误归因于表征学习不足，但本文认为决策层面的证据利用（即校准问题）同样重要，因此希望分离并量化这两种错误来源。

Method: 保持原训练好的分类器不动，设计两种推理时干预：(1) 保守残差多尺度分支，为原生预测补充辅助logits；(2) 后缀分支感知校准器，在决策阶段重新组合原生与残差证据。无需重新训练主干网络。

Result: 在FI-2010、PTB-XL、UCI-HAR、MHEALTH、HARTH五个数据集上，残差多尺度分支在噪声大或表征受限（如短时间序列FI-2010、弱循环骨干网络）时提升显著；分支感知校准在原生与辅助logits包含互补证据时有效；在已近饱和的场景下两种干预增益有限。

Conclusion: 时间分类问题不仅要关注表征学习，还应重视多视角证据的信任、组合与校准这一决策层面的挑战。

Abstract: Temporal classification errors are often treated as representation failures, but they can also arise from how available evidence is converted into decisions. This paper proposes a representation--calibration decomposition for temporal classification. We keep a trained native classifier frozen and separate two inference-time interventions: a conservative residual multi-scale branch that adds auxiliary logits to the native prediction, and a post-hoc branch-aware calibrator that recombines native and residual evidence at decision time. This design distinguishes missing temporal evidence from underused decision-level evidence without retraining the backbone. Across FI-2010, PTB-XL, UCI-HAR, MHEALTH, and HARTH, we find that gains are strongly regime-dependent. Residual multi-scale evidence is most useful in noisy or representation-limited settings, especially short-horizon FI-2010 and weaker recurrent backbones, while branch-aware calibration helps when native and auxiliary logits contain complementary evidence not fully exploited by the raw decision rule. Near-saturated settings show limited gains from either intervention. These results suggest that temporal classification should be understood not only as representation learning, but also as the problem of trusting, combining, and calibrating evidence from multiple views.

</details>


### [635] [Circuit Tracing in Autoregressive Protein Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16044)
*Darin Tsui,William Deinzer,Daniel Saeedi,Amirali Aghazadeh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了ProGenMech，一种用于生成式蛋白质语言模型的机械可解释性框架，通过跨层转码器（CLTs）和零样本电路发现方法，揭示了ProGen3模型在蛋白质生成和适应度预测中的稀疏潜在电路，并在因果生成和适应度估计任务中优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机械可解释性方法主要关注蛋白质表示学习模型，无法捕获自回归生成所需的计算过程，且生成式蛋白质语言模型的生成机制尚不明确。

Method: 提出ProGenMech框架，扩展跨层转码器（CLTs）到ProGen3模型（稀疏MoE架构），用所有前层稀疏潜变量重建每一层计算；并设计零样本电路发现方法识别稀疏潜在电路。

Result: 在因果生成和零样本适应度估计任务中优于局部转码器基线；在跨度填充任务中匹配原始模型分布；发现的电路揭示了与保守序列模式和蛋白质适应度景观相关的生物学有意义的结构域。

Conclusion: ProGenMech为可解释且可操控的蛋白质生成建立了基础，揭示了生成模型中生物学有意义的稀疏电路。

Abstract: Protein language models (pLMs) can generate novel protein sequences with properties beyond those observed in nature, yet the mechanisms underlying protein generation remain poorly understood. Existing mechanistic interpretability methods based on sparse autoencoders and transcoders primarily focus on protein representation learning models and do not capture the computation required for autoregressive generation. Here, we introduce ProGenMech, a mechanistic interpretability framework for generative protein language models that extends cross-layer transcoders (CLTs) to ProGen3, a sparse Mixture-of-Experts model trained for both causal generation and span infilling. Unlike per-layer approaches, CLTs reconstruct each layer using sparse latent variables from all preceding layers, enabling faithful recovery of inter-layer generative computation. We further develop a zero-shot circuit discovery framework to identify sparse latent circuits responsible for protein generation and fitness prediction. In causal generation and zero-shot fitness estimation tasks, ProGenMech outperforms local transcoder baselines in recovering ProGen3's probability distribution and functional scoring behavior, while matching the original model's generative distribution in span infilling tasks. Moreover, the recovered circuits reveal biologically meaningful motifs and functional regions associated with conserved sequence patterns and protein fitness landscapes, establishing a foundation for interpretable and steerable protein generation.

</details>


### [636] [Active Learning with Low-Rank Structure for Data Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16045)
*Vincent Cohen-Addad,Sasidhar Kunapuli,Vahab Mirrokni,Mahdi Nikdan,David P. Woodruff,Samson Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于低秩近似和残差采样的新数据选择框架，可选出 $\tilde{O}(k + 1/\varepsilon^2)$ 个加权数据点，使得平均损失与全数据集相比达到 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 相对误差，优于基于聚类的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据选择方法（如 k-center 和 k-means 聚类）依赖于数据集的几何结构（聚类假设），但现代数据集往往具有全局代数结构，更适合用低秩近似或主成分分析来捕捉。因此需要一种能利用代数结构的新数据选择框架。

Method: 基于低秩近似和残差采样的数据选择框架，从行子集选择和保损失核集构造的角度出发，利用嵌入矩阵满足的代数/角 Lipschitz 连续性条件，通过残差采样选取加权数据子集。

Result: 理论上可选出 $\tilde{O}(k + 1/\varepsilon^2)$ 个加权数据点，使得平均损失达到 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 相对误差（加性 $\varepsilon\Phi_k$ 项）；实验上在多个真实数据集上优于均匀采样和基于聚类的敏感度采样方法。

Conclusion: 本文提出的基于低秩近似和残差采样的数据选择框架，在理论和实验层面均优于传统的基于聚类的方法，为处理具有代数结构的现代数据集提供了新思路。

Abstract: In the data selection problem, the objective is to choose a small, representative subset of data that can be used to efficiently train a machine learning model. Sener and Savarese [ICLR 2018] showed that, given an embedding representation of the data and suitable geometric assumptions, heuristics based on $k$-center clustering can be used to perform data selection. This perspective was further explored by Axiotis et. al. [ICML 2024], who proposed a data selection approach based on $k$-means clustering and sensitivity sampling. However, these methods rely on the assumption that the dataset exhibits intrinsic geometric structure that can be effectively captured by clustering, whereas many modern datasets instead possess global algebraic structure that is better exploited by low-rank approximation or principal component analysis.
  In this paper, we introduce a new data selection framework based on low-rank approximation and residual-based sampling, formulated through the lens of row subset selection and loss-preserving coreset construction. Given an embedding representation of the data satisfying mild regularity conditions, which can be interpreted as algebraic or angular notions of Lipschitz continuity, we show that it is possible to select a weighted subset of $\tilde{O}\left(k + \frac{1}{\varepsilon^2}\right)$ data points whose average loss approximates the average loss over the full dataset within a $(1+\varepsilon)$ relative error, up to an additive $\varepsilon Φ_k$ term, where $Φ_k$ denotes the optimal rank-$k$ approximation cost of the embedding matrix. We complement these theoretical guarantees with empirical evaluations, demonstrating that on a range of real-world datasets, our data selection approach achieves improved performance over prior strategies based on uniform sampling or clustering-based sensitivity sampling.

</details>


### [637] [ALCL: An Adaptive Log-Correntropy Loss for Robust Learning under Non-Gaussian Noise](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16050)
*Mainak Kundu,Ria Kanjilal,Ismail Uysal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出自适应对数-柯伦特罗皮损失(ALCL)，通过可微重参数化联合学习损失形状和尺度参数，使损失几何能动态适应残差统计特性，在重尾和脉冲噪声下优于MSE和静态柯伦特罗皮损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MSE损失对异常值具有无界敏感性，而现有柯伦特罗皮损失依赖固定核参数，无法在训练过程中自适应调整，限制了其在重尾和脉冲噪声下的鲁棒性。

Method: 提出ALCL，引入对数残差模型，通过可微重参数化联合学习形状和尺度参数与网络权重，形成有界且再下降的影响函数，使损失几何动态适应残差统计特性。

Result: 在四种基准数据集（灰度/RGB）的混合重尾脉冲噪声下，ALCL在重建保真度和分类准确率上均优于MSE和最优调参的广义柯伦特罗皮损失；高噪声下中位数准确率提升达4.75%（灰度）和4.51%（RGB），且方差更小。

Conclusion: 联合学习损失参数的自适应鲁棒性为深度学习在非高斯环境下提供了一种计算高效且优于静态柯伦特罗皮损失的替代方案。

Abstract: Robust deep learning under heavy-tailed and impulsive noise remains challenging because conventional losses such as mean squared error (MSE) exhibit unbounded sensitivity to outliers. Although correntropy-based objectives improve robustness, existing formulations rely on fixed kernel parameters that must be empirically tuned and remain static during training. To address these limitations, we propose an Adaptive Log-Correntropy Loss (ALCL), a heavy-tailed loss formulation that adaptively learns its robustness geometry during optimization. ALCL introduces a logarithmic residual model whose shape and scale parameters are learned jointly with network weights through differentiable reparameterization. This yields a principled maximum likelihood formulation whose influence function is formally bounded and redescending, allowing the loss geometry to adapt dynamically to evolving residual statistics while suppressing extreme outliers. Comparative experiments on four widely used benchmark datasets spanning grayscale and red-green-blue (RGB) image data under mixed heavy-tailed and impulsive noise demonstrate that ALCL consistently outperforms MSE and optimally tuned generalized correntropy losses in both reconstruction fidelity and downstream classification accuracy. While performance differences remain small under low-noise conditions, under high-noise regimes ALCL improves median accuracy by up to 4.75% on grayscale benchmarks and 4.51% on RGB datasets, with reduced variance across runs. These results demonstrate that adaptive robustness through joint learning of loss parameters provides a computationally efficient alternative to static correntropy-based losses for deep learning in non-Gaussian environments.

</details>


### [638] [Beyond the Blood Draw: Explainable Machine Learning for Non-Invasive Dysglycemia Risk Screening](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16056)
*Black Sun,Chenyi Zhang,Kaiyi Ji,Xi Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 利用NHANES数据（2017-2023，n=14,352）开发并验证了无需实验室检测的机器学习模型用于血糖异常筛查。LightGBM表现最佳（AUC=0.820），优于芬兰糖尿病风险评分（0.745）和美国糖尿病协会风险测试（0.783）。SHAP分析显示年龄、种族/民族和腰围身高比是最重要预测因子。亚组分析证实了跨人口学分层的一致性表现（AUC：0.735-0.832）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球大量成年人患有血糖异常（包括前驱糖尿病和糖尿病），但许多人未被诊断。现有筛查方法依赖实验室检测或临床风险评估工具，存在便利性和准确性的局限。开发无需实验室检测的非侵入性筛查工具，可提高筛查可及性，促进早期发现。

Method: 从NHANES 2017-2023中汇集14,352名受试者数据，训练六种机器学习模型，采用分层5折交叉验证，并与两种临床风险评分（芬兰糖尿病风险评分和美国糖尿病协会风险测试）进行比较。使用SHAP分析进行模型可解释性分析，并在人口学亚组中评估一致性。

Result: LightGBM达到最高AUC（0.820，95% CI：0.806-0.835），优于芬兰糖尿病风险评分（0.745）和美国糖尿病协会风险测试（0.783）。SHAP分析识别出年龄、种族/民族和腰围身高比是最具影响力的预测因子。亚组分析显示AUC范围在0.735-0.832之间，表现一致。

Conclusion: 研究表明，开发可解释的、无需实验室检测的血糖异常筛查方法是可行的，有望部署在社区环境和自我健康追踪应用中，以提高血糖异常筛查的可及性和早期发现率。

Abstract: Dysglycemia, encompassing both prediabetes and diabetes, affects huge numbers of adults worldwide, yet many of them remain undiagnosed. We developed and validated machine-learning (ML) models for non-invasive screening of dysglycemia risk that require no laboratory tests. Pooling data from the National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey (NHANES) 2017--2023 (n=14,352), we trained six ML models with stratified 5-fold cross-validation and compared them with two established clinical risk scores. LightGBM achieved the highest area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC=0.820, 95% CI: 0.806--0.835), outperforming the Finnish Diabetes Risk Score (0.745) and American Diabetes Association Risk Test (0.783). SHAP analysis identified age, race/ethnicity, and waist-to-height ratio as the most influential predictors. Subgroup analyses confirmed consistent performance across demographic strata (AUC: 0.735--0.832). These results demonstrate the feasibility of explainable, laboratory-free dysglycemia screening for deployment in community settings and self-tracking health applications.

</details>


### [639] [Mojo: A Promising Tool for Scalable Financial AI Efficiency](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16059)
*Henry Han*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文探讨了Mojo语言作为解决量化金融领域"两语言税"问题的方案，通过对比Python与C++的性能差距，展示Mojo在四个核心金融AI工作负载上实现20-180倍加速，并提出了开源确定性库mojo-deterministic。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 量化金融长期面临"两语言税"问题——研究用Python，生产用C++，导致数值差异和性能损失；GPU深度学习的不确定性浮点归约进一步加剧了回测漂移，挑战监管可复现性。

Method: 使用Mojo语言（Modular公司2026年发布的类Python系统语言），利用其原生互操作性和MLIR编译基础设施，实现单一代码库跨标量、SIMD、多核和GPU执行，并构建位精确确定性内核。

Result: 在Apple Silicon上，Mojo在直接测量内核中实现20-180倍于纯Python的加速；GPU工作负载结果为基于已发表基准的投影值。同时发布了开源库mojo-deterministic。

Conclusion: Mojo有潜力解决量化金融的生产力-性能矛盾，但存在尚未解决的问题，需保持透明评估。

Abstract: For thirty years, quantitative finance has paid a costly two-language tax: models researched in Python are rewritten in C++ for production, often introducing numerical discrepancies. GPU-accelerated deep learning exacerbates this problem, as nondeterministic floating-point reductions can produce drift in long backtests, challenging regulatory reproducibility and auditability expectations. This article surveys Mojo, Modular's 2026 Python-like systems language, as a structural response for capital markets engineering. While closing the Python-to-C++ performance gap, Mojo uniquely combines native interoperability with the low-level systems control required to construct bit-exact deterministic kernels. Its MLIR compilation infrastructure further allows a single codebase to target scalar, SIMD, multicore, and GPU execution, reducing the translation bottleneck between research and production. We benchmark four core financial AI workloads: Monte Carlo option pricing, LLM sentiment inference, multi-asset backtesting, and portfolio Value at Risk. On Apple Silicon, Mojo demonstrates 20x to 180x speedups over pure Python on directly measured kernels; larger-scale GPU workload results are projections calibrated from published benchmarks. Alongside transparent performance data, we introduce mojo-deterministic, an open-source library of reproducible reduction kernels, and provide a candid assessment of the problems Mojo does and does not yet solve.

</details>


### [640] [Stop the Sampler! Classifier-Based Adaptive Stopping for Sampling Kernels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16073)
*Kirill Korolev,Nikita Morozov,Stepan Pavlenko,Esmeralda S. Whitammer,Sergey Samsonov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将MCMC轨迹终止策略作为可学习组件，利用非循环生成流网络（GFlowNets）训练状态依赖的神经分类器来决定采样何时终止，从而在保持模式覆盖的同时显著缩短轨迹长度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MCMC方法因固定或手动调整的轨迹长度导致混合缓慢、计算成本高，需要一种自适应的轨迹终止机制来提升采样效率。

Method: 将MCMC置于非循环GFlowNets理论框架中，训练状态依赖的神经分类器判断轨迹是否到达高密度区域；通过详细平衡条件建立最优分类器与目标密度的理论联系，并引入多级训练方案以应对复杂几何结构。

Result: 在多个基准密度上的实验表明，该方法相比标准MCMC基线显著缩短了平均轨迹长度，同时改善了模式覆盖和混合效率。

Conclusion: 将轨迹终止学习化是提升MCMC采样效率的有效途径，GFlowNets框架为此提供了理论基础，未来可进一步扩展到更复杂的采样场景。

Abstract: Sampling from complex, unnormalized probability densities is a fundamental challenge in Bayesian inference and probabilistic modeling. While Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) methods provide asymptotic guarantees, they often suffer from slow mixing and high computational costs due to fixed or manually tuned trajectory lengths. In this work, we propose a novel framework that treats trajectory termination as a learnable component of the sampling dynamics. By framing MCMC within the theory of non-acyclic generative flow networks (GFlowNets), we train state-dependent neural classifiers to decide when a trajectory has reached a high-density region and should terminate. We theoretically establish the connection between optimal classifiers and the target density via detailed balance conditions and introduce a multilevel training scheme to facilitate exploration in complex geometries. Experimental results across various benchmark densities demonstrate that our approach significantly reduces average trajectory lengths while improving mode coverage and mixing compared to standard MCMC baselines.

</details>


### [641] [AME: A Multi-Type Contributor Attribution Framework in Generative AI Markets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16075)
*Yang Shi,Songwen Pei,Yang Gao,Bingxue Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了AME框架，用于解决生成式AI中多阶段协作数据价值公平分配问题，通过贡献评估、权利映射和可信执行三个模块，实现与人类判断一致的低成本价值分配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI的价值创造涉及多阶段异构贡献者（训练数据、基础模型、微调行为、提示词等），但如何公平分配数据价值尚未被充分探索。

Method: 提出AME（Attribution-Mapping-Execution）统一框架，将数据贡献估值、数据权利映射和可信执行整合到一个工作流中。

Result: 实验表明AME框架能够达到与人类参考判断更一致的数据价值分配结果，同时保持低成本的可靠执行。

Conclusion: 该工作为生成式AI数据市场的价值评估和收益分配提供了初步基础。

Abstract: Generative AI enables value creation through multi-stage collaboration among heterogeneous contributors, including training data, base models, fine-tuning behaviors, and prompts. However, how to fairly allocate the data value remains largely unexplored. This paper formulates multi-stage generative AI value allocation as a new research problem and identifies three core challenges: heterogeneous data contribution valuation, data rights mapping, and trustworthy execution. We propose AME (Attribution-Mapping-Execution) framework, a unified framework that integrates data contribution valuation, data rights mapping, and trustworthy execution into a single workflow. Experimental results demonstrate that AME framework achieves data value allocation outcomes more consistent with human reference judgments while maintaining low-cost trustworthy execution. Our work provides an initial foundation for value assessment and revenue allocation in generative AI data markets.

</details>


### [642] [Phys-JEPA: Physics-Informed Latent World Models for Multivariate Time-Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16076)
*Weizhi Nie,Weichao Liu,Honglin Guo,Yuting Su*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Phys-JEPA 是一种物理信息联合嵌入预测架构，将物理一致性从输出空间迁移到潜在状态空间，用于多变量时间序列预测。在气候、交通和电力数据集上取得了改进，表明该方法是有前景的可解释时序世界模型方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度预测器能拟合时序相关性，物理信息模型能用科学约束正则化预测，但二者通常仅在解码输出层面结合，导致隐藏预测状态虽统计有用但物理上无结构。作者希望将物理约束直接施加在潜在状态和状态转换上。

Method: 提出 Phys-JEPA (physics-informed joint-embedding predictive architecture)，学习潜在世界模型，将预测状态分解为物理分量和残差分量，在潜在空间而非仅解码输出上施加物理一致性约束。

Result: 在Jena气候数据集(H=24)上，聚合MSE从0.12482降至0.12273，温度MSE从0.01892降至0.01831；在交通数据集上，全版本Phys-JEPA在所有测试 horizon 上优于监督基线，H=192时MSE从0.800784降至0.773873；在电力数据集上，最优变体随horizon变化。

Conclusion: 将物理信息学习从输出空间迁移到潜在预测状态空间是一个有前景的方向，可用于构建可解释的时序世界模型。

Abstract: Multivariate forecasting in physical systems requires models that predict coupled temporal variables while preserving meaningful state evolution. Deep forecasters can fit temporal correlations, and physics-informed models can regularize predictions with scientific constraints, but these directions are often connected only at the decoded-output level. As a result, the hidden predictive state that generates future trajectories may remain statistically useful but physically unstructured. We introduce Phys-JEPA, a physics-informed joint-embedding predictive architecture for multivariate time-series forecasting. Phys-JEPA learns a latent world model in which predictive states are decomposed into physical and residual components, and physical consistency is imposed directly on latent states and latent transitions rather than only on decoded forecasts. This formulation uses known physical variables to organize the representation space while retaining residual capacity for unresolved dynamics. On Jena Climate 2009--2016, Phys-JEPA reduces aggregate MSE from 0.12482 to 0.12273 and temperature MSE from 0.01892 to 0.01831 at H=24. On Traffic, full Phys-JEPA improves aggregate MSE over the supervised baseline across all tested horizons, reducing H=192 MSE from 0.800784 to 0.773873. On Electricity, the best variant depends on horizon: static latent consistency is strongest at H=24 and H=48, while full Phys-JEPA gives the best aggregate and target-variable MSE at H=192. These initial results suggest that moving physics-informed learning from output space to latent predictive state space is a promising direction for interpretable temporal world models.

</details>


### [643] [Auditing Machine Unlearning: A Systematic Research on Whether Models Truly Forget](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16110)
*Dayong Ye,Tianqing Zhu,Ruiding Huang,Xinbo Fu,Jiayang Li,Bo Liu,Huan Huo,Wanlei Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了首个实用且通用的机器学习遗忘审计框架，基于"无知证明"概念，系统评估了现有遗忘算法能否真正消除特定数据影响。实验表明：基于重训练和微调的方法能实现有效遗忘，而基于去优化和Fisher/Hessian的方法则失败。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有隐私法规要求机器学习模型能够"被遗忘"，但缺乏可靠的审计机制来验证遗忘算法是否真正消除了特定数据的影响，存在残留信息泄露的隐私风险。

Method: 提出基于"无知证明"概念的通用审计框架，无需从头重训练基线、无需训练大量影子模型、无需侵入式干预原始训练过程，通过系统性实验验证框架的有效性。

Result: 在6个数据集和10种代表性遗忘方法上验证：重训练和微调方法可实现真正遗忘；去优化方法失败且损害模型性能；Fisher/Hessian方法即使有正式认证也无法真正遗忘；框架对虚假遗忘鲁棒且可扩展到大型语言模型。

Conclusion: 不同类型的遗忘算法效果差异显著，现有许多方法未能真正实现数据遗忘，需要更可靠的审计机制来保障隐私合规。

Abstract: Machine unlearning has been extensively studied in response to growing privacy concerns and regulatory requirements. However, auditing whether unlearning algorithms have truly erased the influence of specific data remains an open challenge. The lack of reliable and practical auditing mechanisms can lead to critical privacy risks, such as residual information leakage. This paper initiates a systematic investigation into whether existing unlearning algorithms can truly forget the designated data. We propose the first practical and general-purpose auditing framework for machine unlearning, inspired by the concept of proof of ignorance. Our framework addresses the key practicality limitations of existing methods by eliminating the need for retraining-from-scratch baselines, avoiding the training of large numbers of shadow models, and requiring no intrusive intervention in the original training process. To evaluate the effectiveness of our framework, we first conduct validation experiments to verify its soundness and completeness. We then perform comprehensive experiments across six datasets and ten representative unlearning methods. The results demonstrate that our framework reliably distinguishes between successful and failed unlearning. In particular, we observe that retraining-based and fine-tuning-based methods can achieve effective unlearning, even when the target data remain in the original dataset. In contrast, de-optimization-based methods fail to achieve true unlearning and instead degrade the model's performance. Fisher/Hessian-based methods also fail to unlearn requested data, even formal certification is provided. Moreover, we show that our framework is robust against fake unlearning attempts and generalizes well to large language models.

</details>


### [644] [Scaling Adaptive Depth with Norm-Agnostic Residual Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16112)
*Tomás Figliolia,Beren Millidge*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出NAG（Norm-Agnostic Residual）架构，通过分离残差流中的幅度和方向信息，解决深层网络中残差范数增长导致后续层贡献被抑制的问题。NAG仅引入极少量参数，且支持高效的核融合操作。该架构在深层Transformer中显著优于基线，并衍生出可解释的混合深度（MoD）机制，能在预训练阶段以约20%-25%的跳过率匹配全深度基线性能，将深度稀疏性作为新的计算固定训练扩展轴。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有残差架构存在残差流范数随深度增长的问题，使得深层网络后续层的更新相对于累积残差状态变得微小，限制了深度扩展带来的收益。

Method: 提出NAG（Norm-Agnostic Residual）架构，将残差流中的幅度和方向信息分离，保持各层贡献在深度上的有效性；基于此设计可解释的Mixture-of-Depths（MoD）机制，自适应跳过注意力和MLP层。

Result: NAG架构在深层Transformer中表现优于基线，且深度越大优势越明显。MoD机制在约20%-25%的跳过率下，等计算量训练可匹配全深度基线性能，同时显著减少前向FLOPs和参数执行量。

Conclusion: 深度稀疏性可作为固定计算预算下新的训练扩展轴，实现极深但FLOP高效的模型训练。

Abstract: Residual architectures are ubiquitous in deep learning, but they suffer from a subtle structural limitation: the norm of the residual stream can grow rapidly with depth. As a result, updates from later layers become small relative to the accumulated residual state. This reduces their impact on the representation and limits the benefits of scaling models in depth. To address this, we introduce NAG, a norm-agnostic residual architecture that separates magnitude from directional information in the residual stream, preserving meaningful layer contributions throughout depth and preventing later updates from being systematically suppressed by residual-norm growth. Importantly, NAG introduces only a negligible number of additional parameters and relies on simple operations that are easily kernel-fusible, preserving training efficiency in practice. We show that this architecture outperforms baseline Transformers, with gains that increase substantially as depth grows, enabling effective training of much deeper models. The norm-agnostic formulation also leads to an interpretable Mixture-of-Depths (MoD) mechanism that adaptively skips both attention and MLP layers. Beyond serving as a post-training accuracy-compute tradeoff, this mechanism can be used as a pretraining-time scaling strategy: under iso-FLOP training, compute saved by reducing per-token forward-pass cost can be reinvested into training on more tokens while keeping the total parameter count and KV-cache budget fixed. In our experiments, moderate Mixture-of-Depths rates of approximately 20%-25% match full-depth baseline performance under equal training compute while substantially reducing the number of executed layer parameters and forward-pass FLOPs. These results identify sparsity in depth as a new scaling axis for fixed-compute training, enabling very deep yet FLOP-efficient models.

</details>


### [645] [A Gradient Perspective on RLVR Stability and Winner Advantage Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16154)
*Prasanth YSS,Zhichen Ren,Rasa Hosseinzadeh,Ilan Gofman,Yuqi Chen,Zhaoyan Liu,Guangwei Yu,Jesse C. Cresswell,Satya Krishna Gorti*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过token级梯度动力学分析GRPO风格强化学习的不稳定性，发现稳定性取决于优势符号和当前策略下的token分布，据此提出Winner Advantage Policy Optimization (WAPO)，一种仅在正优势完成轨迹上更新的简单在线裁剪策略梯度方法，在数学推理和多跳QA基准上提升了训练稳定性，匹配或超越多个模型族的基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GRPO风格优化在强化学习可验证奖励中容易崩溃，作者希望通过token级梯度动力学分析来理解这种不稳定性，并设计更稳定的优化方法。

Method: 首先从token级梯度动力学出发，推导出一个分类体系，预测更新如何影响next-token概率和熵，并揭示稳定性取决于优势符号和当前策略下的token分布。基于这一分析，提出WAPO，一种在线裁剪策略梯度目标函数，仅对正优势的完成轨迹进行更新。

Result: 在数学推理和多跳QA基准上，WAPO提升了训练稳定性，并在多个模型族上匹配或超越基线方法。

Conclusion: 简单的仅更新正优势完成轨迹的策略（WAPO）能有效缓解GRPO风格优化的崩溃问题，为RLVR训练提供更稳定的替代方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) improves language-model reasoning, but GRPO-style optimization remains prone to collapse. We analyse this instability through token-level gradient dynamics, deriving a taxonomy that predicts how updates affect next-token probabilities and entropy. The taxonomy shows that stability depends jointly on the advantage sign and token distribution under the current policy. Motivated by this finding, we propose Winner Advantage Policy Optimization (WAPO), a simple online clipped policy-gradient objective that updates only on positive-advantage completions. Across mathematical reasoning and multi-hop QA benchmarks, WAPO improves training stability and matches or outperforms baselines across multiple model families. Full code can be found at https://github.com/layer6ai-labs/wapo.

</details>


### [646] [A comparative and critical study of EEGNet for fNIRS-driven cognitive load classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16160)
*Mehshan Ahmed Khan,Houshyar Asadi,Li Zhang,Mohammad reza Chalak Qazani,Ghazal Bargshady,Stefanos gkikas,Christian arzate,Sam Oladazimi,Zoran Najdovsk,Lei Wei,Chee Peng Lim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 系统评估了EEGNet在fNIRS认知负荷分类中的表现，发现重叠分割加小固定学习率在随机划分中准确率最高，但主题独立评估下准确率大幅下降（最佳56.11%），非重叠分割反而更具泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: fNIRS信号存在时间变异性、个体差异及预处理敏感性等挑战，当前缺乏对深度学习模型（如EEGNet）在认知负荷分类中关键参数（时间分割、窗口长度、特征提取、学习率策略）的系统评估。

Method: 以EEGNet为分类模型，系统比较了重叠/非重叠时间分割策略、10/20/30秒窗口长度、ANOVA/PCA/FastICA三种特征提取方法、固定与自适应学习率配置，以及随机划分与主题独立两种评估协议。

Result: 随机划分下，重叠分割+小固定学习率（0.01-0.001）准确率最高；主题独立评估下准确率大幅下降，非重叠分割反超重叠分割，采用PCA特征+20秒窗口+0.1学习率取得最佳56.11%准确率。自适应学习率训练更稳定但未超过最优固定学习率。

Conclusion: 消除时间冗余有助于模型学习更鲁棒且跨个体泛化的认知负荷表征；分割策略与学习率选择对模型泛化至关重要；为构建可靠的实时、主题独立fNIRS认知负荷分类系统提供了方法论指导。

Abstract: Accurately classifying cognitive load from functional near-infrared spectroscopy (fNIRS) signals remains a significant challenge due to temporal variability, inter-subject differences, and sensitivity to preprocessing choices. This study provides a comprehensive evaluation of EEGNet for fNIRS-based cognitive load classification by systematically examining the effects of temporal segmentation strategies (overlapping vs. non-overlapping), window lengths (10s, 20s, 30s), feature extraction methods (Analysis of Variance (ANOVA), Principal Component Analysis (PCA), Fast Independent Component Analysis (FastICA)), learning rate configurations (fixed and adaptive), and evaluation protocols (random split vs. subject-independent (SI)). Results from random-split experiments show that overlapping segmentation, combined with smaller fixed learning rates (0.01-0.001), yields the highest accuracies, due to temporal redundancy and dense sampling of hemodynamic transitions. However, SI evaluation reveals a substantial drop in accuracy, demonstrating limited generalization to unseen participants. Under SI evaluation, non-overlapping segmentation outperformed overlapping windows, with the best accuracy of 56.11% achieved using PCA features with a 20-second window and a 0.1 learning rate. These findings indicate that eliminating temporal redundancy helps the model learn more robust and generalizable representations of cognitive load across individuals. Although adaptive learning rate strategy improved training stability, it did not surpass the performance of optimally selected fixed learning rates. The study highlights the critical role of segmentation strategy and learning rate selection in improving model generalization and identifies methodological considerations essential for developing reliable, real-time, and SI cognitive load classification systems using fNIRS.

</details>


### [647] [LLM-Powered Virtual Population for Demand Simulation and Pricing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16183)
*Chengpiao Huang,Kaizheng Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个基于LLM的虚拟人口模型，通过混合客户画像和LLM评估的购买概率，生成聚合需求的预测分布，支持定价决策中的需求模拟和不确定性量化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有需求预测模型在处理包含文本和图像等非结构化信息的产品时能力有限，且大多只给出点预测，无法提供不确定性估计，难以支持风险感知的定价决策。

Method: 将客户表示为混合客户画像的抽样；对每个画像、产品和候选价格，利用LLM结合结构化画像信息和非结构化产品信息评估购买概率；通过校准的混合权重聚合生成需求预测分布。

Result: 在H&M时尚数据集上，校准后的LLM模拟器在预测性能上优于所有对比模型，并且支持样本高效的定价决策。

Conclusion: 该方法为产品信息丰富但历史需求数据有限的情景提供了一种实用的需求模拟工具，不仅给出点预测，还能生成完整的需求分布，支持平均收益和风险感知等多种定价目标。

Abstract: We develop an LLM-powered virtual population model that simulates demand for pricing decisions, in settings where products are described by rich unstructured information, such as text descriptions and images, and where decision makers need not only mean-demand predictions but also uncertainty estimates for counterfactual prices. Our model represents exposed customers as draws from a finite mixture of customer personas. For each persona, product, and candidate price, an LLM elicits a persona-level purchase probability using both structured persona information and unstructured product information. These probabilities are aggregated through calibrated mixture weights to form a predictive distribution of aggregate demand. The resulting simulator can evaluate counterfactual prices under various pricing objectives, including expected revenue and risk-aware criteria such as conditional value at risk. We test the framework on an online H&M fashion dataset with product descriptions and images. The calibrated LLM-based simulator achieves the best overall predictive performance among the models considered, and supports sample-efficient pricing decisions. Our framework provides a practical way to use LLMs as demand simulators for products with limited historical demand data but rich product information. By producing a full predictive demand distribution rather than only a point forecast, it enables managers to compare candidate prices, quantify demand uncertainty, and choose prices that target either average-case revenue or risk-aware objectives.

</details>


### [648] [When Confidence Lacks Concepts: Interpretable OOD Detection via Representation Perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16196)
*Anju Chhetri,Pratik Shrestha,Ramesh Rana,Prashnna Gyawali,Binod Bhattarai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种基于稀疏自编码器学习类别概念向量，通过测量模型在类别条件语义扰动下的预测稳定性来进行可解释的OOD检测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OOD检测方法依赖语义不明的内部信号，缺乏可解释性，难以在临床等安全关键场景建立信任。

Method: 利用稀疏自编码器从分布内数据学习类别特定概念向量，在推理时扰动深层表征并测量类别logits的稳定性，将OOD检测转化为概念条件稳定性分析。

Result: 分布内样本对语义扰动敏感度低（表征与类别语义方向对齐），OOD样本则表现出放大偏差（表征错位），从而提供判别性信号。

Conclusion: 该方法既提供可判别的OOD信号，又提供内部机制的可解释视角，适合高风险医学应用。

Abstract: Deep neural networks have achieved remarkable performance across medical imaging tasks, yet their tendency to overgeneralize under distributional shifts poses a major obstacle to safe clinical deployment. Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection methods aim to mitigate this risk, but most existing approaches rely on opaque internal signals with poorly understood semantic meaning, limiting trust in safety-critical settings. In this work, we propose an interpretable OOD detection framework that probes the stability of model predictions under class-conditioned semantic perturbations. Leveraging sparse autoencoders (SAEs), we learn class-specific concept vectors from in-distribution data that disentangle dense intermediate representations into sparse, semantically meaningful components. At inference, we perturb deeper-layer representations using the concept vectors associated with the model's predicted class and measure the class logits stability. We hypothesize that in-distribution samples exhibit low sensitivity to such perturbations, as their representations align with class-specific semantic directions, whereas OOD samples show amplified deviations due to representational misalignment. By framing OOD detection as a concept conditioned stability analysis, our approach provides both a discriminative OOD signal and an interpretable lens into the internal mechanisms driving model uncertainty, making it particularly suitable for high stakes medical applications.

</details>


### [649] [Calibrated Sampling-Free Uncertainty Estimation in Bayesian Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16214)
*Tobias Jan Wieczorek,Leon de Andrade,Thomas Möllenhoff,Marcus Rohrbach*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出校准方差传播（CVP）方法，通过单次前向传播高效近似贝叶斯不确定性估计，在Transformer和CNN上达到与蒙特卡洛采样相当的精度，且计算成本大幅降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 贝叶斯深度学习虽能解决模型过置信问题，但测试时需多次前向传播采样权重，计算成本过高；现有方差传播方法仅适用于MLP，难以扩展到现代深度架构。

Method: CVP提出针对归一化层的新传播方法，结合现有激活函数处理技术，并通过轻量级校准步骤吸收残差误差，实现单次前向传播的不确定性估计。

Result: 在BEiT-3的NLVR2任务上，覆盖率从8.2%提升至14.6%；在ViLT的VQAv2任务上，从2.6%提升至10.8%，在CNN架构上也有显著提升。

Conclusion: CVP在Transformer和CNN上均能以极低计算成本获得与MC采样相当的不确定性估计质量，有效弥合了方差传播方法在现代架构上的应用空白。

Abstract: Modern deep learning models remain notoriously prone to overconfidence, limiting their reliability in high-stakes applications. Bayesian methods aim to counter this by learning a distribution over model parameters, and recent advances now make this feasible for large-scale architectures at costs comparable to AdamW. However, a challenge remains at test time: predictions must be averaged across many forward passes with weights sampled from the posterior, which is prohibitively expensive. Variance propagation offers an efficient alternative, computing layer-wise analytical approximations of uncertainty in a single forward pass. While such techniques are effective for MLPs, their extension to modern architectures remains challenging, due to increased depth and diversity of layer types. To fill this gap, we propose Calibrated Variance Propagation (CVP), which introduces a new propagation method for normalization layers, combines it with recent techniques for handling activation functions, and absorbs residual error through a light calibration step. CVP yields comparably accurate uncertainty estimates to MC sampling across transformers and CNNs, at a fraction of the cost. Against prior variance propagation work, CVP improves coverage at $0.5\%$ risk from $8.2\%$ to $14.6\%$ with BEiT-3 on Visual Reasoning (NLVR2) and from $2.6\%$ to $10.8\%$ with ViLT on VQAv2, with gains extending to convolutional architectures.

</details>


### [650] [Prediction of Runtime Parameters of Parallel Chemistry Applications via Active and Generative Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16226)
