*Tanzila Tabassum,Omer Subasi,Ajay Panyala,Epiya Ebiapia,Gerald Baumgartner,Erdal Mutlu,P Sadayappan,Karol Kowalski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本工作开发了两种基于机器学习的方法来预测高可扩展并行化学计算的运行时参数，结合主动学习与生成学习，在CCSD计算上达到0.023的MAPE和99.9%的R²，且仅用20-25%数据即可达到约0.2的MAPE。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为了解决高可扩展并行化学计算中运行时参数预测困难的问题，并克服训练数据不足的挑战。

Method: 采用主动学习与生成学习相结合的方法，从丰富的机器学习模型中选择梯度提升回归树作为基础模型。

Result: 在CCSD计算上，MAPE低至0.023，R²高达99.9%；结合主动学习后，仅用20-25%的原始数据即可达到约0.2的MAPE。

Conclusion: 所提出的主动与生成学习结合的机器学习方法能高效、准确地预测并行化学计算的运行时参数，显著降低了对大量训练数据的依赖。

Abstract: In this work, we develop two main Machine Learning based approaches to predict the runtime parameters of highly scalable parallel chemistry computations.These approaches employ active and generative learning together with the empirically determined gradient boosted regression tree models chosen among a rich suite of machine learning models. When evaluated on Coupled-Cluster with Singles and Doubles computations, our models achieve a mean absolute error percentage (MAPE) as low as 0.023 and a coefficient of determination as high as 99.9%. Furthermore, when combined with active learning to mitigate the lack of large amounts of training data, our models score a MAPE about 0.2 with 20-25% of the original dataset.

</details>


### [651] [From Tokens to Regions: CUDA-Sensitive Instruction Tuning for GPU Kernel Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16231)
*Wentao Chen,Jiace Zhu,Xing Zhe Chai,Zeng Qu,Qiaoling Xiao,Liucheng Duan,An Zou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CuSeT方法，通过分析CUDA代码的敏感性模式（token级和区域级），结合自适应token掩码和区域感知样本重加权，在简单SFT框架下低成本提升LLM生成正确CUDA kernel的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM生成CUDA kernel的方法要么依赖昂贵智能体/RL pipeline，要么使用SFT但未能显式建模CUDA敏感性（与执行约束紧密耦合的代码token/区域）。作者希望以低成本方式提升LLM生成正确CUDA kernel的能力。

Method: 提出CuSeT (CUDA-Sensitive Instruction Tuning)，核心为"从token到区域"原则：1) 自适应token级掩码（利用高置信度的敏感token）; 2) 区域感知样本重加权（保留低置信度敏感区域）。在简单SFT框架内实现。

Result: CuSeT在多个模型族和规模上一致提升功能正确性，优于标准SFT和高级SFT变体，与前沿CUDA kernel生成模型性能相当但推理成本显著更低。

Conclusion: CUDA敏感性存在token级和区域级两种模式，利用这一发现设计的CuSeT方法能以低成本有效提升LLM的CUDA kernel生成能力。

Abstract: High-performance CUDA kernels are essential for scalable AI systems, while Large Language Models (LLMs) still struggle to generate correct kernels due to strict and implicit execution constraints. Existing LLM-based approaches either rely on costly agentic or reinforcement-learning (RL) pipelines, or adopt supervised fine-tuning (SFT) objectives that fail to explicitly model CUDA sensitivity, namely code tokens or regions tightly coupled with execution constraints. In this work, we investigate CUDA sensitivity from the perspective of token confidence patterns, showing that CUDA sensitivity appears at both token and region levels, where most CUDA-sensitive tokens are predicted with high confidence, while a smaller low-confidence subset forms regions corresponding to execution-critical structures. These findings suggest that effective CUDA kernel generation should both leverage high-confidence CUDA-sensitive tokens and preserve low-confidence CUDA-sensitive regions. Building on these insights, we propose \textbf{\underline{CU}DA-\underline{Se}nsitive Instruction \underline{T}uning (CuSeT)}, a low-cost post-training method within a simple SFT framework. CuSeT follows the principle of ``from tokens to regions'' by combining \emph{adaptive token-level masking} with \emph{region-aware sample reweighting}. Experiments show that CuSeT consistently improves functional correctness across multiple model families and scales, outperforming standard SFT and advanced SFT variants, while achieving competitive performance against frontier CUDA kernel generation models with substantially lower inference cost.

</details>


### [652] [Evolutionary Bilevel Reward Shaping for Generalization in Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16236)
*Ekasit Usaratniwart,Xilin Gao,Marc Ong,Youhei Akimoto*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出GERS方法，通过双层优化在仅能获取标量奖励的验证环境下提升强化学习泛化能力，效果与需要轨迹数据的域随机化相当。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有域随机化方法需要多样化的训练环境和完整轨迹数据，但在隐私保护或受限场景下只能获得标量性能指标，亟需一种在数据受限条件下提升泛化能力的方法。

Method: 双层优化框架：下层RL智能体在可获取轨迹的训练环境上学习，受上层奖励塑形函数引导；上层CMA-ES优化奖励塑形参数，最大化在仅能获取标量奖励的验证环境上的累积奖励。

Result: 在连续控制任务上，GERS在未见测试环境上优于标准RL基线，性能与需要完整轨迹数据的域随机化相当。

Conclusion: GERS在受限数据访问条件下能有效提升强化学习的泛化能力。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) often suffers from performance degradation when deployed in environments that differ from those encountered during training. Existing techniques such as domain randomization (DR) mitigate this, but require access to diverse training environments and full trajectory observability, assumptions that fail in privacy-preserving or restricted scenarios where only scalar performance metrics are available. We propose Generalization via Evolutionary Reward Shaping (GERS), a bilevel optimization approach to improve generalization on unseen test environments using only scalar feedback from validation environments. At the lower level, an RL agent guided via a reward function shaped by the upper level learns a policy on a limited set of training environments with accessible trajectory data; at the upper level, CMA-ES optimizes the reward shaping parameters to maximize the cumulative unshaped reward on separate validation environments for which trajectory access is unavailable. Results on continuous control tasks indicate that GERS outperforms the standard RL baseline on unseen test environments. GERS performance is comparable to DR, despite DR treating the combined set of training and validation environments of GERS as a single training set that requires trajectory access, whereas GERS cannot access validation trajectories. These results confirm that GERS effectively enhances generalization under restricted data access constraints.

</details>


### [653] [Rapid Poison: Practical Poisoning Attacks Against the Rapid Response Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16242)
*David Huang,Jaewon Chang,Avidan Shah,Prateek Mittal,Chawin Sitawarin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示Rapid Response（RR）框架存在被投毒攻击的漏洞。攻击者仅通过修改越狱样本，就能实现两种攻击：针对特定特征触发假阳性的定向投毒，以及使带后门触发的越狱输入被误判为安全的基于概念的后门攻击。其中Omission Attack仅需1%投毒率即可实现近乎完全的标签翻转。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究Rapid Response框架的安全漏洞，探索攻击者如何利用该框架的自动训练流水线注入恶意样本，同时解决现有攻击方法中"仅修改越狱样本"这一未探索的威胁模型约束。

Method: 提出两种攻击方法：(1) 定向投毒攻击——在越狱样本中植入特定特征，使分类器对无害样本产生假阳性；(2) Omission Attack——利用"概念缺失的不安全样本"训练后，分类器会将概念存在误与安全标签关联，实现概念后门攻击。

Result: 在1%投毒率下，假阳性率可达100%，假阴性率可达96%，实现近乎完全的标签翻转。后门攻击能泛化到防御者曾专门训练过的攻击策略。

Conclusion: Rapid Response框架存在严重的安全隐患，攻击者可以低成本注入恶意样本严重破坏分类器性能。现有防御机制需要重新审视自动训练流水线的安全性。

Abstract: The Rapid Response (RR) framework, deployed in production systems, including Anthropic's ASL-3 safeguards, continuously improves jailbreak-detection classifiers. When new jailbreaks emerge that bypass these classifiers, Rapid Response generates synthetic variants for training, helping the model generalize from the new attacks and quickly adapt. We reveal that prompt injection can infiltrate this pipeline to deliver poisoned samples into the classifier's training set, enabling two attack objectives: (I) targeted poisoning attacks that create false positives on harmless samples by categorizing them as a jailbreak, with a specific desired feature (e.g., certain formatting, subject, or keyword), (II) concept-based backdoor attacks that induce false negatives on jailbreak inputs, generalizing even to jailbreaks from attack strategies the defender explicitly trained against, when the backdoor trigger is present. Importantly, our threat model restricts adversaries to modifying only jailbreak samples (not benign data or labels), a constraint unexplored by prior work that makes the second objective particularly challenging. We address this with Omission Attack, which exploits a new phenomenon: when training on concept-absent unsafe samples, the classifier misassociates that concept's presence with the safe label. Both attacks cause substantial and in some cases near-complete label flipping at only a 1% poisoning rate, achieving up to 100% false positive rates and up to 96% false negative rates.

</details>


### [654] [LiFT: Local Search via Linear Programming for Overfitting-Controlled Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16243)
*Abhishek Shukla,Anikeit Khanna,Ankur Sinha,Faiz Hamid*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于线性规划（LP）的局部搜索框架LiFT，用于微调预训练Transformer模型，通过联合优化模型参数和正则化超参数，在控制过拟合的同时提升测试性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Transformer微调方法容易过拟合，且超参数选择依赖启发式或网格搜索，缺乏系统性和理论指导。作者希望通过显式控制过拟合，建立微调与优化理论之间的桥梁。

Method: 将Transformer微调建模为双层优化正则化问题，利用预热阶段收集的验证梯度和Hessian信息，通过求解线性规划来构造局部下降方向，同时更新模型参数和正则化超参数。

Result: 在GPT-2 Small微调WikiText-2的实验表明，LiFT在多种层配置和正则化设置下均能一致降低测试困惑度，尤其在过拟合易发场景下提升显著。

Conclusion: LiFT不仅取得了实证提升，还建立了Transformer微调与双层优化、局部搜索、正则化理论之间的原则性联系，为微调提供了新的理论视角。

Abstract: This paper proposes a Linear Programming (LP)-based local search framework for fine-tuning pretrained transformer models with explicit control against overfitting. The approach formulates transformer fine-tuning as a bilevel optimization-based regularization problem, in which model parameters and regularization hyperparameters are jointly updated. Information collected during initial warm-up iterations, including validation gradients and training Hessian information, is used to construct a local descent direction by solving an LP that minimizes a scaled directional derivative while preserving training optimality. This validation-aware descent direction enables focused local updates of both parameters and regularization hyperparameters, reducing overfitting without requiring repeated full retraining cycles. The resulting method, termed Linear Programming-based Fine-Tuning (LiFT) for transformers, differs from conventional fine-tuning by systematically identifying task-specific updates rather than relying on heuristic or grid-based hyperparameter selection. Experiments on GPT-2 Small fine-tuned on WikiText-2 demonstrate that LiFT enables effective adaptation through selective tuning of transformer blocks and regularization parameters, yielding consistent improvements in test perplexity across multiple layer configurations and regularization settings, with particularly pronounced gains in overfitting-prone scenarios. Beyond empirical performance, LiFT establishes a principled connection between transformer fine-tuning, bilevel optimization, local search, and regularization theory.

</details>


### [655] [Data Augmentations for Data-Constrained Language Model Pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16246)
*Michael K. Chen,Xikun Zhang,Zhen Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究数据增强作为正则化器，解决自回归预训练在多轮训练中因数据受限导致的过拟合问题，通过三类增强方法（token级噪声、序列排列、目标偏移预测）有效降低验证损失，缓解数据效率低下问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI实验室逼近数据天花板（计算能力超过高质量文本生成速度），语言模型预训练转向数据受限、计算充裕的范式，标准自回归预训练在此设定下严重过拟合，需要有效的正则化方法。

Method: 提出三类正交的数据增强方法：1）token级噪声（掩码、随机替换）；2）序列排列（从右到左预测、Fill-in-the-Middle）；3）目标偏移预测（预测x_{t+i}，i>1）。通过系统消融实验分析各方法效果。

Result: 单个增强方法均能延迟过拟合并降低验证损失，其中随机token替换效果最佳；组合多种增强方法可进一步降低最小验证损失。

Conclusion: 数据增强能有效缓解自回归预训练的数据效率问题，为数据受限场景下的训练提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: As AI labs approach a data ceiling where compute capacity outpaces the rate of new high-quality text generation, language model pretraining is shifting toward a data-constrained, compute-abundant regime that demands productive multi-epoch training on fixed corpora. Standard autoregressive (AR) pretraining overfits severely in this setting, reaching its optimum early and then continuously deteriorating. We investigate data augmentation as a regularizer to mitigate this overfitting and enable productive training for hundreds of epochs on the same data. We introduce three orthogonal categories of augmentation for AR pretraining: token-level noise (masking, random replacement), sequence permutations (right-to-left prediction, Fill-in-the-Middle), and target offset prediction ($x_{t+i}$ for $i > 1$). Through systematic ablations, we find that individual augmentations delay overfitting and lower validation loss relative to the baseline, with random token replacement achieving the best minimum loss among individual methods. Combining augmentation categories further lowers the minimum validation loss. Our experiments demonstrate that data augmentations mitigate AR pretraining's data inefficiency and offer a promising solution to the data-constrained regime. All code and data are available at https://github.com/michaelchen-lab/data-augmentations-for-pretraining

</details>


### [656] [Variance Reduction for Non-Log-Concave Sampling with Applications to Inverse Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16257)
*M. Berk Sahin,Ahmet Ege Tanriverdi,Behzad Sharif,Abolfazl Hashemi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次统一分析了SGD with momentum、STORM和PAGE等方差缩减技术在非对数凹分布采样中的应用，建立了在ε-相对Fisher信息和平方总变差距离下的非渐近收敛率，并通过实验验证了这些方法在固定梯度计算预算下能持续提升成像任务中的样本质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维非对数凹分布采样中，势函数的精确梯度不可用，需用随机梯度近似，但在固定梯度计算预算下梯度估计方差大，影响采样质量。现有方差缩减技术在非凸优化中表现优异，但在非对数凹采样中尚未被探索。

Method: 首次统一分析了SGD with momentum、STORM和PAGE三种方差缩减估计器在非对数凹分布采样中的性能，建立了在ε-相对Fisher信息下的非渐近收敛率，并在Poincaré不等式假设下证明了平方总变差距离的收敛性，进一步证明了弱收敛性。同时将分析扩展到基于分数生成先验的逆问题求解。

Result: 在固定梯度计算预算下，方差缩减技术（SGD with momentum、STORM、PAGE）在非对数凹分布采样中持续提升样本质量，在两种标准成像应用中验证了有效性。

Conclusion: 方差缩减技术不仅能改善非凸优化，在非对数凹分布采样中同样有效，为高维采样中处理高方差随机梯度问题提供了统一的理论框架和实用方案。

Abstract: Sampling from high-dimensional, non-log-concave distributions with unnormalized densities is a fundamental challenge in machine learning, particularly when the exact gradient of the potential is unavailable and must be approximated via stochastic gradients that exhibit high variance under a fixed budget of gradient computations per iteration. Although variance reduction techniques such as SGD with momentum, STORM, and PAGE have demonstrated improved convergence properties in non-convex optimization, their implications for sampling from non-log-concave distributions remain largely unexplored. In this work, we develop the first unified analysis of these estimators for sampling from non-log-concave distributions. We establish improved non-asymptotic convergence rates in $\varepsilon$-relative Fisher information and, under a Poincaré inequality assumption, in squared total variation distance, and further prove weak convergence to the target distribution. We extend our analysis to solving inverse problems with score-based generative priors. We empirically validate our theory and demonstrate that, under a fixed gradient computations per iteration, variance-reduction techniques consistently improve sample quality in two standard imaging applications.

</details>


### [657] [FlowMPC: Improving Flow Matching policies with World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16286)
*Chandon Hamel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FlowMPC将流匹配（FM）行为克隆策略与TD-MPC2世界模型结合，在ManiSkill操控任务中通过MPPI规划提升测试时性能，实验表明该方法优于纯FM策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FM策略虽擅长多模态行为克隆，但未直接最大化期望回报，测试时表现仍有提升空间。

Method: 提出FlowMPC框架：以预训练的FM策略生成候选动作序列，结合TD-MPC2学得的world model进行MPPI规划，选出最优动作。

Result: 在PickCube和PickSingleYCB任务上，加入world model后成功率显著提升，尤其在任务末端阶段表现突出。

Conclusion: 基于世界模型的规划能有效补充FM模仿策略，且无需修改训练目标。

Abstract: Flow Matching (FM) is a powerful approach for behavior cloning in multimodal action spaces [Jiang et al., 2025], but because it is not trained to directly maximize expected return, there is still room to improve how FM policies act at test time. This work investigates whether a learned world model can improve FM policies by enabling Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) planning over candidate action sequences proposed by the policy. Building on TD-MPC2 [Hansen et al., 2024], I introduce FlowMPC, a framework that combines an imitation-learned FM policy with a learned world model for test-time planning in ManiSkill manipulation tasks [Tao et al., 2025]. Across PickCube and PickSingleYCB, adding the world model improved performance over the FM policy alone, with especially clear gains in end-of-episode success. These results suggest that world-model-based planning can effectively complement flow-based imitation policies without modifying the FM training objective.

</details>


### [658] [An affordable hardware-aware neural architecture search for deploying convolutional neural networks on ultra-low-power computing platforms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16290)
*Andrea Mattia Garavagno,Edoardo Ragusa,Antonio Frisoli,Paolo Gastaldo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种面向超低功耗微控制器的硬件感知神经架构搜索方法，可在嵌入式设备上直接运行搜索过程，生成适配硬件约束的轻量级CNN，在保持高精度的同时满足传感器节点功耗要求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有HW-NAS主要针对高性能微控制器设计，功耗较高，无法满足传感节点的低功耗需求，亟需一种能在超低功耗微控制器上运行且生成适配tiny CNN的搜索方法。

Method: 提出一种轻量级HW-NAS方法，能够在嵌入式设备上直接执行搜索过程，生成适配超低功耗微控制器的tiny CNN架构。

Result: 在三个tiny计算机视觉基准测试上，该方法生成的tiny CNN保持了与现有方法相当的状态级分类精度。

Conclusion: 所提出的HW-NAS能够有效桥接超低功耗微控制器的硬件限制与深度学习模型部署需求，为传感节点上的AI应用提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Hardware-aware neural architecture search (HW-NAS) allows the integration of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in microcontrollers devices by automatically designing neural architectures that can fit prearranged hardware constraints. However, state-of-the-art HW-NAS target high-performance microcontrollers, whose power consumption does not meet sensing nodes requirements. This work presents a HW-NAS generating tiny CNNs that can run on ultra-low-power microcontrollers, featuring a lightweight search procedure enabling its execution even on embedded devices. Empirical results on three well-known benchmarks for tiny computer vision proved that the proposed HW-NAS was able to generate tiny CNNs while preserving state-of-the-art classification accuracy.

</details>


### [659] [One-Step Generalization Ratio Guided Optimization for Domain Generalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16301)
*Sumin Cho,Dongwon Kim,Kwangsu Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GENIE是一种通过动态均衡参数的OSGR来防止过拟合领域特定特征、提升领域泛化能力的新型优化器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有梯度方法往往强化虚假相关性，dropout未显式调整梯度对齐或确保参数更新均衡。

Method: 提出OSGR量化参数对损失下降的贡献，通过预条件因子动态均衡OSGR，防止少数参数主导优化。

Result: 理论上平衡了收敛贡献与梯度对齐，保持SGD收敛率；实验上优于现有优化器，并能增强多种DG方法。

Conclusion: GENIE通过动态均衡参数贡献，有效促进领域不变特征学习，是一种通用的DG优化增强方案。

Abstract: Domain Generalization (DG) aims to train models that generalize to unseen target domains but often overfit to domain-specific features, known as undesired correlations. Gradient-based DG methods typically guide gradients in a dominant direction but often inadvertently reinforce spurious correlations. Recent work has employed dropout to regularize overconfident parameters, but has not explicitly adjusted gradient alignment or ensured balanced parameter updates. We propose GENIE (Generalization-ENhancing Iterative Equalizer), a novel optimizer that leverages the One-Step Generalization Ratio (OSGR) to quantify each parameter's contribution to loss reduction and assess gradient alignment. By dynamically equalizing OSGR via a preconditioning factor, GENIE prevents a small subset of parameters from dominating optimization, thereby promoting domain-invariant feature learning. Theoretically, GENIE balances convergence contribution and gradient alignment among parameters, achieving higher OSGR while retaining SGD's convergence rate. Empirically, it outperforms existing optimizers and enhances performance when integrated with various DG and single-DG methods.

</details>


### [660] [pFedUL: Layer-Aware Federated Unlearning for Personalized Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16304)
*Zhuodong Liu,Xiangyu Li,Zhihao Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出pFedUL，一种针对个性化联邦学习（pFL）的去学习框架，解决了在共享层与个性化层共存场景下，数据移除与个性化保留之间的冲突。通过分层贡献归因、自适应选择性去学习和轻量恢复协议，在CIFAR-10等数据集上实现接近重训练的去学习效果，并保持剩余客户端97.3%的个性化准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦去学习（FU）方法大多针对FedAvg设计，忽略了在非IID数据下广泛使用的个性化联邦学习（pFL）范式。pFL将模型分解为共享全局层和客户端个性化层，这种结构从根本上改变了去学习的语义——移除目标客户端数据时，既要删除其在共享层的影响，又要保护剩余客户端的个性化能力，这一矛盾尚未被充分研究。

Method: 提出pFedUL框架，包含三个组件：(1) 基于梯度的分层贡献归因，分别量化目标客户端对共享层和个性化层的影响；(2) 自适应选择性去学习，对不同层类型采用差异化遗忘策略；(3) 轻量恢复协议，使剩余客户端以最小开销恢复个性化能力。同时引入两个新评估指标：个性化保留分数（PPS）和跨客户端公平性指数（CFI）。

Result: 在CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100和FEMNIST上的实验表明，pFedUL去学习效果接近完整重训练，剩余客户端个性化准确率平均保持97.3%。与六种适配到pFL场景的FU方法相比，pFedUL在个性化保留方面始终表现更优。

Conclusion: pFedUL有效解决了pFL场景下联邦去学习的特殊挑战，在保证去学习完整性的同时最大化剩余客户端的个性化保留，为隐私法规遵从提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Federated unlearning (FU) enables the removal of specific data contributions from federated learning (FL) models to comply with regulations such as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR). However, most existing FU methods are designed for the FedAvg paradigm, where all clients share a single global model. In practice, personalized federated learning (pFL) methods such as FedPer, FedRep, Ditto, and FedBN have become widely adopted due to their superior handling of non-IID data. These methods decompose the model into shared global layers and client-specific personalized layers, fundamentally altering the semantics of unlearning, yet this setting has received little attention. We formalize FU under the pFL paradigm, identifying a tension between unlearning completeness on shared layers and personalization preservation for remaining clients. We then propose pFedUL, a layer-aware selective unlearning framework comprising three components: (1) gradient-based layer-wise contribution attribution that separately quantifies the target client's influence on shared and personalized parameters, (2) adaptive selective unlearning that applies differentiated forgetting strategies across layer types, and (3) a lightweight recalibration protocol enabling remaining clients to restore personalization with minimal overhead. We further introduce two new metrics, Personalization Preservation Score (PPS) and Cross-client Fairness Index (CFI), to evaluate pFL-specific unlearning quality. Experiments on CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and FEMNIST under varying non-IID settings indicate that pFedUL achieves unlearning effectiveness comparable to full retraining while maintaining an average of 97.3\% personalized accuracy for remaining clients. Compared with six state-of-the-art FU methods adapted to the pFL setting, pFedUL consistently achieves superior personalization preservation.

</details>


### [661] [QK-Normed MLA: QK normalization without full key caching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16310)
*Yizhou Han,Yao Zhao,Jun Zhou,Longfei Li,Ruoyu Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明了QK归一化与多头潜注意力（MLA）并非不兼容，通过将键侧静态权重吸收到查询投影中、将动态RMS统计量简化为每个token和KV组的标量，实现了与显式后投影QK RMSNorm完全等价的形式，同时保留了MLA的潜解码路径。实验表明，QK归一化的MLA在400M参数、100B token训练下，相比QK裁剪取得了更低的训练损失和更好的下游准确率，且H800解码基准测试在256k上下文内延迟开销低于2%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前认为QK归一化与MLA不兼容，因为MLA通过缓存低维潜状态而非完整键来实现高效解码，而QK RMSNorm似乎需要每个缓存token的完整投影键。本文旨在解决这一表观不兼容问题。

Method: 将RMSNorm分解为静态仿射权重和动态标量RMS统计量，将键侧静态权重吸收到MLA查询侧投影中，将动态键统计量简化为每个token和KV组的逆RMS标量。所得公式与显式后投影QK RMSNorm精确等价，且保留了MLA的潜解码路径。

Result: QK归一化的MLA在400M参数、100B token训练中，训练损失和下游准确率均优于QK裁剪；H800解码基准测试在256k上下文内延迟开销低于2%。

Conclusion: QK归一化可以作为MLA模型的实用稳定化选项，无需完整键缓存即可实现。

Abstract: Query-key (QK) normalization stabilizes attention by controlling the scale of queries and keys before the dot product, but is not immediately compatible with Multi-head Latent Attention (MLA). MLA achieves efficient decoding by caching low-dimensional latent states instead of full keys, whereas post-projection QK RMSNorm appears to require the fully projected key for every cached token. We show this apparent incompatibility is an implementation artifact, not an architectural constraint. RMSNorm decomposes into a static affine weight and a dynamic scalar RMS statistic. The static key-side weight can be absorbed into the MLA query-side projection; the dynamic key statistic reduces to one inverse-RMS scalar per token and KV group. The resulting formulation is exactly equivalent to explicit post-projection QK RMSNorm in exact arithmetic and preserves MLA's latent decode path. In our 400M runs trained for up to 100B tokens, QK-Normed MLA achieves lower training loss and better downstream accuracy than QK clipping, while H800 decode benchmarks show less than 2% latency overhead up to 256k context. These results make QK normalization a practical stabilization option for MLA models without requiring full-key caching.

</details>


### [662] [Diffusion Offline Reinforcement Learning for Fair and Energy-Efficient UAV-Assisted Wireless Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16331)
*Eslam Eldeeb,Hirley Alves*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种扩散软演员-评论家（Diffusion-SAC）方法，结合离线强化学习与扩散概率模型，用于优化无人机网络的轨迹与调度控制，在能耗、公平性和吞吐量方面显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线强化学习方法（如CQL）在数据稀疏或动态环境下泛化能力不足，难以适应6G网络中对智能、数据驱动的决策需求。

Method: 将保守Q学习（CQL）与去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）相结合，构建Diffusion-SAC框架，实现具有信号感知能力的表达性策略学习，用于无人机辅助无线网络的轨迹与调度优化。

Result: 相比现有算法，吞吐量提升超过35%，收敛更稳定、奖励更高，且数据效率更高、能耗更低。

Conclusion: Diffusion-SAC在下一代无线控制系统中具有强大的鲁棒策略学习能力，为6G网络中生成式AI与通信系统的融合提供了有效方案。

Abstract: The integration of generative artificial intelligence with wireless communication and signal processing systems has opened new avenues for intelligent, data-driven decision-making in future 6G networks. This work proposes a diffusion soft actor-critic (Diffusion-SAC) approach that leverages offline reinforcement learning (RL) enhanced by denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs) to optimize trajectory and scheduling control in unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) networks. While offline RL methods, such as conservative Q-learning (CQL), can learn from static datasets, they often struggle to generalize in low-data or dynamic conditions. To address this, we combine the robustness of CQL with the generative power of diffusion models, enabling expressive and signal-aware policy learning that generalizes beyond behavior policies. Applied to a UAV-assisted wireless network, the proposed framework minimizes transmission energy and improves fairness among devices. Simulations show that Diffusion-SAC outperforms standard offline RL baselines, achieving more stable convergence and higher rewards even with limited datasets. The method enhances data efficiency, reduces energy consumption, and increases throughput by more than 35 % compared to existing algorithms, demonstrating its potential for robust policy learning in next-generation wireless control systems.

</details>


### [663] [Filtered ANN as a Phase Transition: When Selectivity-Estimation Error Causes Plan Regret](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16341)
*Madhulatha Mandarapu,Sandeep Kunkunuru*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文理论分析了带谓词约束的近似近邻查询（ANN）三种执行策略（pre-filter, post-filter, in-filter）的后悔（regret）产生机制，发现后悔仅集中在相变边界附近，呈楔形分布，并通过实验验证了该理论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 带谓词过滤的ANN查询在不同选择性s下，最优执行策略不同，但现有系统依赖选择性估计来选策略，估计误差会导致性能损失。论文旨在理论刻画这种损失的产生机制与边界条件。

Method: 将策略选择建模为分段函数上的argmax问题；利用顺序统计量推导post-filter边界（s ~ k/K），利用渗流理论推导in-filter边界（s_c ~ 0.83/M）；定义后悔为与最优策略的召回率差距的楔形模型，并引入有限标度缩放（finite-size scaling）进行验证。

Result: 后悔仅在相变边界附近集中（~290x），呈对数宽度的楔形；后悔曲线在不同数据集规模下可collapse为一条通用曲线；真实近似索引不改变边界位置，但有偏代价模型会带来无法通过鲁棒估计修复的校准偏差。

Conclusion: 本文贡献在于理论刻画而非提出新索引，揭示了选择性估计误差对ANN过滤查询影响的本质——仅边界敏感，且该现象在预算B < sqrt(k n)时才存在。

Abstract: A filtered approximate-nearest-neighbor (ANN) query returns the k nearest vectors among those satisfying an attribute predicate P of selectivity s. The best execution strategy -- pre-filter, post-filter, or in-filter -- changes with s, so a system must estimate s and choose. We model this as an argmax over a landscape with phases (regions where each strategy wins) separated by boundaries, and show that selectivity-estimation error produces plan regret -- recall lost versus the oracle strategy -- only in the critical regions around those boundaries. The regret is a wedge of log-width equal to the multiplicative estimation error epsilon and height equal to the local cliff |V'(s*)| epsilon; the flip-margin 1/|V'(s*)| is the condition number of a sibling cardinality-estimation study reappearing as the local boundary theory. The two phase boundaries follow from independent mathematics: order statistics place the post-filter cliff at s ~ k/K, and site percolation places the in-filter cliff at s_c ~ 0.83/M for graph degree M (corpus-size independent). Criticality exists only under a constrained budget B < sqrt(k n). Under pre-registered decision rules we confirm, on synthetic sweeps and real SIFT1M, that regret concentrates ~290x at the boundary and that the regret curves obey a finite-size scaling collapse onto one universal wedge across two decades of corpus size. A real approximate index does not mis-locate the boundary, but a biased cost model opens a persistent miscalibration band that estimation-error robustness cannot fix. The contribution is a characterization, not a new index. Code and the full pre-registration are public.

</details>


### [664] [Communication-Efficient Verifiable Attention for LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16352)
*Ziqun Chen,Ming Wu,Michael Heinrich,Jason Zeng,Huiying Lan,Tianwei Zhang,Rui Tan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出VeriAttn，一种面向Transformer大语言模型的通信高效TEE-GPU注意力验证机制，通过将注意力的线性和非线性计算都卸载到GPU、TEE仅做验证，并采用两级流水线和分区策略，在Intel TDX平台上相比TSDP实现了2.60-5.42倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有TEE防护的DNN分区方法（TSDP）直接应用于Transformer大语言模型时，会带来巨大的TEE计算开销和TEE-GPU通信开销，因此需要一种更高效的可验证大语言模型推理加速方案。

Method: VeriAttn将注意力的线性和非线性计算全部卸载到GPU，TEE仅负责验证；在预填阶段采用两级流水线重叠数据传输、TEE预处理/后处理和GPU计算；在解码阶段当KV缓存超出GPU内存时，将注意力跨TEE和GPU分区以减少重复的KV传输。

Result: 在Intel TDX平台上，VeriAttn在预填阶段对6k-token提示实现2.60-3.38倍加速，在解码阶段对10k-token输出实现3.86-5.42倍加速，相比TSDP方案。

Conclusion: VeriAttn通过将验证与计算解耦、流水线化和智能分区策略，显著提升了可验证大语言模型推理的效率，为安全可靠的远程LLM服务提供了实用方案。

Abstract: Computation integrity of remote large language model (LLM) serving can be questionable. For conventional deep neural networks (DNNs), the existing TEE-shielded DNN partitioning (TSDP) approach uses Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) to compute non-linear components and verify the integrity of linear components offloaded to an untrusted GPU. However, directly applying TSDP to Transformer-based LLMs incurs significant TEE computation and TEE-GPU communication overhead. This paper presents Communication-efficient TEE-GPU Attention (\textsc{VeriAttn}) for accelerating verifiable LLM inference. \textsc{VeriAttn} offloads both linear and non-linear computations of attention to the GPU, while TEE performs verification. Moreover, for prefill, \textsc{VeriAttn} uses a two-level pipeline to overlap data movement, TEE pre-/post-processing, and GPU computation. For decoding, when the key-value cache exceeds available GPU memory, \textsc{VeriAttn} partitions attention across TEE and GPU to reduce repeated key-value transfers. Evaluation on an Intel TDX platform shows that \textsc{VeriAttn} achieves 2.60-3.38$\times$ and 3.86-5.42$\times$ acceleration over TSDP for 6k-token prompts and 10k-token outputs during prefill and decoding, respectively.

</details>


### [665] [Simulation-Augmented Multi-Step Split Conformal Prediction for Aggregated Forecasts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16356)
*Andro Sabashvili*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SA-MSCP方法，通过模拟增强的多步分割共形预测，结合块自助法的交叉验证残差生成未来路径，有效改进聚合预测（如年度总量、同比增长率）的不确定性量化，经验覆盖优于基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列共形预测方法在聚合任务（如年度总量、增长率）上的不确定性量化效果有限，需要一种能有效处理聚合结构的方法。

Method: 提出SA-MSCP（Simulation-Augmented Multi-Step Split Conformal Prediction），利用交叉验证残差通过块自助法生成模拟未来路径，再基于经验分位数构建预测区间。

Result: 实验表明，SA-MSCP在聚合目标和增长率目标上相比模拟路径基线方法改善了经验覆盖概率。

Conclusion: 模拟增强的共形校准是聚合时间序列预测中不确定性量化的有效且通用框架。

Abstract: We study uncertainty quantification for aggregated forecasting tasks such as annual totals and year-over-year growth rates. We propose SA-MSCP, a simulation-augmented multi-step split conformal method that generates future paths from cross-validated residuals using a block bootstrap and constructs prediction intervals from empirical quantiles. Experiments show that SA-MSCP improves empirical coverage over a simulated-path baseline for aggregated and growth-rate targets. Our results demonstrate that simulation-enhanced conformal calibration is an effective and general framework for uncertainty quantification in aggregated time-series forecasting.

</details>


### [666] [CacheMuon: Using Temporal Preconditioning To Approximate Polar Factor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16371)
*Bishnu Dev,Sushil Bohara,Martin Takáč,Samuel Horváth*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CacheMuon 通过缓存历史优化步骤的极因子信息来近似当前步的计算，减少了牛顿-舒尔茨迭代的计算开销，在保持模型性能的同时降低了正交化 FLOPs。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muon 优化器虽性能优异，但其每次迭代都需进行牛顿-舒尔茨迭代来计算极因子，计算开销大。动量矩阵随时间平滑变化，其极因子存在强时间相关性，因此可利用历史信息减少冗余计算。

Method: 提出 CacheMuon，一种时间预条件方法，通过复用先前优化步骤的信息来近似当前步的极因子，从而减少跨迭代的重复正交化计算。将其分析为一种非精确 Muon 更新，误差由新鲜求解器误差和缓存陈旧度控制。

Result: CacheMuon 提供了可控的质量-效率权衡：保守阈值在语言模型和视觉训练任务上接近原始 Muon 的性能，同时减少正交化 FLOPs；激进阈值带来更大的算术节省，但验证质量略有下降。

Conclusion: CacheMuon 通过利用时间相关性有效降低了 Muon 优化器的计算成本，在效率与性能之间提供了灵活的控制边界。

Abstract: Muon is an optimizer that computes updates using the polar factor of the momentum matrix and has shown strong empirical performance across a range of training settings. A key component of Muon is the Newton-Schulz iteration used to compute this polar factor. Although this avoids the cost of an exact singular value decomposition, it remains expensive in practice because it is applied at every optimization step. At the same time, the momentum matrix changes smoothly over training, suggesting strong temporal correlation in the corresponding polar factors. In this paper, we exploit this structure and propose CacheMuon, a temporal preconditioning method that reuses information from previous optimization steps to approximate the polar factor at the current step. This reduces redundant orthogonalization computation across iterations. We analyze CacheMuon as an inexact Muon update, with error controlled by fresh-solver error and cache staleness. Empirically, CacheMuon provides a controllable quality-efficiency frontier: conservative thresholds closely match fresh Muon on language-model and vision training while reducing orthogonalization FLOPs, whereas more aggressive thresholds yield larger arithmetic savings at the cost of modest validation-quality degradation.

</details>


### [667] [Scalable and Interpretable Representation Alignment with Ordinal Similarity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16379)
*Diogo Soares,Pankhil Gawade,Andrea Dittadi,Ewa Szczurek*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于序关系的表示相似性度量框架（TSI/QSI），解决现有指标缺乏可解释性、对异常值不敏感及计算复杂等问题，并证明TSI与局部邻域对齐（互近邻）的理论等价性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表示相似性度量存在三大缺陷：基线漂移导致不可解释、对异常值不鲁棒、大规模数据集上计算困难而被迫使用启发式近似。

Method: 提出序相似性框架，具体实例化为三元组相似性指数（TSI）和四元组相似性指数（QSI），通过量化序关系的一致性来衡量对齐程度。

Result: 理论证明该方法具有内在可解释性、对异常值鲁棒且计算高效，并建立TSI与互近邻（MNN）的等价关系。实验验证了上述性质。

Conclusion: 序相似性提供了一种可扩展的对齐度量方法，有助于实践者更好地理解和设计表示。

Abstract: Evaluating representation similarity is fundamental to representation learning. However, existing metrics suffer from significant limitations: they lack interpretability due to shifting baselines, lack robustness to outliers, and are computationally intractable for large datasets, forcing reliance on heuristic approximations. To address this, we develop an ordinal-similarity framework, instantiated by the Triplet (TSI) and Quadruplet (QSI) Similarity Indices, which measure alignment by quantifying the consistency of ordinal relationships. We theoretically demonstrate this formulation is inherently interpretable, robust to outliers, and computationally efficient. Finally, we establish a formal equivalence between TSI and local neighborhood alignment, measured by Mutual Nearest Neighbors. Empirically, we validate these properties and show that ordinal similarity offers a scalable approach to measuring alignment, enabling practitioners to better understand and design representations.

</details>


### [668] [Mixtures of Subspaces for Bandwidth Efficient Context Parallel Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16384)
*Sameera Ramasinghe,Ajanthan Thalaiyasingam,Hadi Mohaghegh Dolatabadi,Gil Avraham,Violetta Shevchenko,Yan Zuo,Chamin Hewa Koneputugodage,Alexander Long*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种通信高效的上下文并行压缩方法，通过利用激活输出的低秩结构，在低带宽分布式训练中实现超过95%的压缩率，使百亿参数模型在300Mbps网络上可处理10万+token上下文，收敛速度媲美100Gbps高速集群。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文并行方法将输入切块分散到多设备，逐块计算注意力，在低带宽去中心化训练场景下通信开销过大，不实用。

Method: 利用激活输出内在的低秩结构，通过高效重参数化将其动态约束到学习到的子空间混合上，实现超过95%的压缩率。

Result: 在300Mbps慢速网络上，百亿参数模型可扩展到10万+token上下文长度，壁钟收敛速度与100Gbps高速互联下的集中式模型相匹配。

Conclusion: 所提压缩方法使低带宽去中心化训练也能高效支持超长上下文，大幅降低了上下文并行的通信需求。

Abstract: Pretraining language models with extended context windows enhances their ability to leverage rich information during generation. Existing methods split input sequences into chunks, broadcast them across multiple devices, and compute attention block by block which incurs significant communication overhead. While feasible in high-speed clusters, these methods are impractical for decentralized training over low-bandwidth connections. We propose a compression method for communication-efficient context parallelism in decentralized settings, achieving a remarkable compression rate of over 95\% with negligible overhead and no loss in convergence. Our key insight is to exploit the intrinsic low-rank structure of activation outputs by dynamically constraining them to learned mixtures of subspaces via efficient reparameterizations. We demonstrate scaling billion-parameter decentralized models to context lengths exceeding 100K tokens on networks as slow as 300Mbps, matching the wall-clock convergence speed of centralized models on 100Gbps interconnects.

</details>


### [669] [Robust Neural Tucker Factorization with Bias Correction and Adaptive Initialization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16388)
*Yuchao Su,Yixin Ran*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出KaBiN模型，通过Kaiming初始化和偏置校正改进神经Tucker分解，有效提升高维非完整张量补全的性能与稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维非完整张量在交通和气候应用中广泛存在，但稀疏观测导致精确补全困难。现有神经Tucker分解受参数初始化和输出偏置配置影响，次优初始化导致梯度饱和，缺少偏置参数迫使交互权重吸收全局偏差，影响性能。

Method: 提出KaBiN模型：1) 对嵌入层和Tucker线性参数采用Kaiming均匀初始化；2) 在输出映射中引入简单的偏置校正。通过将全局均值偏移与局部结构表示优雅解耦，实现稳定且良态的优化景观。

Result: 在三个真实世界高维非完整张量数据集上，KaBiN在保持极小计算开销的同时，取得了优于原始NeuTucF的性能。

Conclusion: 提出简单而有效的KaBiN框架，通过Kaiming初始化和偏置校正解决神经Tucker分解的初始化不稳定和全局偏差吸收问题，为HDI张量补全提供了更优方案。

Abstract: High-dimensional incomplete (HDI) tensors are widely used in traffic and climate applications, but sparse observations make accurate completion difficult. The intrinsic non-linear dynamics and non-stationary variations across distinct multi-modal fields severely hinder the efficacy of conventional linear reconstruction frameworks. Neural Tucker factorization provides an effective framework for modeling high-order interactions among tensor modes. By parameterizing underlying structural characteristics into continuous latent spaces, neural representations circumvent the rigid low-rank constraints of classical algebra. However, its performance can still be affected by implementation-level choices, especially parameter initialization and the bias configuration of the final output mapping. Suboptimal initializations frequently lead to variance explosion across the cubically expanded interaction spaces, driving the subsequent non-linear activation boundaries into severe gradient saturation zones, while the omission of a dedicated translation parameter forces interaction weights to implicitly absorb global statistical deviations. This paper proposes a simple yet effective neural Tucker factorization model with Kaiming initialization and bias correction (KaBiN) for HDI tensor completion. The proposed model utilizes Kaiming uniform initialization for the embedding and Tucker linear parameters, and adopts a simple bias correction in output mapping. By elegantly decoupling global mean shifts from local structural representations, the framework provides a highly stable and well-conditioned optimization landscape. Experiments on three real-world HDI tensor datasets show that KaBiN achieves better performance than the original NeuTucF, while introducing minimal computational overhead.

</details>


### [670] [MUNI: Multimodal Unified Latent Diffusion for Coherent Any-to-Any Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16408)
*Kyeongmin Yeo,Yunhong Min,Minhyuk Sung*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MUNI是一个端到端的多模态潜在扩散框架，支持任意模态间生成（any-to-any generation），通过共享随机潜在变量统一了条件跨模态生成和无条件联合采样，在条件生成上匹配或超越最强基线，在无条件生成上大幅领先。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态生成模型大多基于LLM架构，受限于需要文本配对数据和模态特定生成器的利用不足；而最近的扩散/流模型扩展仍依赖文本对齐嵌入、完全配对训练或固定维度的确定性映射。作者希望设计一个无需上述限制的端到端多模态生成框架。

Method: 1) 架构贡献：扩展潜在扩散到端到端多模态任意生成，联合训练模态特定编码器、解码器和单个共享的基于流的先验。2) 训练目标贡献：提出路由训练目标（routed training objective），解决标准多模态变分推断聚合规则在学习先验和表达解码器下的不足，确保共享潜在变量的相干性、预测充分性和内容最小性。

Result: 在PolyMNIST-Quadrant-Labels和大规模图像-文本-音频基准上，MUNI在条件生成任务中匹配或超越最强基线，在无条件生成一致性上取得最大领先优势。

Conclusion: MUNI通过端到端训练和路由目标的联合设计，有效解决了多模态生成中的核心瓶颈，尤其在无条件多模态一致生成上展现出显著优势，为多模态生成提供了新的范式。

Abstract: We introduce MUNI, an end-to-end multimodal latent diffusion framework for any-to-any generation that unifies subset-conditioned cross-modal generation and unconditional joint sampling through a shared stochastic latent. Existing multimodal generative models are largely LLM-based, which limits leveraging modality-specific generators and requires text-paired data for training. Recent diffusion- and flow-based any-to-any extensions take a different direction but still rely on text-aligned embeddings, fully-paired training, or matched-dimensionality deterministic mappings. MUNI rests on two complementary contributions, one architectural and one in the training objective. First, we extend latent diffusion to multimodal any-to-any generation end-to-end: instead of the standard two-stage recipe that precomputes a frozen latent space and then fits a prior over it, MUNI jointly trains modality-specific encoders, expressive decoders, and a single shared flow-based prior under one objective. Second, we identify that the standard aggregation rules of multimodal variational inference are insufficient once coupled with a learned prior and expressive decoders. A suitable shared latent must simultaneously satisfy coherence across generated modalities, predictive sufficiency of subset latents, and minimality of the latent content. We propose a routed training objective whose structural choices align the latent with these criteria and admit a minimal-sufficiency characterization in the realizable setting. Experiments on PolyMNIST-Quadrant-Labels and a large-scale image-text-audio benchmark show MUNI matching or exceeding the strongest baselines on conditional generation while opening its largest margins on unconditional coherence. Project page: https://muni-proj.github.io/.

</details>


### [671] [Not all Jensen-Shannon Divergence Estimators are Equal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16411)
*Alba Garrido,Alejandro Almodóvar,Mar Elizo,Patricia A. Apellániz,Santiago Zazo,Juan Parras*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了合成表格数据保真度评估中Jensen-Shannon散度的估计问题，发现不同估计协议会导致不可比较的结果，包括边际估计器的依赖盲视、分类器估计器的先验偏移偏差和高维敏感性，并提出了闭式后验矫正方法及实用建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管JS散度被广泛用于合成数据保真度评估，但其有限样本估计协议往往缺乏规范，导致不同研究报告的数值不可比较，需要系统理解这一问题。

Method: 通过控制实验（参考散度已知）和真实合成数据基准，系统比较边际估计器和分类器估计器在不同维度、样本量和类别平衡下的行为，并推导出分类器JS估计的先验偏移闭式后验矫正公式。

Result: 边际估计器忽略联合分布依赖、严重低估散度；分类器估计器存在强估计器依赖性和先验偏移偏差；高维下估计器敏感性加剧；所提后验矫正有效缓解类别不平衡问题。

Conclusion: 经验JS散度值本质依赖于估计协议，必须明确说明估计过程才能进行有意义的比较。提供了实用指南和开源工具。

Abstract: The Jensen-Shannon divergence is widely reported as a scalar measure of fidelity for synthetic tabular data. Yet, in practice, it is estimated from finite samples using protocols that are often underspecified. This creates a measurement problem. Although the population divergence is well defined, the empirical value depends on the estimator family, sampling protocol, calibration, dimensionality, and class balance. We show that different protocols can yield non-comparable values: marginal-based estimators ignore dependencies in the joint distribution and can severely underestimate divergence, while classifier-based estimators capture joint structure but exhibit strong estimator dependence. We systematically study this behavior across controlled settings with reference divergences and real-world synthetic tabular benchmarks. Our analysis reveals dependence blindness in marginal estimators, prior-shift bias under class imbalance, and estimator sensitivity in high dimensions. To address prior shift, we derive a closed-form posterior correction for classifier-based Jensen-Shannon estimation. Our results show that empirical Jensen-Shannon divergence values are inherently protocol-dependent, making explicit specification of the estimation procedure necessary for meaningful comparison. We provide practical guidelines and an open-source tool for estimator-aware Jensen-Shannon evaluation.

</details>


### [672] [Taylor-Calibrate: Principled Initialization for Hybrid Linear Attention Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16429)
*Zhongzhu Zhou,Qingyang Wu,Junxiong Wang,Mayank Mishra,Shuaiwen Leon Song,Ben Athiwaratkun,Chenfeng Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Taylor-Calibrate方法，通过泰勒引导的注意力统计信息初始化混合线性注意力模型（Gated DeltaNet），将预训练Transformer高效转换为混合线性模型，相比朴素转换方法在零样本性能上提升高达88倍，且达到相同恢复目标所需训练token减少4.9~9.2倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将预训练Transformer转换为混合线性注意力模型（如Gated DeltaNet）时，简单复制注意力投影会导致模型处于不良动态区域，需要大量蒸馏token来修复初始化而非学习教师行为，因此需要一种轻量级的初始化方法。

Method: Taylor-Calibrate方法：利用泰勒引导的教师注意力统计信息来设置值投影、记忆时间尺度、写门和输出门，然后进行短期的逐层对齐步骤，使每个转换后的层匹配教师输出。

Result: 在四种教师设置和三种保留层策略下，Taylor-Calibrate显著提升了零样本学生模型性能，代表性消融实验中提升高达88倍；达到相同恢复目标所需训练token减少4.9~9.2倍。

Conclusion: Taylor-Calibrate是一种有效的轻量级初始化方法，能大幅提升预训练Transformer向混合线性注意力模型转换的效率和质量，减少了修复初始化所需的训练成本。

Abstract: Hybrid linear attention models offer an appealing path to faster long-context inference: they reduce the quadratic cost and KV-cache burden of full softmax attention while retaining much of the quality of Transformer models. A practical way to obtain such models is to convert a pretrained Transformer instead of pretraining a new architecture from scratch, but this conversion is still brittle. Simply copying the teacher attention projections into a Gated DeltaNet (GDN) student does not specify the new recurrent decay, write, and output-gating dynamics. As a result, the converted model often starts in a poor dynamical regime and must spend many distillation tokens repairing initialization rather than learning the remaining teacher behavior. We propose Taylor-Calibrate, a lightweight initialization method for hybrid GDN students. The method uses Taylor-guided teacher attention statistics to set the value projection, memory timescale, write gates, and output gate, then applies a short per-layer alignment step to match each converted layer to the teacher output. Across four teacher settings and three retained-layer policies, Taylor-Calibrate gives substantially stronger zero-shot students, with up to an 88x improvement in a representative ablation, and reaches matched recovery targets with 4.9x--9.2x fewer training tokens than naive conversion.

</details>


### [673] [Autonomous End-to-End SOH Prediction Services for Battery Systems via Temporal-Contrastive Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16434)
*Junting Wen,Dan Li,Qihao Quan,Xiwen Wang,Hang Yang,Zhaohong Meng,Zigui Jiang,Changlin Yang,Tianle Liu,Diego Muñoz-Carpintero,Jian Lou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TC-SOH是一种用于锂电池健康状态（SOH）估计的模块化、即插即用服务架构，通过时序对比机制和跨窗口预测预任务从原始运行数据中自动学习退化相关特征，优于物理模型和数据驱动基线，MAPE降低1.91倍，RMSE降低2.13倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SOH估计依赖人工特征工程和黑箱模型，难以规模化工业部署，因此需要一种自主、端到端且透明的SOH预测方法。

Method: 提出TC-SOH架构，包含时序对比机制（temporal-contrastive mechanism）和跨窗口预测预任务（cross-window prediction pretext task），直接从原始运行数据中提取退化相关表征，并通过多种可解释性分析（可视化、敏感性分析、冗余分析、双向探测、未来SOH探测、时间混洗）提升模型透明度。

Result: 在四个公开数据集上，TC-SOH优于所考虑的物理信息驱动和数据驱动基线，MAPE降低1.91倍，RMSE降低2.13倍。分析表明所学特征与专家挑选的特征重叠，且保留了额外SOH相关信息，有序时间上下文有助于后续SOH预测。

Conclusion: TC-SOH实现了自主、端到端、可解释的SOH估计，无需人工特征工程，在性能和透明度上均优于现有方法，具备良好的工业部署潜力。

Abstract: Accurate state of health (SOH) estimation is a critical diagnostic service for lithium-ion battery management. However, reliance on labor-intensive manual feature engineering and opaque black-box models hinders scalable industrial deployment. To address this, we introduce TC-SOH: a modular, plug-and-play service architecture for autonomous, end-to-end SOH prediction. TC-SOH employs a temporal-contrastive mechanism and a cross-window prediction pretext task to extract degradation-relevant representations directly from raw operational data. To improve transparency, we connect model efficacy with representation diagnostics: visualization, sensitivity analysis, redundancy analysis, bidirectional probing, future-SOH probing, and temporal shuffling show that learned features overlap with selected expert descriptors while retaining additional SOH-relevant variation, and that ordered temporal context improves subsequent-SOH prediction. Across four public datasets, TC-SOH outperforms the considered physics-informed and data-driven baselines, reducing MAPE by 1.91 times and RMSE by 2.13 times.

</details>


### [674] [SDS-LoRA: Overcoming Anisotropic Gradient Scaling in Low-Rank Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16454)
*Junghun Oh,Sungyong Baik,Kyoung Mu Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从几何角度分析了LoRA参数化的局限性，发现全微调梯度在反向传播到低秩矩阵时会被奇异值各向异性地缩放，导致梯度有效秩降低并偏离全微调方向。为此提出SDS-LoRA，通过结构化解耦奇异值与反向传播过程，使梯度仅通过正交基传播，消除了条件数对收敛速度的影响，实验表明该方法缩小了与全微调的差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LoRA虽广泛用于大模型高效微调，但其参数化方式存在几何层面的缺陷：全微调梯度反向传播到低秩矩阵时，受奇异值影响产生各向异性缩放，导致梯度扭曲，偏离全微调方向，使得LoRA与全微调之间存在不可忽视的性能差距。

Method: 提出SDS-LoRA，结构化解耦奇异值与反向传播过程，使全微调梯度仅通过低秩矩阵子空间的正交基传播，不受奇异值尺度影响。从而消除梯度各向异性缩放问题，保持梯度方向与全微调一致。

Result: 理论分析表明LoRA收敛速度受低秩矩阵条件数影响，而SDS-LoRA收敛速度与条件数无关。实验在自然语言和视觉基准上均验证了SDS-LoRA能改善损失收敛，缩小与全微调的差距，显著提升适配性能。

Conclusion: LoRA的奇异值会导致梯度各向异性缩放，限制了其性能上限。SDS-LoRA通过解耦奇异值解决了该问题，是一种更优的低秩参数化方式，为后续低秩适配方法的设计提供了新思路。

Abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) enables efficient adaptation of large pre-trained models to downstream tasks by parameterizing weight updates with low-rank matrices. In this paper, we investigate the limitations of the LoRA parameterization from a geometric perspective. Specifically, we show that when a full fine-tuning gradient is backpropagated to the low-rank matrices, it undergoes anisotropic scaling driven by their singular values. We argue that this phenomenon is undesirable because it distorts the full fine-tuning gradient by skewing it toward dominant singular directions while suppressing others. Our analyses demonstrate that anisotropic gradient scaling reduces the effective rank of the low-rank matrices' gradients and results in suboptimal alignment between the full fine-tuning gradient and its low-rank approximation in LoRA, thereby exacerbating the gap to full fine-tuning. To address these limitations, we propose a new low-rank parameterization, SDS-LoRA, which structurally decouples singular values from the backward pass. Our method ensures that the full fine-tuning gradient backpropagates only through the orthonormal bases of the low-rank matrices' subspaces, independent of their scales. Convergence analysis demonstrates that while LoRA's convergence rate degrades with the condition number of the low-rank matrices, SDS-LoRA remains independent of it. Experimental results across natural language and vision benchmarks show that SDS-LoRA improves loss convergence and reduces the gap to full fine-tuning, significantly enhancing adaptation performance.

</details>


### [675] [SPRI: SVD-Partitioned Residual Initialization for Data-Constrained MoE Upcycling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16456)
*Weiqiao Shan,Ruixiang Mao,Yuang Li,Yuhao Zhang,Yingfeng Luo,Tong Zheng,Chen Xu,Yucheng Qiao,Chunxiang Jin,Yi Yuan,Jingdong Chen,Tong Xiao,Jingbo Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SPRI方法，利用SVD分解预训练FFN权重的残差来初始化MoE专家，配合两阶段训练策略，在多语言语音翻译任务上显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MoE升级循环方法在数据受限的有监督适配场景下表现不佳，要么专家同质化严重，要么对预训练参数造成过大扰动，需要一种既能利用预训练结构又能引入专家多样性的方法。

Method: SPRI：将预训练FFN权重进行SVD分解，将分解后的残差分配到不同路由专家上初始化；同时提出两阶段训练策略提升适配稳定性。

Result: 在CoVoST2数据集15个英到多语言方向上，平均BLEU提升2.58，COMET提升3.32，超过之前最佳MoE升级循环基线3.39 BLEU和4.34 COMET。

Conclusion: SPRI通过基于预训练谱结构的专家初始化，在数据受限场景下有效实现了MoE升级循环，证明引入受控的专家多样性是关键。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models enable efficient scaling, but training them from scratch remains prohibitively expensive. MoE upcycling mitigates this cost by converting pretrained dense models into sparse MoE models. However, existing upcycling methods typically rely on large-scale continued training and often perform poorly under data-constrained supervised adaptation, due to either homogeneous experts or overly disruptive perturbations to pretrained parameters. In this setting, effective upcycling must leverage pretrained weight structure while introducing sufficient diversity among routed experts. To this end, we propose SVD-Partitioned Residual Initialization (SPRI), which distributes SVD-partitioned residuals derived from pretrained feed-forward network (FFN) weights across routed experts, introducing controlled expert diversity grounded in pretrained spectral structure. We further introduce a two-stage training strategy to improve adaptation stability. We evaluate SPRI on multilingual speech-to-text translation, where limited supervised data challenges MoE upcycling and multiple target languages provide natural routing heterogeneity. On CoVoST2 across 15 En-to-XX directions, SPRI improves average BLEU and COMET over fully fine-tuned dense models by 2.58 and 3.32 points, respectively, and outperforms the prior best MoE upcycling baseline by 3.39 BLEU and 4.34 COMET points.

</details>


### [676] [Privacy from Symmetry: Orthogonally Equivariant Transformers for LLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16461)
*Alexander Yukhimchuk,Andrey Shulga,Mladen Kolar,Martin Takáč*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种正交混淆方法，通过在客户端对嵌入向量乘以秘密正交矩阵，并设计O(d)-等变的ConjFormer架构，在不注入噪声或依赖繁重密码学手段的情况下，实现隐私保护的LLM推理，将token恢复率从35%以上降至至多1.3%，困惑度仅增加0.4%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在本地运行大型语言模型往往不切实际，导致敏感文本的推理被迫交由第三方服务商处理。现有的分割推理虽然通过仅传输隐藏表示来部分缓解隐私问题，但这些表示仍可通过最近邻搜索从公开的嵌入表中恢复，存在严重的信息泄露风险。

Method: 提出一种正交混淆方法：客户端将嵌入向量乘以一个秘密正交矩阵后再传输。同时设计ConjFormer架构，通过标量RMSNorm归一化以及对所有线性权重进行块状正交共轭变换，实现精确的O(d)-等变性，使得服务器在旋转基下完成全部前向计算，无法观察到未旋转的隐藏状态。

Result: 在PubMed微调的GPT-2和Llama 3.2 1B模型上，正交混淆消除了直接余弦最近邻反演，将token恢复率从超过35% top-10降至至多1.3%，微调后困惑度仅增加0.4%。

Conclusion: 在架构层面强制执行对称性可以在不依赖噪声注入或繁重密码学手段的前提下，为隐私保护的LLM推理提供一种实用的防御方案。

Abstract: Running large language models locally is often impractical, pushing inference on sensitive text to third-party providers. Split inference partially mitigates this by keeping tokens on the client and sending only hidden representations, but these representations can still be recovered via nearest-neighbor search against the public embedding table. We propose an orthogonal obfuscation procedure in which the client multiplies embeddings by a secret orthogonal matrix before transmission. To enable correct inference under arbitrary rotations, we introduce ConjFormer, a transformer variant that is exactly $\mathrm{O}(d)$-equivariant via a lightweight normalization change (scalar RMSNorm) together with blockwise orthogonal conjugation of all linear weights. As a result, the server performs the full forward pass entirely in the rotated basis and never observes unrotated hidden states. Experiments on GPT-2 and Llama 3.2 1B models fine-tuned on PubMed show that orthogonal obfuscation eliminates direct cosine nearest-neighbor inversion and reduces token recovery from over 35% top-10 to at most 1.3%, while increasing perplexity by only 0.4% after fine-tuning. These results indicate that enforcing symmetry at the architectural level can provide a practical defense for privacy-preserving LLM inference without noise injection or heavy cryptographic machinery.

</details>


### [677] [Learning aligned EEG representations with subject-specific encoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16462)
*Bruna J. Lopes,Gabriel Schwartz,Sylvain Chevallier,Raphael Y. de Camargo,Bruno Aristimunha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了跨被试脑电解码中的分布移位问题，提出用被试专用编码器+共享分类器的混合模型替代共享编码器，实验表明被试专用编码器能内化对齐功能，提升分类性能，但未见过被试的头部选择仍是瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨被试脑电解码虽然能提供更多训练数据，但会引入强烈的被试间分布偏移。作者想探究仅通过任务监督和架构设计是否能学习到被试对齐的表示，而不依赖显式的对齐方法（如欧几里得对齐）。

Method: 用被试专用编码器替代共享EEG编码器，后接共享分类器形成混合模型。在四个运动想象数据集上与EEGNet、AttentionBaseNet、CTNet等基线模型及欧几里得对齐方法进行对比。

Result: 欧几里得对齐能改善共享编码器，但混合编码器内部化了这一功能（去除对齐后验证损失和潜在距离分析变化很小）。被试专用头部提高了类别区分度并将每个被试置于其潜在流形附近，改善了大多数被试的性能，但存在对方法敏感的子集。

Conclusion: 被试专用编码器可作为脑电解码的学习式对齐机制，但未见过被试的头部选择仍是主要瓶颈。

Abstract: Cross-subject EEG decoding promises more training data, but it also exposes neural networks to strong inter-subject distribution shifts. We study whether task supervision and architecture alone can learn subject-aligned representations. We replace a shared EEG encoder with subject-specific encoders followed by a common classifier, and compare this hybrid model with standard EEGNet, AttentionBaseNet, and CTNet baselines with Euclidean Alignment (EA) on four motor-imagery datasets. EA improves shared encoders by recentering subject covariances, but the hybrid encoder largely internalises this role: validation-loss curves and latent-distance analyses change little when EA is removed. Subject-specific heads increase class distinctiveness and place each subject close to its own latent manifold, improving most subjects while leaving a method-sensitive subset. These results support subject-specific encoders as a learned alignment mechanism for EEG decoding and identify head selection for unseen subjects as the remaining bottleneck.

</details>


### [678] [BRICKS-WM: Building Reusability via Interface Composition Kinetics for Structured World Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16489)
*Shaowei Zhang,Jiahan Cao,Xunlan Zhou,Shenghua Wan,De-Chuan Zhan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BRICKS-WM提出了一种模块化组装结构化世界模型的方法，将潜在状态空间分解为Agent和Background模块，通过潜在接口交互，使得背景动态可跨智能体重用，无需重新训练整个世界模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于模型强化学习方法使用单一潜在动态模型，将环境动态耦合在一起，导致可重用性差——更换智能体需要从头重新训练整个世界模型，即使环境保持不变。

Method: 提出BRICKS-WM框架，将潜在状态空间分解为Agent（致动）模块和Background（外部）模块，二者通过学习的潜在接口桥接。背景动态与智能体动态功能分离，背景动态对智能体动态保持不可知。

Result: BRICKS-WM从头训练时能达到与强单一大模型基线相当的控制性能，并且支持冻结的背景动态在不同智能体间重用。

Conclusion: 通过功能解耦潜在动态，BRICKS-WM在保持控制性能的同时显著提升了世界模型的可重用性。

Abstract: Model-based Reinforcement Learning (MBRL) has achieved remarkable success in continuous control by leveraging latent world models. However, prevailing approaches typically rely on monolithic latent dynamics, entangling environment dynamics into a coupled process. This coupling severely limits reusability: altering the agent necessitates retraining the entire world from scratch, even if the environment remains constant. To address this, we introduce BRICKS-WM (Building Reusability via Interface Composition Kinetics for Structured World Models), a framework for the modular assembly of structured world models. Driven by the insight that the physical world is composed of independent entities, we posit that global dynamics can be modeled as a composition of distinct dynamical modules interacting via latent interfaces. As a minimal instantiation, we factorize the latent state space into an actuated Agent module and an external Background module, bridged by a learned latent interface. Unlike prior object-centric methods that prioritize visual segmentation, BRICKS-WM enforces a functional separation in transition dynamics, ensuring that background dynamics remains agnostic to the agent's dynamics. Empirically, BRICKS-WM achieves control performance comparable to strong monolithic baselines when trained from scratch, and enables the reuse of frozen background dynamics across agents.

</details>


### [679] [daVinci-kernel: Co-Evolving Skill Selection, Summarization, and Utilization via RL for GPU Kernel Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16497)
*Dayuan Fu,Mohan Jiang,Tongyu Wang,Dian Yang,Jiarui Hu,Liming Liu,Jinlong Hou,Pengfei Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 daVinci-kernel，一个基于强化学习的 GPU 内核优化框架，通过技能发现与利用的动态技能库，联合训练三个智能体（技能选择、策略生成、技能总结）共享一个 LLM 主干，在 KernelBench 上超越此前最强的 Dr.Kernel-14B 模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GPU 内核优化中，功能性正确已可保证，核心目标转向执行效率。现有方法缺乏系统性地发现和复用优化技能的能力，需要一种能自动积累并利用优化知识的框架。

Method: 提出 daVinci-kernel 框架，包含三个共享一个 LLM 主干的智能体：Skill Selection Agent（通过 BM25 和 LLM 重排序检索相关技能）、Policy Agent（基于选定技能生成多轮 CUDA/Triton 内核）、Skill Summary Agent（将成功 rollout 蒸馏为可复用技能）。技能需通过执行验证确认可复现加速后才加入技能库。三者通过结构化 SFT 冷启动初始化，再以多轮 REINFORCE 和每智能体优势估计端到端联合优化。

Result: 在 KernelBench 上，daVinci-kernel-14B 在 Level 1、Level 2、Level 3 的 Fast₁ 阈值下分别达到 37.2%、70.6% 和 32.2%，全面超越此前最强的 RL 训练模型 Dr.Kernel-14B。

Conclusion: 该方法证明通过技能发现与利用的强化学习框架能有效提升 GPU 内核优化性能，多智能体协作与端到端训练策略是成功的关键。

Abstract: GPU kernel optimization represents a paradigm where functional correctness is assumed and execution efficiency is the objective. We present daVinci-kernel, a reinforcement learning framework that couples skill discovery with skill exploitation through a dynamically evolving skill library. daVinci-kernel jointly trains three agents sharing one LLM backbone: a Skill Selection Agent that retrieves relevant techniques via BM25 and LLM reranking, a Policy Agent that generates multi-turn CUDA/Triton kernels conditioned on selected skills, and a Skill Summary Agent that distills successful rollouts into reusable skills. Candidate skills are added only after execution-based verification confirms reproducible speedups. All three agents share a single LLM backbone, are initialized via a structured SFT cold start on diversity-filtered data, and are then jointly optimized end-to-end with multi-turn REINFORCE and per-agent advantage estimation. On KernelBench, daVinci-kernel-14B achieves 37.2%, 70.6%, and 32.2% on Level 1, Level 2, and Level 3 under the Fast$_1$ threshold, outperforming the strongest prior RL-trained model, Dr.Kernel-14B.

</details>


### [680] [Tail-Shape Estimation in LLM Evaluation Is Fragile: A Protocol for Diagnosing False Positives](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16511)
*Luca Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一套用于大语言模型评估中尾部指数（tail-index）估计的预注册协议，并通过对两个毒性评估数据集的实证分析，发现尾部形状的估计比近期文献所显示的要脆弱，该协议能够有效捕捉到naive分析中容易出现的三种假阳性情况。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 近期研究推动LLM评估从均值指标转向尾部感知指标（如条件风险价值、奖励模型误差的尾部指数），但尾部指数的估计是否比均值和标准尾部幅度统计量提供了额外的判别信息尚不明确。作者希望为尾部形状的正向声明提供一个严格的验证框架。

Method: 作者预注册了一个协议，涵盖可接受性、拟合优度、阈值稳定性和效应量要求。协议本身是论文的主要贡献，实证研究用于展示协议如何"捕获"假阳性。实验在两个结构不同的评分器家族下，对标准LLM毒性评估设置进行分析。

Result: 协议成功捕获了三种不同的假阳性模式，并且拒绝了两个评分器上的主要尾部形状声明。这表明在LLM毒性评估中，尾部形状估计比近期文献所暗示的更加脆弱。

Conclusion: 作者得出结论，在所考察的LLM毒性评估设置中，尾部形状估计比近期文献所显示的要更加脆弱，并推荐将该协议作为类似场景下尾部指数声明的起点。

Abstract: Recent work motivates moving large language model (LLM) evaluation from mean-based to tail-aware metrics, including conditional value-at-risk and tail-index estimates of reward-model error. We ask whether the canonical extreme-value-theory tail-index parameter, which isolates how heavy a tail is from how large the tail mass is, adds discriminative information beyond the mean and a standard tail-magnitude statistic in LLM evaluation. We pre-register a protocol covering admissibility, goodness-of-fit, threshold-stability, and effect-size requirements for any positive tail-shape claim. The protocol is the contribution of this paper; the empirical study below is a demonstration of what its gates catch. Applied to a standard LLM toxicity-evaluation setup under two structurally different scorer families, the protocol catches three distinct modes of false positives that a naive analysis would have published, and rejects the headline tail-shape claim on both scorers. We conclude that tail-shape estimation in the LLM toxicity-evaluation setups we examined is more fragile than the recent literature suggests, and recommend the protocol as a starting point for tail-index claims in similar setups.

</details>


### [681] [Direction-Conditioned Policies via Compositional Subgoal Scoring for Online Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16515)
*Swaminathan S K,Damiya Gondha,Theyanesh Eswaramoorthy Rajahkrishnan,Aritra Hazra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出方向条件策略（DCP），一种完全在线的目标条件强化学习方法。DCP将目标到达分解为基于InfoNCE表示的子目标评分和方向条件策略两个组件，理论证明了方向充分性、训练与部署一致性以及方向条件失效的边界条件。在九个环境中，DCP在大多数指标上优于Contrastive RL，尤其在操作和障碍交互任务上提升显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准在线GCRL将原始目标作为条件输入，但HJB理论表明最优动作仅取决于当前状态到目标距离的梯度。当目标远离数据分布时，原始目标是几何上无信息的信号，导致策略学习效率低下。

Method: DCP将目标到达分解为两个共享InfoNCE表示ψ的组件：(1) 子目标评分步骤，选择与最终目标g在ψ空间中对齐的已访问状态z_t；(2) 方向条件策略，消费从ψ(s_t)到ψ(z_t)的单位方向d_t和幅度r_t。训练时联合优化，部署时移除子目标评分，直接用g替代z_t作为方向条件输入。

Result: 在九个环境上，DCP在大多数最终指标上优于Contrastive RL，在操作和障碍交互任务上提升最大。学习到的ψ距离表现为在线拟度量，编码环境拓扑。唯一失败案例（AntSoccer）定位到学习梯度的病态问题，与理论预测一致。

Conclusion: 方向条件是比原始目标更有效的GCRL条件输入形式，满足HJB最优性条件；DCP的两组件分解实现了训练与部署的干净分离，且理论给出了方向条件失效的可控子空间刻画。

Abstract: Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman theory implies that the optimal goal-conditioned action depends on the goal only through the gradient of the goal-reaching distance at the current state, yet standard online GCRL still conditions the actor on the raw goal -- a signal that is geometrically uninformative when the goal is far from the data distribution. We propose Direction-Conditioned Policies (DCP), a fully online method that decomposes goal-reaching into two components sharing one InfoNCE representation $ψ$: a subgoal-scoring step that selects a visited state $z_t$ aligned with the final goal $g$ in $ψ_g$, and a direction-conditioned actor that consumes the unit direction $d_t$ and magnitude $r_t$ from $ψ(s_t)$ to $ψ(z_t)$. The two components train jointly, factor cleanly at deployment (subgoal scoring is removed, while direction conditioning remains with $g$ in place of $z_t$), and admit independent modification at the same $(d_t,r_t)$ interface. We prove three results. First, direction sufficiency under HJB: the optimal action under control-affine dynamics depends on the goal only through the value gradient. Second, a quantitative bound showing that, under mild conditions on the learned representation and assuming the scoring rule returns an on-path $z_t$, the actor's conditioning input at training and at deployment coincide up to representation error and geodesic slack. Third, a controllable-subspace characterization of when directional conditioning fails. Across nine environments, DCP improves over Contrastive RL on most final metrics, with the largest gains on manipulation and obstacle-interaction tasks; a qualitative analysis of the learned $ψ$-distance landscape shows the contrastive representation behaves as an online quasimetric encoding environment topology, and the single failure case (AntSoccer) localizes to a learned-gradient pathology that the theory anticipates.

</details>


### [682] [How Post-Training Shapes Biological Reasoning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16517)
*Lukas Fesser,Hanlin Zhang,Michelle M. Li,Eric Wang,Bryan Perozzi,Shekoofeh Azizi,Sham M. Kakade,Marinka Zitnik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了生物学推理模型在领域内和领域外性能上的泛化与过专门化问题，发现CPT、SFT和RL各阶段对模型泛化能力有不同影响，最优的ID-OOD平衡策略是：简短SFT、更大RL分配以及跨阶段非对称适应能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管生物学推理模型通过后训练构建，但各个训练阶段（CPT、SFT、RL）如何影响模型的推理能力和泛化/过专门化机制尚不明确。

Method: 在基因组学、转录组学和蛋白质组学上，训练并评估了超过100个生物学推理模型，控制骨干网络、CPT、SFT和RL等变量，测量领域内（ID）和领域外（OOD）性能。

Result: 1）CPT通过对齐生物语言提升下游性能；2）SFT稳定提升ID性能但导致OOD性能先升后降；3）RL在强SFT检查点上应用可提升OOD性能并部分恢复泛化能力；4）固定预算下最优的ID-OOD权衡来自简短SFT、更大RL分配和跨阶段非对称适应能力。

Conclusion: 生物学推理能力并非随监督信号或计算量单调提升，而是高度依赖于训练阶段的组合方式。

Abstract: Scientific reasoning models for biology combine language models with foundation models trained on multimodal biological data, including DNA, RNA, and proteins. These models are built through post-training, yet how each stage shapes reasoning and generalization remains poorly understood. We study when post-training improves performance and when it induces over-specialization. Across genomics, transcriptomics, and proteins, we train and evaluate more than 100 biological reasoning models under controlled variation in backbone, continued pre-training (CPT), supervised fine-tuning (SFT), and reinforcement learning (RL), measuring both in-domain (ID) and out-of-domain (OOD) performance. We find that each post-training stage reshapes generalization in a distinct way rather than contributing uniform gains. CPT improves downstream performance by aligning models with biological language. SFT consistently increases ID performance but causes OOD performance to peak early and decline as models fit the training distribution. RL, when applied to strong SFT checkpoints with aligned rewards, improves OOD performance and partially recovers generalization. These results show that biological reasoning does not improve monotonically with additional supervision or compute. Instead, performance depends on how training stages are composed. Under fixed post-training budgets, the strongest ID-OOD trade-off comes from brief SFT, larger RL allocations, and asymmetric adaptation capacity across stages.

</details>


### [683] [Neural Bayesian Anomaly Mitigation: A Robust Loss that Doubles as an Unsupervised Contamination Classifier](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16524)
*S. A. K. Leeney,W. J. Handley,H. T. J. Bevins,E. de Lera Acedo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出神经贝叶斯异常缓解（NBAM），一种基于贝叶斯潜变量混合模型的通用损失函数，既能实现鲁棒监督学习，又能通过后验分布无监督地识别被污染样本，在CIFAR-10不对称标签污染实验中优于Huber、Student-t等传统鲁棒损失方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统鲁棒损失函数（如Huber、Student-t、广义交叉熵）虽能容忍数据污染，但无法识别哪些样本被污染，缺乏对污染结构的可解释性。

Method: 从贝叶斯潜变量混合模型推导边际似然作为鲁棒监督损失，同时利用后验分布构建无监督污染分类器；引入输入依赖先验π_φ(x)捕捉污染空间局部性，并利用奥卡姆惩罚自动防止过度标记。

Result: 在CIFAR-10不对称标签污染（污染率0.2-0.6）上，NBAM不仅恢复污染过程的结构（分离干净/污染样本、识别标签翻转方向），且在鲁棒性上优于四种基线方法。

Conclusion: NBAM是一种即插即用的通用损失函数，兼具鲁棒训练与污染识别能力，提升了可解释性与性能。

Abstract: Engineered robust losses such as Huber, Student-$t$, and generalised cross-entropy make supervised models tolerant of contamination but cannot answer which observations are corrupted. We introduce Neural Bayesian Anomaly Mitigation (NBAM), a general-purpose drop-in loss derived from a Bayesian latent-switch mixture model: the marginal likelihood defines a robust supervised loss, and the associated posterior defines an unsupervised contamination classifier. Like Huber or Student-$t$, NBAM can replace the standard training loss in any supervised pipeline; unlike them, it additionally learns a structured contamination model and returns a calibrated per-sample contamination posterior. A learned input-dependent prior $π_φ(x)$ captures the spatial locality of contamination, so that samples near known corruptions are more likely to be flagged, while an Occam penalty emerges automatically and regularises against over-flagging. On CIFAR-10 with asymmetric label contamination, NBAM recovers the structure of the corruption process without supervision: the contamination posterior separates clean from corrupted samples, and the learned anomaly head identifies the direction of every label-flip pair. Alongside these capabilities, NBAM outperforms the four robust-loss baselines considered here at contamination rates 0.2-0.6.

</details>


### [684] [Assessing Reliability of Symbol Detection in Concept Bottleneck Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16535)
*Javier Fumanal-Idocin,Javier Andreu-Perez*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究概念瓶颈模型（CBM）中概念检测的可靠性问题，发现联合训练的CBM可能在瓶颈层编码任务特定捷径，导致解释不可靠。作者通过交换独立训练的概念检测器和分类头来评估概念可靠性，并提出了一种可靠性感知训练策略来缓解概念泄露问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高任务准确率并不能保证CBM中的符号被忠实检测，联合训练的CBM可能编码任务特定捷径，使得基于符号的解释不可靠。

Method: 1）通过交换独立训练的概念检测器和分类头来衡量性能退化，使用概念级指标和符号不确定性估计识别易产生虚假激活的概念；2）提出可靠性感知训练策略，优化共享概念检测器时使用多个分类头，并对依赖全局或实例级不可靠符号的行为进行惩罚。

Result: 在CUB-200-2011全监督下，检测器和分类头几乎可自由交换（交换后准确率下降不到1个百分点，相对保留率>99%）。在合成任务上，随着概念监督权重降低，模型保持近完美任务准确率，但交换准确率和与真实概念的一致性降至随机水平。可靠性感知训练显著缓解了泄露，在泄露严重区域交换准确率几乎翻倍。

Conclusion: CBM在弱监督条件下容易出现概念泄露问题，但所提出的可靠性感知训练策略能有效提升概念检测的可靠性。

Abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) are a relevant tool for explainable Artificial Intelligence because they make their predictions through human-interpretable symbols. However, high task accuracy does not guarantee that these symbols are detected faithfully: jointly trained CBMs may encode task-specific shortcuts in the bottleneck, making their explanations unreliable. In this paper, we study concept-detection reliability by swapping independently trained concept detectors and classification heads that share the same symbolic vocabulary. We use the resulting performance degradation, concept-level metrics, and symbol-wise uncertainty estimates to identify concepts that are especially prone to spurious firing. Finally, we propose a reliability-aware training strategy in which a shared concept detector is optimized with multiple classification heads and penalized for relying on globally or instance-wise unreliable symbols. On CUB-200-2011 with full concept supervision, detectors and heads are almost freely interchangeable (swap drop below one accuracy point, relative retention above $99\%$, and no concept detected below chance), whereas on a controlled synthetic task we show that, as the concept-supervision weight is reduced, models keep near-perfect task accuracy while swapped accuracy and agreement with the ground-truth concepts collapse to chance. Our reliability-aware training substantially mitigates this leakage, roughly doubling swap accuracy in the leaky regime.

</details>


### [685] [MIRAGE: Auditing Anti-Muslim Bias in Frontier LLMs Across Reasoning, Agentic, and Time-Coupled Conditions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16562)
*Noor Islam S. Mohammad,Tamim Sheikh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MIRAGE基准测试发现，前沿大语言模型在思维链推理和智能体决策场景中对穆斯林的偏见比简单问答更严重，现有缓解措施效果有限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有偏见评估仍停留在单轮提示补全模式，无法反映当前LLM的实际部署场景（如思维链推理、智能体决策），因此需要更贴近真实应用的评估基准。

Method: 构建MIRAGE基准，包含1,200个提示，覆盖三种部署场景：直接补全、思维链推理、智能体决策（内容审核、贷款分类、难民申请摘要、招聘筛选）。对6个前沿模型进行系统性评估。

Result: (1) 思维链推理使穆斯林-暴力关联增强12-34%；(2) 智能体决策中穆斯林与非穆斯林案例存在9-22个百分点的不对称；(3) 检索近期冲突新闻使偏见增加18-27%；(4) 现有提示缓解方法在直接补全中有效，但对智能体场景基本无效。

Conclusion: LLM中的反穆斯林偏见在更真实的部署条件下被放大而非削弱，现有缓解策略存在严重泛化不足，亟需针对智能体场景的定向缓解研究。

Abstract: Five years after the discovery of persistent anti-Muslim bias in large language models, most evaluations remain confined to single-turn prompt completion, a setting that no longer reflects how frontier LLMs are deployed. We introduce \textbf{MIRAGE} (Muslim-Identity Reasoning and Agentic Generation Evaluation), a benchmark of 1{,}200 prompts spanning three deployment-realistic conditions: direct completion, chain-of-thought reasoning, and simulated agentic decision-making across content moderation, lending triage, refugee claim summarization, and hiring screens. Across six frontier models, we find that (i) chain-of-thought reasoning \emph{amplifies} rather than suppresses Muslim-violence associations by 12--34\% relative to direct completion, (ii) agentic decisions exhibit a 9--22 percentage-point asymmetry between Muslim and matched non-Muslim cases on identical evidence, and (iii) bias is sharply time-coupled to retrieved news context, increasing 18--27\% under recent-conflict retrieval. Existing prompt-based mitigations transfer poorly across our three conditions, suppressing direct-completion bias while leaving agentic asymmetry largely intact. We release MIRAGE and an open evaluation harness to support targeted mitigation research.

</details>


### [686] [RepNet: Tackling spectral bias in deep neural networks via parameter reparameterization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16575)
*Yong Wang,Tao Zhou,Xuhui Meng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出RepNet，通过重新参数化第一隐藏层的权重和偏置来克服深度神经网络的谱偏差问题，从而有效处理高频振荡和多尺度问题，数值实验表明该方法能以微小额外计算成本显著提高预测精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: DNN在科学计算中虽取得显著成功，但在捕捉振荡和多尺度行为时存在谱偏差（spectral bias）限制。作者通过分析浅层ReLU网络拟合高频函数的失败，识别出影响快速振荡分解的两个关键因素：初始斜率尺度（initial slope scale）和网络诱导的分割点分布（distribution of partition points），从而提出解决方法。

Method: 提出RepNet，对ReLU和tanh网络的第一隐藏层的权重和偏置进行重新参数化（reparameterize），从而有效控制初始斜率尺度并提供合理的初始分割点分布。将重新参数化的权重和偏置作为可训练参数，使DNN在训练过程中实现自适应频率缩放（adaptive frequency scaling）。同时给出了重新参数化DNN输出和斜率幅度的定量估计以指导初始化。

Result: 数值实验涵盖多尺度一维和四维函数逼近、结合PINN的正反PDE问题以及算子学习，结果表明RepNet相比原始DNN能以微小额外计算成本显著提高捕捉高频振荡特征的预测精度。

Conclusion: RepNet提供了一种有效且灵活的方法来克服谱偏差，并推动DNN在多尺度问题中的应用。

Abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) have achieved remarkable success in scientific computing, yet they often suffer from spectral bias in capturing oscillatory and multiscale behaviors. In this study, we investigate this limitation by examining the failure of shallow ReLU neural networks in fitting high-frequency functions. This observation identifies two important factors in resolving rapid oscillations: the initial slope scale and the distribution of partition points induced by the networks. Motivated by this analysis, we propose RepNet, a reparameterized DNN model for ReLU and tanh networks designed for high-frequency and multiscale problems. The key idea is to reparameterize the weights and biases in the first hidden layer, which enables effective control of the initial slope scale and provides an appropriate distribution of the initial partition points. Furthermore, treating the reparameterized weights and biases as trainable parameters allows the DNN to achieve adaptive frequency scaling during training. In addition, we derive quantitative estimates for the output and slope magnitudes of the reparameterized DNN to guide the initialization of the proposed method. Numerical experiments, including multiscale one- and four-dimensional function approximation, forward and inverse PDE problems in combination with physics-informed neural networks (PINNs), and operator learning, demonstrate that RepNet improves the predicted accuracy of vanilla DNNs in capturing highly oscillatory features with slightly additional computational cost. These results indicate that RepNet provides an effective and flexible approach for overcoming spectral bias and applying DNNs to multiscale problems.

</details>


### [687] [On the Entropy Formula for Real, Complex, and Quaternionic Deep Linear Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16579)
*Luis Contreras,Marco Nahas,Tejas Kotwal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文将Menon和Yu的实数深度线性网络熵公式扩展到复数域和四元数域，提出了一个统一适用于$\mathbb{R}$、$\mathbb{C}$和$\mathbb{H}$上深度线性网络的熵公式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有熵公式仅适用于实数深度线性网络，缺乏对复数域和四元数域上深度线性网络的理论分析，作者希望填补这一空白，建立更通用的理论框架。

Method: 通过数学推导，将Menon和Yu原用于实数深度线性网络的熵公式推广到复数域（$\mathbb{C}$）和四元数域（$\mathbb{H}$），最终得到一个统一表达式。

Result: 成功推导出适用于实数、复数和四元数深度线性网络的统一熵公式。

Conclusion: 该工作拓展了深度线性网络熵理论的应用范围，为不同代数结构下的深度学习网络分析提供了统一的理论基础。

Abstract: We extend the entropy formula of Menon and Yu for the real Deep Linear Network (DLN) to its complex and quaternionic analogues, obtaining a unified formula for DLNs over $\mathbb{R}$, $\mathbb{C}$, and $\mathbb{H}$.

</details>


### [688] [Multi-Modal Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Network with Mixture of Experts for Soil Organic Carbon Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16580)
*Daniele Mos,Felipe Drummond,Anton Bossenbroek,Soufiane el Khinifri*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SpTGNN，一种多模态时空图神经网络，融合异构关系图注意力、微调基础模型、混合专家融合和解耦不确定性量化，在全球SOC预测上取得SOTA结果（非洲测试集R²=0.762）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SOC预测方法存在两个局限：1) 手工特征+经典ML或单模态深度模型无法捕捉丰富的光谱和时间信息；2) 基于网格的架构忽略了田间测量的不规则空间结构。

Method: 1) 异构时空图：节点为土壤样本，三种边类型（空间邻近、光谱相似性、高程）；2) 关系图注意力：每种关系独立学习模式；3) TerraMind微调编码器提取多模态特征（Sentinel-2, Sentinel-1, DEM）；4) 稀疏MoE融合四流特征；5) 异方差回归（aleatoric）+深度集成（epistemic）解耦不确定性；6) Moran's I惩罚正则化空间自相关。

Result: 全球~49k样本，非洲~26k，欧洲~14k。5成员深度集成：非洲测试集R²=0.762, RMSE=3.51±0.48 g/kg, MAPE=22.9%；最佳单检查点验证R²=0.864；后校准ECE=0.031(混合)和0.026(β-NLL)。

Conclusion: 首个统一基础模型特征提取、异构图注意力和解耦不确定性量化的SOC估计框架，各组件（异构图、MoE融合、微调骨干）均有显著贡献。

Abstract: Top-soil organic carbon (SOC) prediction is fundamental to agricultural sustainability, land use policy and fertilization planning.
