Existing approaches face two limitations: they pair hand-crafted covariates with classical ML or single-modal deep models that miss rich spectral and temporal information, and grid-based architectures ignore the irregular spatial structure of field measurements. We introduce SpTGNN, a multi-modal spatio-temporal graph neural network addressing both. SpTGNN represents soil measurements as nodes in a heterogeneous graph with three edge types (spatial proximity, spectral similarity, elevation), and applies relational graph attention to learn separate patterns per relation. A fine-tuned TerraMind encoder extracts node features from Sentinel-2, Sentinel-1 and DEM signals, combined with per-sample environmental covariates and learned positional and temporal embeddings. A sparse Mixture-of-Experts module fuses the four streams via top-$k$ routing. Uncertainty is captured by pairing heteroscedastic regression (aleatoric) with deep ensembles (epistemic), and a Moran's $I$ penalty regularizes spatial autocorrelation. We evaluate on a global SOC corpus split into three regional instances ($\sim$49k samples globally, Africa $\sim$26k, Europe $\sim$14k). Our 5-member deep ensemble reports $R^2=0.762$, RMSE $=3.51\pm0.48$ g/kg and MAPE $=22.9\%$ on the Africa test split, improving over a tabular XGBoost baseline; the best single checkpoint reaches validation $R^2=0.864$. Ablations confirm the heterogeneous graph, MoE fusion and fine-tuned backbone each contribute substantively, and the ensemble UQ stack achieves post-calibration ECE of $0.031$ (hybrid) and $0.026$ ($β$-NLL). To our knowledge, this is the first framework to unify foundation-model feature extraction, heterogeneous graph attention and decomposed uncertainty quantification for SOC estimation.

</details>


### [689] [Infant Spontaneous Movement Noise Improves Exploration in Deep RL](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16590)
*Francisco M. López,Markus R. Ernst,Francisco Cruz,Matej Hoffmann,and Jochen Triesch*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文受婴儿自发运动启发，提出一种在深度强化学习中逐步增加探索噪声时间自相关性的方法，实验表明该婴儿启发式噪声能提升学习效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度强化学习探索多使用时间不相关的白噪声，而近期研究表明时间相关的有色噪声可提升探索效率。受婴儿自发运动随年龄增长其功率谱密度斜率变化的启发，作者探索能否将婴儿运动模式引入RL探索噪声设计。

Method: 测量婴儿末端速度的功率谱密度，发现其随年龄增长呈现不同的有色噪声特征（谱指数增大）。据此设计一种在RL训练过程中逐步增加探索噪声时间自相关性的机制，匹配婴儿发育的统计模式。

Result: 在多个RL环境中，婴儿启发式噪声产生了结构化的探索行为，相比传统探索策略提升了学习效率。

Conclusion: 人类运动和认知发展可为人工智能体的学习机制设计提供有益指导。

Abstract: Exploration in deep reinforcement learning (RL) is commonly implemented as temporally uncorrelated white noise. However, recent works show that temporally correlated colored noise can improve exploration efficiency by producing smooth trajectories with better coverage of the state space. We inquire whether action noise inspired by infant spontaneous movements can also improve exploration in deep RL. We find that the power spectral densities of babies' end-effector velocities follow a colored noise process where the spectral exponent increases with age. Inspired by this developmental pattern, we introduce a mechanism that progressively increases the temporal auto-correlation of exploration noise during RL training, matching the infant statistics. Experiments across several RL environments show that infant-inspired noise produces structured exploratory behavior and can improve learning efficiency compared to conventional exploration strategies. These findings suggest that human motor and cognitive development can provide useful guidance for designing learning mechanisms in artificial agents. Our code is available at https://github.com/trieschlab/baby-noise-rl.

</details>


### [690] [PhysGuard: Fisher-Guided Gradient Projection for Sim-to-Real Neural PDE Surrogates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16602)
*Changjian Zhou,Junfeng Fang,Negin Yousefpour,Peng Wu,Bin Yan,Guillermo A Narsilio*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PhysGuard提出了一种物理保持的微调框架，通过Fisher信息矩阵识别对物理结构关键的参数方向，限制微调更新在不干扰这些方向的子空间内，从而在少量真实数据下实现神经算子的模拟到现实迁移，在严重域偏移下可将低频误差降低高达32%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经算子模型在模拟数据上训练后，应用于实验测量数据时因模拟-现实差距而导致精度下降。标准微调虽能缩小差距，但可能破坏预训练中习得的关键物理表示。现有知识保持方法多面向视觉或语言任务，不适用于神经算子这种需保护核心尺度物理结构的场景。

Method: PhysGuard利用模拟数据计算经验Fisher信息矩阵，识别对物理结构关键的参数方向；通过逐层Gram矩阵公式实现高效计算（支持百万参数模型）；采用自适应阈值自动确定受保护子空间大小；微调时仅更新与关键方向不冲突的参数方向。

Result: 在四种神经算子架构和不同物理系统上，PhysGuard在大多数评估指标上优于基线方法。在严重域偏移下，相比标准微调可降低最多32%的低频误差，同时保持适应性。光谱探针实验表明，主导Fisher方向与低频输出结构强相关。

Conclusion: PhysGuard是一种有效的物理保持迁移学习框架，特别适用于神经算子在模拟-现实差距大的场景下的适应，能保护核心物理结构不被破坏。

Abstract: Neural operator models trained on simulation data often lose accuracy when applied to experimental measurements due to the sim-to-real gap. Standard fine-tuning with limited real data can reduce this gap, but it may also damage the core physics-relevant representations learned during pretraining. Although knowledge-preserving adaptation has been widely investigated in vision or language tasks, it remains unclear whether these methods are suitable for neural operators whose architectures and protected knowledge are fundamentally different. Neural operators need to preserve core-scale physical structures rather than semantic or visual features. We propose PhysGuard, a physics-preserving framework for accurate sim-to-real adaptation of neural operators. Specifically, PhysGuard uses the empirical Fisher Information Matrix computed on simulation data to identify physics-critical parameter directions, then restricts fine-tuning updates to directions that do not interfere with them. A layer-wise Gram-matrix formulation makes this efficient for models with millions of parameters, while an adaptive threshold automatically determines the protected subspace size. A spectral probe experiment shows that the dominant Fisher directions are strongly associated with low-frequency output structures. Experiments on benchmark across four neural operator architectures and different physical systems show that PhysGuard performs strongly on most evaluation metrics compared to baselines. The benefits are most evident under severe domain shift, where it reduces low-frequency error by up to 32\% compared to standard fine-tuning while maintaining adaptability. Our code is available at https://github.com/ZhouChaunge/PhysGuard.

</details>


### [691] [Multimodal Evaluator Preference Collapse: Cross-Modal Contagion in Self-Evolving Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16682)
*Zewen Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现了多模态场景下的"评估者偏好坍缩"（EPC）现象比纯文本自评估严重3.2倍（单一策略占据48.4%权重），并首次提出"跨模态传染"——某一模态上习得的评估者偏好会扭曲另一模态的策略选择。通过四阶段隔离训练范式，发现跨模型评估（GPT-4o）产生对称双向传染，而自评估（DeepSeek-chat）具有近完全的免疫性（97%零传染）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究已发现AI agent使用语言模型自我评估时存在系统性偏差，但尚无工作探究多模态场景下这种偏差是否被放大，以及不同模态之间的偏好是否会相互污染。

Method: 设计了四阶段隔离训练范式：使用GPT-4o评估DeepSeek-chat，覆盖文本和视觉任务；测量跨模态传染系数；比较四种评估配置（跨模型、高轮数、自评估等），共53次独立重复（15,592次API调用）。

Result: (1) 单策略step_by_step吸收48.4%权重，是纯文本的3.2倍；(2) 跨模态传染存在，且跨模型评估产生对称双向传染（d=0.29）；(3) 高轮数导致70%零传染的单策略主导；(4) 自评估97%的试次零传染，近乎完全免疫；(5) 所有评估条件均无显著的定向不对称性。

Conclusion: 跨模型评估架构是偏好传染的主要风险因素，而自评估具有免疫力；作者发布了MM-EPC实验框架，并提出以评估者身份为索引的传染矩阵。

Abstract: When AI agents use language models to evaluate their own outputs in a feedback loop, systematic biases emerge. We show that Evaluator Preference Collapse (EPC) is dramatically amplified in multimodal settings. Using GPT-4o to evaluate DeepSeek-chat across text and visual tasks, we find that a single strategy (step_by_step) absorbs 48.4% of all weight -- 3.2x the collapse observed in text-only self-evaluation -- while three visual-domain strategies receive only 9.1% combined weight. We then demonstrate a novel phenomenon we term cross-modal contagion: evaluator preferences acquired on one modality transfer to and corrupt strategy selection on another. Through a four-phase isolation training paradigm, we measure contagion coefficients and document strategy inversion -- the optimal strategy for a modality reverses after cross-modal exposure. A Phase 3 statistical validation across four evaluator configurations (N=53 total independent repetitions, 15,592 API calls) reveals a clear hierarchy: cross-model evaluation (GPT-4o, N=8) produces strong but symmetric bidirectional contagion (mean gamma_{T->V}=1.176, gamma_{V->T}=1.089, Delta=-0.088, p=0.575, Cohen's d=0.29); high round counts (DashScope, 50 rounds) cause collapse to single-strategy dominance (70% zero contagion); and self-evaluation provides near-complete immunity -- 97% of runs (N=30, DeepSeek-chat) yield exactly zero contagion (mean gamma=0.033, 95% CI [-0.031, 0.010], p=0.642, d=0.07). No evaluator condition shows statistically significant directional asymmetry. We introduce the contagion matrix indexed by evaluator identity, release the MM-EPC experimental framework, and identify cross-model evaluator architecture as the primary risk factor for preference contagion.

</details>


### [692] [TCHG: Tri-Trust Conditioned Heterogeneous Graph Learning for Reliable Dynamic Trust Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16611)
*Bohao Liao,Boyu Deng,Qipeng Song,Jieling Wang,Jingchao Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TCHG框架，将信任证据分解为三个通道（实体可靠性、交互行为可靠性、上下文信任）并赋予不同功能角色，通过异构图学习实现更有效的信任预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将信任信号统一表示，未能将异构信任证据解耦为独立通道，无法利用不同证据通道在信任建模中的独特作用。

Method: 提出TCHG框架，将信任证据分为三通道：实体可靠性控制信息准入、交互行为可靠性调制传播强度、上下文信任通过条件算子选择调整传播模式。同时采用非均匀衰减的独立时间状态，并引入概率校准机制。

Result: 在多个公开信任数据集上，TCHG相较于代表性信任预测方法和异构图基线方法取得了更有效且可靠的信任预测结果。

Conclusion: 信任证据应当被分解为具有不同功能角色的通道进行建模，而非统一处理；TCHG通过三通道异构图学习框架有效提升了信任预测的准确性和可靠性。

Abstract: Trust prediction infers latent user-user trust relations and provides important support for social recommendation, fake-review and manipulation detection, and risk identification. Graph neural networks have become a prominent approach to trust prediction because of their ability to learn network structures and complex trust dependencies. However, existing methods often rely on a unified representation of trust signals and do not disentangle heterogeneous trust evidence into separate evidence channels, failing to exploit the distinct roles that different evidence channels should play during trust modeling. To address this gap, this paper argues that trust evidence should not be treated as an undifferentiated input, but should be decomposed and used as functional control factors over graph propagation. We propose TCHG, a tri-trust conditioned heterogeneous graph learning framework that decomposes trust evidence into three channels and assigns them distinct functional roles in propagation: entity reliability governs message admission, interaction-behavior reliability modulates propagation strength, and contextual trust adjusts the propagation mode through context-conditioned operator selection. Since the three evidence channels evolve at different temporal scales, TCHG maintains independent temporal states with non-uniform decay rates to prevent rapidly changing contextual signals from overwriting slowly accumulated entity reliability. It further predicts trust probability and calibrates the output probability, improving predictive confidence under sparse or conflicting evidence. Extensive experiments on multiple public trust datasets show that TCHG achieves effective and reliable trust prediction compared with representative trust prediction and heterogeneous graph baselines.

</details>


### [693] [Entropy-Gated Latent Recursion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16620)
*Soham Bhattacharjee,Dushyant Singh Chauhan,Salem Lahlou,Martin Takac,Nils Lukas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出EGLR方法，通过递归重用冻结模型的高层解码器层（层跨度L）作为一种确定性、与温度采样正交的新推理扩展轴，与温度采样结合形成L×T笛卡尔采样空间，在数学推理任务上显著超越单一轴（温度或层）的oracle性能，为推理时扩展提供了不依赖随机噪声的新方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有推理时扩展方法仅依赖随机token级采样（温度）这一单一轴来生成多样化rollout，这种单轴采样空间存在根本性局限。作者希望寻找一个互补的、确定性的新轴来扩展采样多样性。

Method: 提出Entropy-Gated Latent Recursion (EGLR)，一种无需训练的解码过程。在模型冻结的情况下，对于高不确定性的token，递归重用其顶部L个解码器层，最多迭代Kmax次直到next-token分布收敛。不同的L选择可产生不同的rollout，且完全不需要随机性。

Result: 在8个指令微调模型和6个数学推理基准上进行实验。在MATH-500上使用Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct，联合L×T oracle达到91.6%，比纯温度oracle（83.4%）高8.2个百分点，比纯层oracle（81.2%）高10.4个百分点。两个轴捕获了真正互补的问题。

Conclusion: EGLR将单轴随机rollout池扩展为L×T笛卡尔采样空间，且几乎不增加每个rollout的成本。扩展后的rollout池能为任何下游流程（self-consistency、best-of-N、GRPO等）提供更丰富的候选方案，开辟了不依赖随机噪声的推理时扩展新方向。

Abstract: Inference-time scaling has become the dominant lever for improving language-model reasoning, but existing methods derive rollout diversity from a single source: stochastic token-level sampling. We argue that this single-axis sampling space is fundamentally limiting, and identify a second, fully deterministic and complementary axis: the layer span $L$ at which a frozen model's top decoder layers are recursively re-applied at high-uncertainty tokens. Different choices of $L$ produce distinct rollouts that solve different subsets of problems, with no stochasticity. We instantiate this axis through Entropy-Gated Latent Recursion (EGLR), a training-free decoding procedure that re-applies the top-$L$ layers for at most $K_{\max}$ iterations until the next-token distribution converges. Combined with $T$ temperature samples, EGLR turns a single-axis stochastic rollout pool into an $L\times T$ Cartesian sampling space at almost the same per-rollout cost. We characterize this space across $8$ instruction-tuned models and $6$ math reasoning benchmarks, and show that the $L$-axis is genuinely complementary to temperature: on MATH-500 with Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct, the joint $L\times T$ oracle reaches $91.6\%$, $+8.2$ percentage points beyond the temperature-only oracle ($83.4\%$) and $+10.4$ points beyond the layer-only oracle ($81.2\%$), confirming that the two axes capture genuinely complementary problems. The expanded rollout pool provides richer per-prompt candidates for any downstream procedure that consumes rollouts, including self-consistency, best-of-$N$ with verifiers, and group-relative RL training (GRPO), opening a new direction for inference-time scaling that does not rely on stochastic noise.

</details>


### [694] [SPICE: Synergy and Partial Information Based Curriculum Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16639)
*Ankush Pratap Singh,Houwei Cao,Yong Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SPICE提出了一种基于部分信息分解(PID)理论的渐进式多模态课程学习框架，通过将多模态交互分解为冗余、独特和协同信息，实现样本复杂度的动态表征，并随着训练过程自适应调整样本顺序，在多个多模态基准上取得了优于传统训练和现有最优方法的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态课程学习策略通常假设样本的相对复杂度在训练过程中保持不变，无法适应模型的演化过程，导致不能充分利用多模态信息。

Method: 基于部分信息分解(PID)理论，将多模态交互分解为冗余、独特和协同信息三个分量，据此设计渐进式课程：从学习共享跨模态线索→模态特定模式→复杂协同交互。训练过程中利用PID信息估计实时更新样本排序。

Result: 在多个多模态基准上，SPICE一致优于传统训练方法和现有最优基线方法。

Conclusion: PID信息分解和自适应样本排序在多模态课程学习中非常有效，能够动态适应模型演化过程。

Abstract: Multimodal learning exploits complementary information across heterogeneous modalities. The informativeness of each modality can vary widely across samples and training stages. Existing multimodal curriculum learning strategies often assume that the relative complexity of samples remains unchanged throughout training and therefore cannot adapt to model evolution. We propose SPICE (Synergy and Partial Information based Curriculum Evolution), a novel progressive curriculum framework for multimodal interaction learning. Guided by Partial Information Decomposition (PID) theory, our approach decomposes multimodal interactions into redundant, unique, and synergistic information components, enabling an interpretable and dynamic characterization of sample complexity. Building on this decomposition, we design a progressive curriculum that evolves throughout training, allowing the model to transition from learning shared cross-modal cues to modality-specific patterns and, finally, to complex synergistic interactions. Adapting to model evolution, sample ordering is refined in real-time using PID information estimates derived from unimodal and multimodal predictions. Experiments across multiple multimodal benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over conventional training and state-of-the-art baselines, highlighting the effectiveness of PID information decomposition and adaptive sample ordering for multimodal curriculum learning.

</details>


### [695] [MyPCBench: A Benchmark for Personally Intelligent Computer-Use Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16748)
*Lawrence Keunho Jang,Andrew Keunwoo Jang,Jing Yu Koh,Ruslan Salakhutdinov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MyPCBench 是一个用于测试计算机使用智能体作为个人助理的基准，在模拟了17个真实Web应用和完整桌面环境的Linux系统中，基于《办公室》角色Michael Scott的个人数据设置了184个任务。最佳模型Claude Opus 4.6仅完成55.4%的任务，模型在跨应用和多步骤长轨迹任务上表现最差。项目已开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有计算机使用智能体的基准测试仅在非个人化环境中评估模型，忽略了个人助理需要在用户完整数字生活（包括个人上下文、历史数据和已登录账户）中工作的现实需求，尤其是在需要登录或个人信息的真实网站任务上存在巨大评估与部署鸿沟。

Method: 构建了一个基于Linux桌面的个人化测试环境，包含17个模拟真实Web应用和完整桌面栈，以Michael Scott角色填充个人数据；从OpenClaw社区收集真实用户请求定义了184个任务；使用统一的计算机+终端工具接口评估了6个闭源和开源模型。

Result: 最佳模型Claude Opus 4.6仅完全解决55.4%的任务，是唯一超过50%的模型。模型在跨多个应用的任务和长轨迹上失败率最高，表明个性化对智能体的压力最大。

Conclusion: 当前顶尖模型在个人化计算机使用任务上表现有限，跨应用和多步骤任务仍是主要瓶颈。研究释放了环境、任务集和智能体工具，为后续研究提供了标准化的个性化评估平台。

Abstract: Current benchmarks for computer-use agents evaluate models in impersonal environments. This leaves a gap between evaluation and deployment where personal assistants are expected to work across a user's whole digital life, including their context, historical data, and logged-in accounts. This gap is widest on web tasks, where live web evaluations cannot exercise sites that require logging in or personal information, the kind of site a real personal assistant has to drive. We introduce MyPCBench, which tests computer-use agents as personal assistants on a Linux desktop populated with 17 simulated real-world web applications and a full desktop stack, all seeded for one canonical persona, Michael Scott from The Office. We define 184 tasks in this environment, each inspired by a real request drawn from the OpenClaw community, and benchmark six closed and open-weight models with a uniform computer+bash tool surface. We find that the best model, Claude Opus 4.6, fully solves 55.4\% of the tasks, the only model above 50\%. Model failures cluster on tasks that span many applications and on long trajectories, where personalization stresses an assistant the most. We release the environment, task set, and agent harness at https://mypcbench.com.

</details>


### [696] [Distribution Alignment for One-Shot Federated Learning via Optimal Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16655)
*Daniele Berardini,Vito Paolo Pastore,Vittorio Murino*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SLOT-Align 是一种无需学习的几何感知特征对齐框架，通过闭形式最优传输映射和 Bures-Wasserstein 重心，在单轮联邦学习中同时处理域偏移和标签偏移，显著提升模型准确率和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 OSFL 方法假设特征表示已对齐，或分别处理域偏移和标签偏移，无法应对两者同时存在时导致的特征表示错位问题。

Method: 使用共享冻结编码器提取紧凑特征统计量；通过 Bures-Wasserstein 重心构建全局参考；利用闭形式测地线最优传输映射对齐局部特征表示。

Result: 在多个基准、预训练骨干网络和 OSFL 方法上，SLOT-Align 一致提高了准确率和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: SLOT-Align 是一种高效、即插即用的特征对齐方法，能有效解决 OSFL 中联合域偏移和标签偏移的挑战。

Abstract: One-Shot Federated Learning (OSFL) addresses extreme communication regimes in which clients interact with the server only once, amplifying the impact of heterogeneous client data distributions. In particular, the interaction of domain shift and label shift across clients induces misaligned feature representations that cannot be corrected through iterative optimization. Existing OSFL methods rely on distillation, server-side generation or ensemble-based aggregation, but assume aligned representations or address domain and label shift separately. We introduce SLOT-Align (Single-round, Learning-free Optimal Transport Alignment), a geometry-aware feature harmonization framework for OSFL. SLOT-Align uses a shared frozen encoder to extract compact feature statistics, constructs a global reference via Bures-Wasserstein barycenters, and aligns local representations using closed-form geodesic optimal transport maps. The method is computationally efficient and can be combined with existing OSFL pipelines relying on frozen encoders without modifying their training procedures. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks, pretrained backbones, and OSFL methods show that SLOT-Align consistently improves accuracy and robustness under joint domain and label shift.

</details>


### [697] [Near-Optimal Stochastic Linear Bandits with Delay](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16656)
*Ofir Schlisselberg,Mengxiao Zhang,Yishay Mansour*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了随机线性赌博机在多种延迟反馈模型下的最优遗憾界，揭示了线性结构与延迟反馈之间的交互作用，特别是在损失相关延迟下线性赌博机比多臂赌博机本质上更困难。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对延迟反馈下线性赌博机的理解尚不充分，尤其是在延迟与损失相关时，线性结构是否会带来新的挑战尚不清楚。本文旨在系统刻画不同延迟模型下线性赌博机的遗憾界，并与多臂赌博机进行对比。

Method: 本文分别研究了三种延迟模型：(1) 损失无关延迟：延迟不依赖于实际损失，分为随机延迟和对抗延迟两种情况；(2) 损失相关延迟：延迟与损失相关；(3) 延迟作为收益模型：损失相关延迟的特例。针对每种模型给出了理论上的上界和下界分析。

Result: (1) 损失无关延迟下，延迟仅带来加性遗憾惩罚，且惩罚与维度无关；(2) 损失相关延迟下，线性赌博机的惩罚依赖于维度的平方根，显著难于多臂赌博机；(3) 延迟作为收益模型中，多臂赌博机的最优保证在线性赌博机中无法实现。

Conclusion: 本文完整刻画了延迟反馈与线性泛化之间的相互作用，明确了线性赌博机在何种延迟模型下与多臂赌博机行为一致，在何种情况下会产生本质性的新困难。

Abstract: We study stochastic linear bandits with delayed feedback under several delay models and establish near-optimal regret guarantees. Our results identify when delayed linear bandits exhibit the same qualitative behavior as multi-armed bandits (MAB), and when the linear structure creates fundamentally new challenges. Specifically, (1) for \emph{loss-independent delays}, where the delay does not depend on the realized loss (but potentially depends on the arm), we show that delays incur only an additive regret penalty. Under stochastic delays, this penalty scales with the expected delay, while under adversarial delays, it scales with the maximum number of outstanding observations. Notably, both delay penalties are dimension-free, improving upon the state-of-the-art results; (2) for \emph{loss-dependent delays}, we show that linear bandits are substantially harder than MAB: unlike in MAB, we prove matching (up to log factors) upper and lower bounds in linear bandits, whose delay penalty depends on the square root of the dimension. (3) for the \emph{delay-as-payoff model}, a special case of loss-dependent delay, we show that the optimal MAB guarantee, which depends only on the delay of the optimal arm, is also unattainable in linear bandits. Together, these results provide a sharp characterization of how delayed feedback interacts with linear generalization.

</details>


### [698] [Beyond Defensive Reporting: Machine Learning for Active Anti-Money Laundering Control in Insurance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16663)
*Dara Goldar,Geir Kjetil Ferkingstad Sandve,Martin Jullum*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次实证研究机器学习在保险理赔反洗钱中的应用。利用挪威某保险公司生产数据，训练梯度提升决策树模型检测可疑理赔。研究发现，整合保险欺诈标签可显著提升洗钱检测效果，最佳模型能在仅审查前2%-6%理赔案件时捕获近三分之二的洗钱案例，并提出了新的评估指标Budget-Weighted Capture Rate。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 保险理赔洗钱通过欺诈性赔付威胁保险公司，同时带来声誉和监管风险，但现有研究缺乏对如何主动预防此类洗钱行为的探讨。本文旨在利用机器学习帮助保险公司在赔付前标记可疑案件，实现从被动报告到主动预防的转变。

Method: 使用挪威某保险公司生产数据，训练梯度提升决策树（Gradient-Boosted Decision Tree）模型。探索不同学习设置，包括是否利用保险欺诈标签作为辅助训练信号。提出Budget-Weighted Capture Rate指标评估在有限手动审查预算下捕获洗钱案例的能力。

Result: 整合欺诈相关调查标签显著提升洗钱检测性能。最佳模型在前2%至6%的理赔案件中捕获近三分之二的洗钱案例。

Conclusion: 这是首个关于保险理赔反洗钱机器学习的实证研究。结果表明，利用保险欺诈标签作为辅助信号能有效提升洗钱检测，为保险行业主动预防洗钱提供了可行的技术路径。

Abstract: Money laundering through insurance claims poses a threat to insurers both through fraudulent payouts and reputational and regulatory risk. Despite this, little research has examined how such laundering can be prevented. This paper examines whether machine learning can help insurers flag suspicious claims before payout, shifting the focus from passive reporting to active prevention. Using production data from a major Norwegian insurer, we train gradient-boosted decision tree models to detect claims later reported to authorities for suspected money laundering. Because fraud and laundering may share behavioural patterns, we also examine whether insurance fraud labels can serve as an auxiliary training signal. We compare different learning setups using the Budget-Weighted Capture Rate, a metric introduced in this paper to measure how many laundering cases are captured when only a small share of claims can be manually reviewed. The results show that incorporating fraud-related investigation labels substantially improves laundering detection. The best-performing model captures nearly two-thirds of laundering cases within the top-ranked 2 to 6 percent of claims selected for investigation. To our knowledge, this is the first empirical study of machine learning for money laundering detection in insurance claims.

</details>


### [699] [Adaptive inference and function vectors in deep transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16694)
*Ravin Raj,Gautam Reddy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个深度Transformer作为平均场相互作用系统的理论，将其解释为分布式推理系统，并揭示了其通过内部状态表示（功能向量）在不同层级上逐步推断潜在上下文变量的机制，在上下文回归任务中验证了非高斯分层结构与网络深度之间的预测关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管Transformer已被广泛用于学习复杂变量间的相关性，但其内部工作机制仍然是一个黑箱，缺乏理论上的深入理解。

Method: 将深度Transformer建模为平均场相互作用系统，引入通信、局部性和深度等约束下的分布式推理框架，并通过约束线性注意力Transformer进行实验验证。

Result: 理论预测了潜在上下文变量的非高斯分层结构与Transformer深度之间的非平凡关系，并通过实验得到了验证；深度和前馈模块使Transformer能够实现比以往更丰富的上下文学习算法。

Conclusion: 深度Transformer能够通过层级化的内部状态表示实现自适应推理，其深度对上下文学习能力至关重要，且前馈模块进一步扩展了其算法表达能力。

Abstract: Transformers are widely used as a general-purpose substrate for learning complex correlations between a large collection of coupled variables, but their internal mechanisms have remained mysterious. We introduce a theory of a deep transformer as a mean-field interacting system that implements distributed inference, subject to constraints on communication, locality and depth. We show that such a system can exploit internal state representations ('function vectors') to infer a latent context variable at increasingly finer scales over its layers. In an in-context regression task, the theory predicts a non-trivial relationship between non-Gaussian, hierarchical structure in the latent context variable, and transformer depth. Predictions are tested using constrained linear attention transformers and demonstrate adaptive inference in deep architectures. Feedforward blocks and depth enable transformers to implement a much richer class of in-context learning algorithms than previously described.

</details>


### [700] [Learning Policy from a Single Trajectory in Average-Reward Markov Decision Process](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16729)
*Jongmin Lee,Ernest K. Ryu,Vaneet Aggarwal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次为弱通信平均奖励MDPs建立了从单条轨迹中学习的有限样本复杂度保证，分别提出了值基和策略基的无模型方法，其样本复杂度为$\widetilde{O}(1/\varepsilon^2)$和$\widetilde{O}(1/\varepsilon^4)$，并引入了首个无需问题相关先验知识的无模型方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管折扣累积奖励MDP的样本复杂度研究已相当充分，但平均奖励MDP的有限样本分析仍十分有限，且现有工作大多依赖于遍历性、生成模型访问等强假设。本文旨在克服这些限制，为更一般的弱通信平均奖励MDP建立首个单轨迹有限样本保证。

Method: 首先分析弱通信MDP中单条轨迹的动态特性，基于此分析开发了新的无模型方法。具体包括值基方法和策略基方法，并设计了首个无需问题相关先验知识的无模型方法。

Result: 值基方法实现了$\widetilde{O}(1/\varepsilon^2)$的样本复杂度，策略基方法实现了$\widetilde{O}(1/\varepsilon^4)$的样本复杂度，均来自单条轨迹。

Conclusion: 本文填补了平均奖励MDP有限样本分析的理论空白，在弱假设下建立了首个从单条轨迹学习的保证，并去除了对问题相关先验知识的依赖。

Abstract: While there is an extensive body of work characterizing the sample complexity of discounted cumulative-reward MDPs, finite sample analyses for average-reward MDPs have been limited, and most existing works rely on restrictive assumptions such as ergodicity or access to a generative model. In this work, we establish the first finite sample complexity guarantees from a single trajectory for weakly communicating average-reward MDPs. To this end, we study the dynamics of a single trajectory in weakly communicating MDPs and based on this analysis, we develop novel model-free methods. Notably, our value-based and policy-based methods provide finite sample complexity guarantees of $\widetilde{O}(1/\varepsilon^2)$ and $\widetilde{O}(1/\varepsilon^4)$ from a single trajectory in weakly communicating MDPs, respectively. Furthermore, we introduce the first model-free method that requires no prior knowledge of problem-dependent quantities for communicating MDPs.

</details>


### [701] [Maximum Entropy Inverse Reinforcement Learning for Mean-Field Games with Average Reward](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16759)
*Şevket Kaan Alkır,Naci Saldı,Berkay Anahtarcı,Can Deha Karıksız*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究平均奖励准则下离散时间无限时域平均场博弈的逆强化学习问题，通过最大因果熵原理从专家示教中恢复策略，针对有限维线性奖励和无限维RKHS奖励分别提出凸对偶和拉格朗日松弛方法，解决无折扣因子收缩的难点，数值实验验证了方法有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从专家示教中恢复平均场博弈的最优策略（奖励函数未知），弥合逆强化学习与平均场博弈理论之间的空白。

Method: 基于占据测度框架统一处理两类奖励；线性奖励下构造凸对偶+log-partition目标，证明光滑性与曲率；RKHS奖励下引入minorisation次随机核实现软贝尔曼算子收缩，建立Fréchet可微与Lipschitz光滑性，设计梯度上升算法。

Result: 线性奖励的梯度下降收敛有理论保证；RKHS奖励的梯度上升收敛有理论保证；两个数值示例（恶意软件传播MFG和RKHS消费者选择模型）显示恢复策略与专家行为高度匹配。

Conclusion: 提出的方法能有效从平均场博弈的平稳平均场均衡中恢复解释性策略，克服了无折扣因子收缩的核心技术障碍。

Abstract: We study inverse reinforcement learning for discrete-time, infinite-horizon mean-field games (MFGs) under an average-reward criterion. Expert demonstrations are assumed to arise from a stationary mean-field equilibrium under an unknown reward, and the goal is to recover a policy explaining the observed behaviour via the maximum causal entropy principle. We formulate the inverse problem by enforcing consistency with the expert mean-field term and long-run feature expectations, treating two reward classes within a unified occupation-measure framework. For finite-dimensional linear rewards, we give a convex dual reformulation with an explicit log-partition objective, and prove smoothness and curvature properties justifying constant-step-size gradient descent. For infinite-dimensional RKHS rewards, we develop a Lagrangian relaxation whose inner-maximising policy is characterised by a soft Bellman equation. The main obstacle is the absence of a discount-factor contraction. We resolve this by introducing a minorisation-based sub-stochastic kernel that yields a strict contraction of the soft Bellman operator. We establish Fréchet differentiability and Lipschitz smoothness of the log-likelihood score, leading to a gradient ascent algorithm with convergence guarantees. Two numerical examples, a malware-spread MFG and an RKHS-based consumer-choice model, show that the recovered policies closely match expert behaviour.

</details>


### [702] [A Validated LBM Dataset and Pipeline for Surrogate Modeling of Turbulent 3D Obstructed Channel Flows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16765)
*Lukas Schröder,Shubham Kavane,Harald Köstler*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个可复现的3D湍流通道流数据集生成流程，使用格子玻尔兹曼方法在Re=1,000-10,000范围内进行严格验证，并计划系统评估FNO和U-Net等神经算子的预测、超分辨率和误差校正能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 评估神经算子处理3D湍流需要经过物理基准验证的标准数据集，但目前缺乏此类标准化基准，因此作者希望建立一个可复现、经过严格验证的数据生成流程。

Method: 使用带有累积碰撞算子的格子玻尔兹曼求解器，在1024x512x512分辨率下进行网格收敛性研究，并通过斯特劳哈尔数、阻力系数和湍流涨落等指标与实验测量进行对比验证。计划基于此流程系统评估傅里叶神经算子(FNO)和U-Net变体。

Result: 格子玻尔兹曼求解器在各项物理指标上与实验测量吻合，通过严格的网格收敛性验证，建立了标准化的数据生成和代理模型比较框架。

Conclusion: 该验证流程为神经算子评估提供了可靠基准，未来将系统比较数值求解器与神经代理模型的计算效率，并寻求社区反馈以完善验证方法和评估标准。

Abstract: Evaluating neural operators for 3D turbulent flow requires validated datasets with physical benchmarks. We present a reproducible pipeline generating training data for 3D channel flows around generated geometries at Re=1,000-10,000. Our lattice Boltzmann solver with cumulant collision operators is rigorously verified against experimental measurements (Strouhal number, drag coefficients, turbulent fluctuations) with comprehensive grid convergence studies at resolution 1024x512x512. Building upon an established framework, this validated pipeline enables standardized surrogate model comparison. We outline planned systematic evaluation of Fourier Neural Operator and U-Net variants on forecasting, super-resolution, and error correction tasks, using physics-informed metrics to assess turbulent energy cascade representation. Future work will compare computational efficiency between numerical solvers and neural surrogates, exploring practical application. We seek community feedback on our validation approach, planned benchmark methodology, and evaluation priorities for neural operators in turbulent flows.

</details>


### [703] [Taming Curvature: Architecture Warm-Up for Stable Transformer Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16768)
*Sameera Ramasinghe,Ajanthan Thalaiyasingam,Hadi Mohaghegh Dolatabadi,Chamin Hewa Koneputugodage,Gil Avraham,Violetta Shevchenko,Yan Zuo,Karol Pajak,Alexander Long*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种快速在线估计预条件Hessian最大特征值的方法，并基于此发现训练不稳定与曲率激增相关，进而提出"架构预热"策略——逐步增加网络深度以控制曲率，从而稳定大型Transformer的训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 训练数十亿参数的Transformer常常出现损失尖峰和发散现象，浪费大量算力。虽然Edge of Stability理论可通过曲率控制来理解优化稳定性，但现有曲率估计方法复杂，难以应用于大规模Transformer训练。

Method: 1) 提出基于热启动幂迭代的快速在线曲率估计器，通过Hessian-向量积高效估算最大预条件Hessian特征值；2) 基于曲率观测（训练不稳定伴随曲率激增，曲率随深度增长），提出架构预热策略——逐步增加网络深度以控制预条件Hessian，稳定训练。

Result: 实验表明，该方法在十亿参数规模下实现了每步曲率跟踪，且精度更高。相比现有最先进的稳定技术，架构预热能有效减少训练不稳定性且不降低收敛速度。

Conclusion: 通过快速曲率估计揭示了训练动态与曲率的关系，提出的架构预热策略为大型Transformer训练提供了一种简单有效的稳定化手段，有望推动曲率感知方法在大规模深度学习中的实际应用。

Abstract: Training billion-parameter Transformers is often brittle, with transient loss spikes and divergence that waste compute. Even though the recently developed Edge of Stability (EoS) theory provides a powerful tool to understand and control the stability of optimization methods via the (preconditioned) curvature, these curvature-controlling methods are not popular in large-scale Transformer training due to the complexity of curvature estimation. To this end, we first introduce a fast online estimator of the largest (preconditioned) Hessian eigenvalue (i.e., curvature) based on a warm-started variant for power iteration with Hessian-vector products. We show theoretically, and verify empirically, that the proposed method makes per-iteration curvature tracking feasible at billion parameter scale while being more accurate. Using this tool, we find that training instabilities coincide with surges in preconditioned curvature and that curvature grows with depth. Motivated by these observations, we propose architecture warm-up: progressively growing network depth to carefully control the preconditioned Hessian and stabilize training. Experiments on large Transformers validate that our approach enables efficient curvature tracking and reduces instabilities compared to existing state-of-the-art stabilization techniques without slowing down convergence.

</details>


### [704] [GD$^2$PO: Mitigating Multi-Reward Conflicts via Group-Dynamic reward-Decoupled Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16771)
*Haotian Liu,Yihao Liu,Jingwei Ni,Siyuan Huang,Xinpeng Liu,Pengyu Cheng,Jiajun Song,Ruijin Ding,Junfeng Li,Zhechao Yu,Mengyu Zhou,Hongteng Xu,Xiaoxi Jiang,Guanjun Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GD²PO，通过冲突感知过滤机制和查询级重加权解决多奖励RL中的信号冲突问题，显著提升训练效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法(GDPO)在多奖励RL中仍存在奖励冲突问题——不同奖励维度的正负优势信号在聚合时相互抵消，阻碍训练效率。

Method: 1) 冲突感知过滤机制：屏蔽存在严重奖励维度不一致的rollout；2) 查询级重加权：根据整体奖励共识动态调整每个查询的更新强度。

Result: 在工具调用和人类偏好对齐等多奖励场景中，GD²PO持续且显著优于现有基线方法。

Conclusion: 通过有选择地屏蔽冲突信号并动态调整更新权重，能有效解决多奖励冲突问题，加速RL学习效率。

Abstract: As LLMs advance, post-training reinforcement learning (RL) increasingly relies on multi-dimensional rewards to cultivate comprehensive capabilities. This shift demands new algorithms capable of optimizing diverse and potentially competing objectives simultaneously. To address this, existing methods such as Group reward-Decoupled Policy Optimization (GDPO) decompose the overall score into independent reward groups, then compute the RL loss separately within each group. However, this strategy still encounters multi-reward conflicts: a single rollout can yield positive advantages on certain reward dimensions but negative ones on others, causing opposing signals to cancel each other out during aggregation, further hindering RL training efficiency. Inspired by Dynamic sAmpling Policy Optimization (DAPO), which improves RL training efficiency by filtering out ineffective rollouts with near-zero advantages, we propose Group-Dynamic reward-Decoupled Policy Optimization (GD$^2$PO). Specifically, GD$^2$PO employs a conflict-aware filtering mechanism to mask out rollouts suffering from severe reward-wise disagreement. By preventing conflicting signals from canceling each other out, this masking strategy preserves and enhances the magnitude of effective RL advantages, thereby significantly accelerating learning efficiency. Furthermore, we introduce query-level reweighting to dynamically adjust the update intensity of each query based on its overall reward consensus. Experiments on various multi-reward scenarios, including tool calling and human preference alignment, demonstrate that GD$^2$PO consistently and significantly outperforms existing baselines. The code is available at https://github.com/Qwen-Applications/GD2PO.

</details>


### [705] [We Need Explanation Cards to Connect Explanation Algorithms to the Real World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16786)
*Eric Günther,Balázs Szabados,Kristof Meding,Gunnar König,Sebastian Bordt,Ulrike von Luxburg*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出"解释卡"（Explanation Cards）机制，为算法解释补充鲁棒性和有效性信息及解读说明，以弥合算法解释表面含义与实际信息之间的鸿沟，并推动《欧盟人工智能法案》的可解释性条款落地。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有算法解释存在两大问题：（1）解释的含义与直觉不符，需要专业知识才能正确解读；（2）流行解释算法对复杂决策函数的行为信息量不足。这造成了"解释看似传达了信息，实则不然"的鸿沟。

Method: 提出"解释卡"（Explanation Cards）框架，为标准解释附加三类信息：鲁棒性信息、有效性信息、明确的解读说明。以反事实解释和SHAP为例展示构建方法。

Result: 解释卡能将原本无信息量的解释变得实用，同时帮助用户检测解释不可靠的情况。解读说明将责任从用户转移至提供者，要求提供者预先明确解释的适用范围。

Conclusion: 解释卡是使算法解释适合真实世界用例的重要一步，并为《欧盟人工智能法案》的可解释性要求提供了实用的操作化手段。

Abstract: Algorithmic explanations are intended to help stakeholders understand opaque algorithmic decisions, but in practice, they often fall short. First, the meaning of algorithmic explanations is often not what one might intuitively expect, so expert knowledge is required to interpret them correctly. Second, recent work has shown that popular explanation algorithms are uninformative about the behavior of complex decision functions. Together, these issues create a gap between what explanations appear to convey and what they actually provide. In this work, we propose Explanation Cards for Explanation Algorithms, which augment standard explanations with complementary information about robustness and validity, as well as clear instructions for interpretation. The complementary information can render otherwise uninformative explanations practically useful, while also helping to detect cases where they are not. Importantly, the interpretation instructions in explanation cards shift responsibility from users to providers: Rather than expecting users to recognize what can and cannot be concluded from an explanation, providers must make this explicit upfront. Using counterfactual explanations and SHAP as examples, we demonstrate how providers can construct explanation cards and that these cards provide users with the guidance needed for sound interpretation. We further argue that explanation cards offer a practical means of operationalising the explainability provisions of the EU AI Act. Overall, explanation cards are a significant step toward making explanation algorithms fit for real-world use cases.

</details>


### [706] [Decision-Weighted Flow Matching for Contextual Stochastic Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16790)
*Jize Xie,Haomiao Wu,Qiang Chen,Xiu Su,Yi Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出决策加权流匹配（DW-FM），通过将下游决策后悔融入训练目标，解决条件生成模型在随机优化中目标不匹配的问题，并在多个CVaR基准任务上取得更优决策效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准生成模型的训练目标（如均匀分布拟合）与下游随机优化决策之间存在目标不匹配：统计上常见的区域误差可能对决策遗憾影响很小，而决策敏感区域的误差却可能显著改变最优行动。

Method: 提出决策加权流匹配（DW-FM），在标准流匹配的速度回归目标中引入基于决策敏感性的端点信息进行重加权，并通过损失诱导的决策差异和伴随传输论证建立了下游遗憾与路径速度不匹配之间的理论联系。

Result: 在合成投资组合、半真实金融和交通CVaR三个上下文随机优化基准任务上，DW-FM相比标准基线显著降低了下游决策遗憾。

Conclusion: 通过将决策遗憾对齐到生成模型的训练目标中，能够在保持流匹配简单性的同时有效提升下游决策质量，为解决生成模型与优化任务之间的目标不匹配问题提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Conditional generative models are increasingly used as scenario generators for stochastic optimization, but standard training objectives emphasize uniform distributional fit rather than the downstream decisions induced by generated scenarios. This creates an objective mismatch: errors in statistically common regions may have little effect on decision regret, whereas errors in decision-sensitive regions can substantially change the optimal action. We propose Decision-Weighted Flow Matching (DW-FM), a regret-aligned training framework that preserves the simplicity of standard flow matching while reweighting its velocity-regression objective using decision-sensitive endpoint information. Theoretically, we connect downstream regret to pathwise velocity mismatch through a loss-induced decision discrepancy and an adjoint transport argument, yielding an ideal regret-aligned surrogate and practical endpoint-weighted objectives with regret guarantees. Empirically, we demonstrate the effectiveness of DW-FM on three CVaR-based contextual stochastic optimization benchmarks spanning synthetic portfolio, semi-real financial, and traffic-CVaR tasks, where DW-FM improves downstream regret over standard baselines.

</details>


### [707] [Deep Q-Learning on Hölder Spaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16846)
*Qian Qi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了连续时间、连续状态和动作的随机控制中Q-learning的算子核心，分析了Bellman最优性目标在扩散环境下的正则性与逼近复杂度，并提出了适用于混合正则性的张量积DeepONet架构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在连续状态和动作的随机控制中，Q-learning的理论基础尚不完善，尤其是Bellman最优性目标的数学性质（正则性、逼近复杂度）缺乏严格分析。

Method: 在均匀椭圆性和Hölder正则系数假设下，分析Bellman更新将有界输入映射到各向异性正则类；提出张量积DeepONet架构以适应状态变量平滑、动作变量仅Lipschitz的混合正则性；推导显式的逼近与资源界，以及时间步长δ→0时的刚度-复杂度权衡。

Result: 证明了Bellman更新产生紧的迭代族；给出了张量积DeepONet的逼近误差和资源需求的显式界；揭示了时间步长趋近零时刚度与复杂度的权衡关系。

Conclusion: 本文为连续随机控制中Q-learning的Bellman目标正则性和逼近提供了理论基础，但未给出实际采样Q-learning的完整收敛定理。

Abstract: We study the operator-theoretic core of Q-learning in continuous-time stochastic control with continuous states and actions. In value-based reinforcement learning, each Q-learning or DQN update is built from a Bellman optimality target; our analysis isolates this target in a diffusion setting and studies its regularity and approximation complexity. Under uniform ellipticity and Hölder-regular coefficients, we show that a Bellman update maps bounded inputs into an anisotropic regularity class, smoothing the state variable while leaving only Lipschitz dependence on the action variable. This yields a compact family of Bellman iterates and motivates a tensor-product DeepONet architecture adapted to the mixed regularity of the problem. We then derive explicit approximation and resource bounds, together with a stiffness--complexity trade-off as the time step $δ\to 0$. The resulting theory makes a direct contribution to Q-learning theory at the level of Bellman target regularity and approximation in continuous stochastic control. At the same time, we do not claim a full convergence theorem for practical sampled Q-learning with exploration, replay, and stochastic gradient updates.

</details>


### [708] [HawkesNest: A Multi-Axis Synthetic Benchmark for Spatiotemporal Pattern Complexity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16863)
*Yahya Aalaila,Sumantrak Mukherjee,Gerrit Großmann,Sebastian Vollmer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HawkesNest是一个基于多元Hawkes过程的基准测试工具，通过四个复杂度轴（时空纠缠、背景异质性、跨类型交互、域拓扑）生成可控的时空点模式数据，用于诊断和压力测试时空点过程模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的时空点过程模型评估依赖不透明的真实世界数据集，其潜在生成结构未知，难以归因模型失败原因，缺乏可控的基准测试环境。

Method: 基于多元Hawkes过程构建生成器，定义四个复杂度轴（时空纠缠、背景异质性、跨类型交互、域拓扑），每个轴关联一个确定性指数；在控制全局速率、稳定性和模拟预算的条件下改变这些轴。

Result: 验证了指数在可控扫描下具有单调性和近似正交性；Hawkes族基线在联合异质性-纠缠复杂度下性能下降；AutoSTPP在时空纠缠增加时表现出脆弱性。

Conclusion: HawkesNest提供了可控的时空模式复杂度基准，能够有效诊断不同模型的弱点，暴露模型对特定复杂度的敏感性。

Abstract: Evaluation of spatiotemporal point process (STPP) models relies heavily on opaque real-world datasets, where latent generative structure is unknown and model failures are difficult to attribute. We introduce HawkesNest, a generator-aligned benchmark for controlled spatiotemporal pattern complexity built on a multivariate Hawkes backbone. HawkesNest defines four complexity axes: space--time entanglement, background heterogeneity, cross-type interaction, and domain topology. Each axis is associated with a deterministic index computed from the latent data-generating mechanism. By varying these axes while holding global rate, stability, and simulation budget fixed, HawkesNest enables diagnostic stress tests of STPP models under known structural difficulty. We verify that the indices are monotone and nearly orthogonal under controlled sweeps. We illustrate its use by showing that Hawkes-family baselines degrade under joint heterogeneity--entanglement complexity, even though they are structurally aligned with the Hawkes data-generating backbone. We further show that HawkesNest exposes neural-model sensitivity: AutoSTPP remains vulnerable under isolated increases in space--time entanglement. Code. Available at https://github.com/YahyaAalaila/HawkesNest

</details>


### [709] [Integrated Marketing Attribution: A Bayesian Framework for Privacy-Safe Granular Measurement Anchored in MMM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16878)
*Meghana R. Bhat,Ankit Umare,Utsav Aggarwal,Richard Vecsler,Arunkumar Mani,Karthik Nair,Chandhu Nair*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出集成营销归因（IMA）框架，将营销组合建模（MMM）与贝叶斯归因模型结合，在不依赖用户级追踪的前提下实现精细到战役级别的隐私安全归因。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MMM和MTA两种主流方法各自存在缺陷：MMM隐私安全但颗粒度粗糙，难以优化具体营销战役；MTA颗粒度精细但受隐私限制可靠性下降。需要一种兼具两者优势的统一方法。

Method: 提出IMA统一框架，将MMM与渠道特定的贝叶斯归因模型相结合，利用MMM生成的先验信息，从聚合数据中推导出战役级别的归因效果。

Result: IMA能够在保持与MMM结果一致性的前提下，提供颗粒度精细、隐私安全的归因分析。

Conclusion: IMA为零售营销测量提供了一种兼顾隐私安全与颗粒度需求的折中方案，弥合了MMM与MTA之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Retail marketing measurement increasingly requires granular campaign-level insights without relying on user-level tracking. However, the two dominant approaches, Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM) and Multi-Touch Attribution (MTA), often produce fragmented insights. MMM is privacy-safe and robust for channel-level planning but is too coarse for campaign optimization, while MTA provides granular attribution but has become less reliable under increasing privacy restrictions. We propose Integrated Marketing Attribution (IMA), a unified framework that combines MMM with channel specific Bayesian attribution models to derive campaign-level effects from aggregated data. By leveraging MMM-informed priors, IMA delivers granular, privacy-safe attribution while preserving consistency with MMM.

</details>


### [710] [Upper Bounds on the Generalization Error of Deep Learning Models via Local Robustness and Stability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16883)
*Abdul-Rauf Nuhu,Parham M. Kebria,Vahid Hemmati,Mahmoud N. Mahmoud,Edward Tunstel,Abdollah Homaifar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的泛化界，通过根据每个子区域中稳定与不稳定样本的数量来缩放鲁棒性项，使得边界更紧、非空洞，并在ImageNet上取得了优于现有方法的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于鲁棒性的泛化界在实际应用中往往过于松弛（空洞），而问题部分源于鲁棒性项本身被当作全局度量，忽略了输入空间不同子区域的差异。

Method: 提出一种新的泛化界，将鲁棒性项按每个子区域中稳定与不稳定样本的数量进行缩放，从而同时考虑数据和模型依赖因素。

Result: 在ImageNet数据集上训练的模型实验中，所提边界始终保持非空洞，并且是现有方法中最紧的估计，与实证性能高度一致。

Conclusion: 通过引入子区域级别的鲁棒性缩放，可以显著提升泛化界的紧致性和实用性，为安全关键应用中的深度学习模型评估提供了更可靠的工具。

Abstract: Generalization is a critical property of data-driven models, particularly deep learning models deployed in safety-critical applications. Robustness-based generalization bounds have gained attention as a principled way to link robustness properties to generalization performance, often in a data-dependent manner. However, most existing bounds suffer from vacuousness in practical settings, yielding loose upper bounds that greatly exceed the actual error rates and limiting their usefulness for real-world evaluation. While this issue is often attributed to the uncertainty term, a substantial part of the problem originates from the robustness term itself, particularly for the 0-1 loss. Existing approaches typically treat the robustness term as a global measure, ignoring its variation across different sub-regions of the input space. In this work, we propose a generalization bound that addresses this limitation by scaling the robustness term according to the number of stable and unstable samples within each sub-region. Our bounds incorporate both data- and model-dependent factors while maintaining practical relevance (yielding tighter upper bounds on true error). Experiments on models trained on the ImageNet dataset show that our bounds remain consistently non-vacuous and achieve the tightest estimates among existing methods, closely aligning with empirical performance across a range of robust deep neural networks.

</details>


### [711] [Beyond Weights and Gradients: A Taxonomy of Federated Learning Messages](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16891)
*Alvaro Javier Vargas Guerrero,Xinguang Wang,Quang Manh Doan,Guy Nagels*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出联邦消息的正式数学定义，将联邦学习中的信息交换分为三类（模型结构、统计摘要、数据条件表示），并评估了计算、通信和隐私的权衡。对202篇论文的综述显示自2021年起联邦消息范式正走向多样化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有定义无法涵盖现代联邦学习中交换的多种负载（如合成数据、联邦分析），缺乏对消息效用和隐私的形式化刻画。

Method: 提出联邦消息的正式数学定义；构建包含三类消息（模型结构、统计摘要、数据条件表示）的分类体系；从计算开销、通信成本和隐私风险三个维度进行评估；对202篇近期论文进行系统综述。

Result: 自2021年以来，联邦学习中出现了从传统深度学习更新向多样化消息范式的显著转变；不同消息类别在计算、通信和隐私上呈现不同的权衡特征。

Conclusion: 该分类框架为未来针对不同硬件和安全需求优化联邦系统提供了结构化路径。

Abstract: Federated Learning is rapidly evolving beyond the exchange of traditional model weights and gradients, yet existing definitions fail to capture the full scope of modern payloads like synthetic data and federated analytics. This paper addresses the gap by proposing a formal mathematical definition of a federated message that accounts for both utility and privacy. We introduce a taxonomy that organizes these exchanges into three categories: model structures, statistical summaries, and data-conditioned representations. By evaluating these groups based on computational demands, communication costs, and privacy risks, we provide a clearer understanding of the trade-offs involved in decentralized training. Our review of 202 recent publications highlights a significant shift since 2021 toward diverse messaging paradigms, signaling a move away from standard deep learning updates toward more specialized information sharing. This framework provides a structured path for future research to optimize federated systems for varying hardware and security requirements.

</details>


### [712] [Fantastic Pretraining Optimizers and Where to Find Them II: Hyperball Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16899)
*Kaiyue Wen,Xingyu Dang,Kaifeng Lyu,Tengyu Ma,Percy Liang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Hyperball是一种简单的优化器包装器，通过将权重矩阵及其优化器更新的Frobenius范数设为固定常数，解决了Muon等矩阵优化器在大模型训练中增益衰减的问题，在1.2B参数模型上实现20-30%的token等效加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Muon等矩阵优化器在大模型和大数据规模下，使用标准常数解耦权重衰减时，相对于AdamW的加速增益会显著缩小，现有方法无法保持一致的提升效果。

Method: Hyperball作为优化器包装器，将权重矩阵的Frobenius范数和对应的优化器更新范数均固定为常数，取代传统权重衰减机制，可应用于Adam或Muon等基础优化器。

Result: 在Qwen3风格模型上（参数达1.2B），Muon+Hyperball相比权重衰减基线实现了20-30%的token等效加速，并且改善了学习率跨宽度和深度的迁移能力。

Conclusion: Hyperball通过固定权矩阵范数来稳定角向学习率，克服了权重衰减在大规模训练中的局限性，为矩阵优化器的扩展提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Matrix based optimizers such as Muon can substantially speed up language model pretraining, but their gains over AdamW are observed to shrink as model size and data scale grow when using standard constant decoupled weight decay. We propose Hyperball, a simple optimizer wrapper that addresses this issue. Given a base optimizer such as Adam or Muon, Hyperball sets the Frobenius norms of weight matrices and their corresponding optimizer updates to fixed constants. On Qwen3 style models up to 1.2B parameters, Muon Hyperball achieves 20--30% token equivalent speedup over weight decay baselines. Hyperball also improves learning rate transfer across widths and depths compared to decoupled weight decay. This method is motivated by prior theory showing that training with weight decay leads to an equilibrium weight norm that only depends on the training hyperparameters. Through this mechanism, the weight decay then decides the angular learning rate, i.e. how fast the direction of the weight matrix changes.

</details>


### [713] [Factorized Neural Operators Decompose Dynamic and Persistent Responses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16900)
*Hao Tang,Yuechen Duan,Jiongyu Zhu,Zimeng Feng,Hao Li,Chao Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出因子化神经算子（FaNO），将谱表示分解为等变动态响应和不变持久响应，从而解耦物理系统中的多尺度异质机制，提升预测精度、参数效率和跨尺度泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子通常依赖单一主导归纳偏置，将不同物理响应耦合到共享表示中，难以捕捉物理系统中快速演变动与持久结构共存的异质多尺度行为。

Method: 提出统一格林函数框架，并设计因子化神经算子（FaNO），将谱表示分解为两部分：等变分支（捕捉快速瞬态动力学）和不变分支（提取相干持久结构），两个分支自发特化为不同的物理角色。

Result: FaNO在预测精度、参数效率和跨尺度泛化方面优于现有方法；在长程自回归推演、跨分辨率外推和物理机制转移场景下均保持一致的预测性能。

Conclusion: 可扩展的物理建模应超越单一归纳偏置，转向因子化算子表示以反映物理系统的异质组织，加速机器学习在科学计算与发现中的可靠部署。

Abstract: Physical systems often exhibit heterogeneous mechanisms, where rapidly evolving dynamics coexist with persistent structures. Capturing such multiscale physical behavior remains challenging for existing neural operators, which typically rely on single dominant inductive bias and therefore couple distinct physical responses into a shared representation. We introduce the Unified Green's Function Framework across domains and propose the Factorized Neural Operators (FaNO), which decompose spectral representations into equivariant dynamic responses and invariant persistent responses, leading to better interpretability and generalization. Mechanistically, we show that the two operator branches spontaneously specialize into distinct physical roles that remain consistent across scales and domains: the equivariant branch captures rapidly varying transient dynamics, whereas the invariant branch extracts coherent persistent structures. This factorized mechanism of FaNO improves prediction accuracy, parameter efficiency and cross-scale generalization across physical systems and domains. In particular, it maintains consistent predictions under long-horizon autoregressive rollout, cross-resolution extrapolation and physical-regime shifts. These findings suggest that scalable physical modeling may benefit from moving beyond single-inductive-bias formulations toward factorized operator representations that better reflect the heterogeneous organization of physical systems, accelerating the reliable deployment of machine learning for scientific computing and discovery.

</details>


### [714] [Demystifying Variance in Circuit Discovery of LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16920)
*Frank Zhengqing Wu,Francesco Tonin,Volkan Cevher*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文分析了电路发现方法中的三种方差问题（重采样方差、改写方差、样本方差），提出CEAP方法减轻重采样方差，揭示改写方差源于不同模板激活不同电路，并论证样本方差主要源于不忠实的定义缺陷而非电路本身问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前最先进的电路发现方法EAP-IG虽然在不忠实度指标上表现良好，但存在显著的方差问题：重采样方差、改写方差和样本方差。本文旨在探究这些方差的根源，并寻求缓解方案。

Method: 提出CEAP（改进EAP-IG的电路发现方法，具有理论保证）；通过实验分析重采样方差、改写方差和样本方差的成因；引入选择性贡献缩放（selective contribution scaling）机制解释样本级不忠实度极端值。

Result: CEAP能显著减轻重采样方差；改写方差源于不同模板激活不同电路，表明LLM可能本质上难以操控；稀疏性无法解决模板差异问题；样本方差很大程度上是良性的，极端不忠实度分数往往源于定义问题，而非电路缺陷。

Conclusion: 重采样方差可通过改进方法（如CEAP）缓解；改写方差揭示了LLM任务电路在不同模板下的根本性不一致，暗示大模型可能固有地难以引导和控制；样本方差主要是不忠实度定义的人为产物，选择性贡献缩放是造成极端低分的关键机制。

Abstract: Circuit discovery is a key technique in mechanistic interpretability to pinpoint the model components that are crucial for performing a given task. Although the current state-of-the-art method (EAP-IG) performs well on the metric of (un)faithfulness, it suffers from substantial variability. This includes resampling variance, where the circuit changes when we probe with a new batch of data from the same distribution; rephrasing variance, where the discovered circuit shifts when the prompts are rephrased; and sample-wise variance, where a circuit with low population unfaithfulness exhibits large fluctuations in unfaithfulness across individual samples.
  This paper studies the roots of these variances. We demonstrate that CEAP, our new circuit discovery method that improves upon EAP-IG with a theoretical guarantee, can substantially lessen resampling variance. We further show that rephrasing variance arises because prompts with different templates tend to activate different circuits in the model. This leads us to argue that it may be challenging to find a comprehensive circuit that explains and controls the model's behavior on a task, which can be expressed in countless templates, suggesting that LLMs may be inherently hard to steer. We show that sparsity, which has been claimed to form more compact and interpretable task circuits, fails to solve this problem. Regarding sample-wise variance, we argue that it is largely benign: extremely poor unfaithfulness scores often stem from how unfaithfulness is defined, rather than from defects in the measured circuits. We show that the magnitude of unfaithfulness is affected by selective contribution scaling, a neural mechanism that accounts for the extremely poor scores sometimes observed.

</details>


### [715] [A Unified Causal-Origin Taxonomy of Distributional Shifts in Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16933)
*Ardianto Wibowo,Paulo E Santos,Amer Baghdadi,Matthew Stephenson,Karl Sammut,Jean-Philippe Diguet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种统一的因果起源分类法，用于表征强化学习中分布偏移的来源，将ID/OOD泛化与非平稳设置联系起来，并引入评估框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前强化学习系统在分布偏移下性能退化严重，但现有工作主要关注缓解策略，缺乏对偏移因果起源的正式理解；ID/OOD泛化与非平稳设置之间的关系也不清晰。

Method: 基于POMDP将交互过程分解为状态分布、观测过程、策略、奖励和转移动力学等结构组件，引入偏移时间边界概念，区分内部（智能体驱动）与外部（环境驱动）分布偏移，以及显式、隐式和混合偏移。

Result: 提出了一套统一的分类法，将ID/OOD泛化和非平稳性统一为底层过程的结构性变化，并建立了性能退化与恢复指标来评估偏移影响与适应能力。

Conclusion: 通过将分布偏移建立在RL的因果起源结构上，该工作支持对分布偏移下鲁棒性的系统性分析，为理解和缓解RL中的分布偏移提供了理论基础。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) systems often degrade when operating conditions differ from those previously encountered, reflecting distributional shifts in the underlying data-generating process. Such shifts may occur between training and evaluation, as in In-Distribution (ID) and Out-of-Distribution (OOD) generalization, or within non-stationary settings where environment dynamics evolve over time. However, the formal relationship between these views remains unclear, and existing work mainly focuses on mitigation rather than the causal origin of shift within the agent-environment interaction. This work develops a unified causal-origin taxonomy that characterizes sources of distributional shift in RL and relates ID/OOD generalization to non-stationary settings. We transfer the classical dataset-shift principle from supervised learning to RL by reformulating distributional shift in terms of the generative interaction process. Using a Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP), we decompose the interaction into structural components, including the state distribution, observation process, policy, reward, and transition dynamics, together with the shifted-time boundary. The proposed taxonomy distinguishes internal, agent-driven, and external, environment-driven, distributional shifts. The shifted-time boundary perspective further characterizes explicit, implicit, and hybrid shifts. This formulation unifies ID/OOD generalization and non-stationarity as structured changes in the underlying process. We also introduce an evaluation framework for measuring shift impact and adaptation through performance degradation and recovery metrics. By grounding distributional shift in the causal-origin structure of RL, this work supports systematic analysis of robustness under distributional shift.

</details>


### [716] [Scalable Circuit Learning for Interpreting Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16939)
*Naiyu Yin,Dennis Wei,Tian Gao,Amit Dhurandhar,Karthikeyan Natesan Ramamurthy,Yue Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出CircuitLasso，一种基于稀疏线性回归的可扩展电路学习方法，能够高效地基于SAE特征学习可解释的稀疏电路，在降低计算成本的同时保持结构准确性，并验证了其在域泛化任务中的应用价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于原始神经元的电路学习方法因神经元的多语义性而难以解释；SAE特征虽改善了可解释性，但其高维度使得现有基于干预的电路学习方法计算代价过高。

Method: 提出CircuitLasso，基于稀疏线性回归（Lasso）来学习LLM中SAE特征之间的稀疏电路，从而在不进行昂贵干预的情况下高效恢复电路结构。

Result: 在基准数据集上，CircuitLasso的结构准确率与最先进的基于干预的方法相当，但计算成本大幅降低；并能有效揭示SAE特征之间的语义传播关系。

Conclusion: CircuitLasso是一种可扩展、可解释的电路学习方法，其学到的电路能够帮助在域泛化任务中以更低成本实现相当的性能，验证了其实用价值。

Abstract: A prominent research direction in mechanistic interpretability is learning sparse circuits over LLM components to reveal how they jointly produce model behavior. However, raw neurons are polysemantic, making learned circuits hard to interpret. Sparse autoencoder (SAE) features alleviate this, but their high dimensionality makes existing intervention-based circuit learning methods computationally prohibitive. We propose CircuitLasso, a scalable circuit-learning approach based on sparse linear regression. CircuitLasso recovers circuits whose structural accuracy matches that of state-of-the-art intervention-based methods on the benchmark data, at a fraction of the computational cost. For interpretability, CircuitLasso efficiently uncovers relationships among SAE features, showing how human-interpretable semantic features propagate through the model and influence its predictions. Finally, we validate the utility of our learned circuits by leveraging their insights to achieve comparable performance at substantially lower cost on a domain-generalization task.

</details>


### [717] [Phantoms and Disclosures: a Causal Framework for Auditing Synthetic Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16952)
*Kareem Amin,Rudrajit Das,Alessandro Epasto,Adel Javanmard,Dennis Kraft,Mónica Ribero,Sergei Vassilvitskii*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一个无需模型访问的实证审计框架，通过统计假设检验区分"真实泄露"与"幻象泄露"，为合成数据中的隐私泄露提供更紧的经验下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI和LLM合成的数据虽然可以保护隐私，但存在记忆和泄露训练集中私有信息的风险。现有审计方法需要模型访问、插入金丝雀或训练参考模型，计算开销大。

Method: 将输入数据划分为训练集和留存集，通过统计假设检验判断观察到的泄露是否与零学习或特定差分隐私边界一致。无需模型访问、金丝雀插入或参考模型训练，仅需合成输出和留存控制集。

Result: 该框架有效作为成员推断攻击，提供比先前基于数据的审计方法更紧的隐私泄露经验下界，且计算资源需求少几个数量级。

Conclusion: 该方法模型无关、适用于任何合成数据生成机制，为合成数据隐私审计提供了高效、可定制的实用工具。

Abstract: The rapid adoption of generative AI and Large Language Models (LLMs) has spurred interest in synthetic data as a privacy-preserving alternative to sensitive real-world datasets. However, generating high-utility synthetic data often carries the risk of memorizing and regurgitating private information from the training corpus. In this work, we present a customizable empirical auditing framework designed to detect and explain such data disclosures. Our framework introduces a mechanism to distinguish between "true disclosures"-where the system directly reproduces a user's information-and "phantom disclosures''-where the system incidentally generates a user's data. By partitioning input data into training and holdout sets and applying rigorous statistical hypothesis testing, we determine if observed disclosures are consistent with strict privacy baselines, such as zero-learning or specific Differential Privacy (DP) bounds. Crucially, this approach requires no model access, no canary insertion, and no reference model training -only the synthetic output and a held-out control set. We demonstrate that this framework effectively functions as a membership inference attack, providing empirical lower bounds on privacy leakage that are tighter than prior data-based auditing methods. Our approach is model-agnostic, applies to any synthetic data generation mechanism, and requires orders of magnitude fewer computational resources than shadow-model or canary-based alternatives.

</details>


### [718] [Beyond the Smile: A Hybrid Convolutional VAE for Crypto Volatility Surfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16961)
*Sadanand Singh,Allam Reddy,Manan Chopra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个卷积变分自编码器用于加密货币隐含波动率曲面建模，结合二次微笑曲线重拟合的混合预测器，在BTC/ETH期权数据上实现八倍误差降低（0.83 vs 7.00 vol points），且在结构性缺失模式下是唯一可行的预测器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 加密货币期权市场（如Binance Options）的隐含波动率曲面常存在大量数据缺失（mask rates 10-50%），传统的参数化微笑曲线重拟合方法在掩码率高时表现差（7.00 vol points），尤其当缺失具有结构性（如整个期限的strike被撤走）时误差高达9.6-13.1 vol points，需要更鲁棒的生成式模型来补全曲面。

Method: 1) 使用卷积变分自编码器（CVAE）在6×7的tenor-delta网格上建模波动率曲面；2) 提出混合预测器：通过确定性期限路由规则，将CVAE重建与二次微笑曲线重拟合结合；3) 在BTC和ETH上联合训练，利用共享的vol-surface流形；4) 确保无套利条件（日历套利和蝶式套利）。

Result: CVAE隐层曲面补全RMSE在0.94-1.56 vol points（跨市场及10-50%掩码率）；混合预测器在50%掩码下0.83 vol points vs 微笑重拟合的7.00（八倍降低，无额外推理成本）；结构性缺失下微笑重拟合9.6-13.1 vol points vs 模型1.5-1.9；联合训练提升9-27%；模型能无监督检测ETF预期上涨和8月17日闪崩等异常事件。

Conclusion: CVAE+混合预测器在加密货币期权波动率曲面补全任务上显著优于纯参数化方法，尤其在结构性缺失场景下具有不可替代性。联合训练策略有效，模型具有无套利性质和异常检测能力。已开源全部基础设施以支持可复现研究。

Abstract: We present a convolutional variational autoencoder for cryptocurrency implied-volatility surfaces, together with a deployable predictor that combines it with a quadratic smile re-fit through a deterministic per-tenor routing rule. Trained on 6,034 fully-filled hourly Binance Options surfaces of BTC and ETH spanning May-October 2023 and parameterised on a common $6 \times 7$ tenor-delta grid, the model attains a hidden-cell surface-completion RMSE in the 0.94-1.56 vol-point range across both markets and mask rates 10-50%. The hybrid predictor attains 0.83 vol points at 50% masking against 7.00 for the smile re-fit alone, an eightfold reduction obtained at no additional inference cost. Under structurally-correlated hole patterns that emulate the withdrawal of an entire tenor of strikes, the smile re-fit incurs 9.6-13.1 vol points of error while the learned model remains at 1.5-1.9, isolating a regime in which the generative model is the only viable predictor. Joint training on BTC and ETH improves the in-distribution model on both markets by 9-27% relative to the better-performing single-symbol counterpart, indicating a substantially shared vol-surface manifold across the two largest cryptocurrencies over the observation window. The hybrid is calendar- and butterfly-arbitrage-free at the listed strikes, a property that the parametric smile re-fit alone fails at high mask rates. The per-snapshot reconstruction error of the trained model flags the late-October ETF-anticipation rally and the August $17$, $2023$ flash crash as elevated-error periods without supervision. All training and evaluation infrastructure is released to support reproducible follow-on work.

</details>


### [719] [Scalable Pairwise Kernel Learning with Stochastic Vec Trick](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16979)
*Napsu Karmitsa,Tapio Pahikkala,Antti Airola*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SPaiK是一种可扩展的核学习方法，通过随机广义vec技巧（sGVT）实现高效的大规模成对学习，在药物-靶标亲和性数据集上表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 成对学习在计算和内存上开销巨大，现有核方法难以扩展到大规模数据集，亟需一种能保持核方法表达能力同时降低资源需求的方法。

Method: 提出SPaiK框架，核心创新是随机广义vec技巧（sGVT），这是稀疏Kronecker积乘法算法的随机扩展，用于高效计算成对核。

Result: 在7个真实世界的药物-靶标亲和性数据集上进行了评估，与当前最先进的成对学习方法进行了比较。

Conclusion: SPaiK使基于核的成对学习能够应用于此前无法企及的大规模数据集，在保持表达能力的同时大幅降低了计算和内存需求。

Abstract: Pairwise learning is a specialized form of supervised learning that focuses on predicting outcomes for pairs of objects. In this work, we introduce SPaiK, a new scalable kernel learning method tailored for pairwise settings. Our approach preserves the expressive power of kernel methods while substantially reducing computational and memory requirements. The key innovation is the stochastic generalized vec trick (sGVT), a stochastic extension of the sparse Kronecker product multiplication algorithm, which enables efficient large-scale training with pairwise kernels. By incorporating sGVT, SPaiK makes it possible to apply kernel-based pairwise learning to datasets of a size previously out of reach. We evaluate the performance of SPaiK on seven real-world drug-target affinity datasets and compare the results with state-of-the-art methods in pairwise learning.

</details>


### [720] [Analytic Torsion and Spectral Gap Capture Persistent-Laplacian Performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.16990)
*Jernej Grlj,Aaron D. Lauda*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对持久拉普拉斯算子（PL）在机器学习中面临的高维度和“变长”问题，提出将PL谱提炼为贝蒂数、谱间隙和解析挠率三种数学不变量的紧凑表示，在多个基准数据集上验证了该方法在降低计算开销的同时，有时甚至超越全谱性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 持久拉普拉斯算子（PL）虽然比持久同调能提供更丰富的几何表征，但其全特征谱用于学习任务时，遭遇高维度和不同滤波尺度下“长度可变”两大难题，亟需一种既能保留核心信息又具备固定维度的紧凑表示。

Method: 提出一种紧凑谱表示方法，将持久拉普拉斯算子蒸馏为三种数学上可解释的不变量：贝蒂数（Betti numbers）、谱间隙（spectral gap）和解析挠率（analytic torsion），从而获得固定长度的特征向量供学习任务使用。

Result: 在MNIST、QM-3D和SKEMPI WT等基准数据集上，该简化特征空间能够捕获全谱中关键的预测信号，在某些情况下甚至超越全谱性能，同时显著降低计算开销，并避免高频特征值引入的噪声。

Conclusion: 这些不变量为谱几何与拓扑学习之间提供了原则性的、固定长度的接口，证明了通过精心选择的不变量可以在保持甚至提升性能的同时大幅降低计算复杂度。

Abstract: While persistent Laplacians (PL) offer a richer geometric representation of data than persistent homology, utilizing their full eigenspectrum for learning tasks is often hampered by high dimensionality and the ``varying length'' problem across different filtration scales. We propose a compact spectral representation that distills the persistent Laplacian into three mathematically grounded invariants: Betti numbers, the spectral gap, and analytic torsion. Across benchmark datasets including MNIST, QM-3D, and SKEMPI WT, we demonstrate that this reduced feature space captures the essential predictive signal of the full spectrum, and in some cases outperforms it, while significantly reducing computational overhead and preventing the noise introduced by higher-frequency eigenvalues. Our results suggest that these invariants provide a principled, fixed-length interface between spectral geometry and topological learning.

</details>


### [721] [From Tokens to Policy: Causal and Interpretable Heterogeneous Treatment Effects Identification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17010)
*Riccardo Cadei,Frank Otchere,Nyasha Tirivayi,Gustavo Angeles Tagliaferro,Falco J. Bargagli-Stoffi,Francesco Locatello*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出NEXIS方法，利用多模态预处理数据，通过马尔可夫毯发现来识别异质性处理效应中的因果潜在交互因子，在非洲扶贫项目中验证了其可解释性和指导性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有HTE方法在可解释性和表达力间权衡，当未测量活跃异质性驱动因素时，两类方法都会产生虚假HTE，无法进行因果解读。研究者希望利用更丰富的预处理测量数据和可扩展表征来识别真正的因果HTE。

Method: 将HTE识别重构为在充分对齐的预处理表征上的马尔可夫毯发现问题，提出NEXIS（神经暴露交互搜索）迭代算法，具有理论上可证明且经验验证的一致性选择能力。

Result: 在非洲两个扶贫项目中，通过引入卫星图像数据（捕捉了以往未测量的环境效应修正因子），NEXIS发现了新颖、可解释且可指导政策优化的异质性处理效应。

Conclusion: 结合多模态预测量和可扩展表征，能够以可解释的方式识别HTE的因果潜在交互因子，为政策迭代提供具体指导。

Abstract: Heterogeneous Treatment Effect (HTE) identification is crucial to explain the impact of an intervention and optimize our policies accordingly. Existing approaches trade expressivity for interpretability, but, if some active heterogeneity drivers are unmeasured, methods at both ends of this spectrum allow for spurious HTE characterization with no causal reading. In this work, we focus on controlled experiments and argue that an oracle HTE causal characterization via the latent interactors is now within reach, thanks to (i) more extensive pre-treatment measurements, i.e., multi-modal and multi-view, and (ii) scalable representations with minimal human supervision. We then re-frame HTE identification as a Markov-blanket discovery problem on a sufficient and aligned pre-treatment representation, and introduce Neural EXposure Interaction Search (NEXIS), an iterative procedure with provable and empirically validated consistent selection. We deploy NEXIS on two anti-poverty programs in Africa, augmenting each with satellite imagery capturing previously unmeasured environmental effect modifiers, leading to novel, interpretable and prescriptive guidelines to optimize the programs' next iterations.

</details>


### [722] [Filtered Conformal Ellipsoids for Graph-Native Time Series](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17014)
*Yannick Limmer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究多变量时间序列的联合预测集，提出了一种基于滤波共形椭球的方法。该方法使用冻结状态空间滤波器输出一步预测均值和协方差，然后对马氏距离得分进行分割共形校准。核心挑战在于滤波得分存在依赖性且循环滤波器可能不收缩，因此作者在可观测预测律商空间上分析了收缩性。在稳定贝叶斯高斯投影滤波器等条件下，证明了小超额高斯负对数似然意味着学习发射律的收缩。结合阈值自协方差包络，得到了依赖下滤波分割共形预测的切比雪夫型近似覆盖界；更尖锐的伯恩斯坦型界需要额外的几何混合浓度假设。在高斯预言机可实现性下，还获得了条件有效高斯椭球规则类内的近预言机对数体积比较。在METRLA-20和PEMSBAY-50流量基准上，学习滤波器比静态协方差和非滤波基线更优；但在全图规模和非图原生数据集上，因子和copula基线可能更强。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多变量时间序列的联合预测集需要控制单一事件同时适应跨坐标依赖。现有方法多假设高斯分布或独立同分布，难以处理时间序列中复杂的依赖结构和分布偏移。本文旨在构建一种既能利用学习到的预测协方差（适应依赖结构）又不依赖高斯尾部概率来保证覆盖率的预测集构造方法。

Method: 提出滤波共形椭球方法：1) 使用冻结状态空间滤波器（如GCN-GRU）输出一步预测均值和协方差；2) 对马氏距离得分进行分割共形校准来选择椭球半径。为处理滤波得分依赖性和循环滤波器不收缩问题，在可观测预测律商空间上分析收缩性，并引入阈值自协方差包络等技术推导覆盖界。

Result: 在稳定贝叶斯高斯投影滤波器等条件下，小超额高斯负对数似然可推出学习发射律的收缩。获得了依赖下的切比雪夫型和伯恩斯坦型近似覆盖界，以及在高斯预言机可实现性下的近预言机对数体积比较。在METRLA-20和PEMSBAY-50流量基准上，学习滤波器优于静态协方差和非滤波基线；但在更复杂场景下，因子和copula基线更具竞争力。

Conclusion: 滤波共形椭球方法有效结合了状态空间滤波的依赖建模能力与共形预测的分布无关覆盖保证。理论分析揭示了在适当条件下可同时保证覆盖率和高效性，但实际性能与数据集特性高度相关，提示需要根据具体场景选择合适方法。

Abstract: Joint prediction sets for multivariate time series should control a single event while adapting to cross-coordinate dependence. We study filtered conformal ellipsoids: a frozen state-space filter emits a one-step predictive mean and covariance, and split-conformal calibration is applied to the resulting Mahalanobis scores. The filter is used to choose the ellipsoid shape; conformal calibration chooses the scalar radius, so the construction benefits from a learned predictive covariance without relying on Gaussian tail probabilities for coverage. The main difficulty is that filtered scores are dependent and learned recurrent filters need not contract in their raw hidden state; we therefore analyse contraction in an observable predictive-law quotient that identifies hidden states producing the same future sequence of emitted Gaussian laws. Under a stable Bayes Gaussian-projection filter, covariance bounds, and a finite-horizon observability Fisher condition, small excess Gaussian negative log-likelihood implies contraction of the learned emitted laws. Combined with a threshold-autocovariance envelope this yields a Chebyshev-type approximate coverage bound for filtered split-conformal prediction under dependence; a sharper Bernstein-type bound requires an additional geometric-mixing concentration assumption. Under Gaussian oracle realisability we also obtain a near-oracle log-volume comparison within the class of conditionally valid Gaussian ellipsoid rules. We instantiate the framework with a GCN-GRU filter with diagonal-plus-low-rank covariance. On moderate-size graph-native traffic benchmarks (METRLA-$20$ and PEMSBAY-$50$), the learned filter gives sharper at-target ellipsoids than static-covariance and non-filter baselines; at full-graph scale and on non-graph-native datasets, factor and copula baselines can be stronger.

</details>


### [723] [ExpRL: Exploratory RL for LLM Mid-Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17024)
*Violet Xiang,Amrith Setlur,Chase Blagden,Nick Haber,Aviral Kumar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ExpRL方法，利用人类编写的问答数据作为奖励脚手架（reward scaffolds），在强化学习中期训练中为LLM推理提供密集奖励信号，相比SFT、稀疏奖励GRPO和自蒸馏等方法，能更有效地提升模型在复杂数学推理任务上的表现，并为后续稀疏奖励RL提供更好的初始化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏奖励强化学习在提升LLM推理能力方面效果显著，但其成功严重依赖于基座模型的覆盖范围。实践中常通过人工设计的推理轨迹进行中期训练来引导模型，但这种方式需要手动指定学习内容，且不清楚这些原始技能是否足以解决需要组合多种技能的更困难问题。因此，需要一种更自动化的方法来替代人工设计的中期训练策略。

Method: ExpRL方法将参考答案用作奖励脚手架（reward scaffolds），而非直接模仿的目标。参考答案对策略模型隐藏，仅用于构建问题特定的评分标准，以评判策略在线采样的推理轨迹。LLM裁判将采样轨迹与参考答案进行比较，并分配结果级别或过程级别的密集奖励，从而强化部分进展、有用的中间化简以及富有成效的推理行为。

Result: 在具有挑战性的数学推理任务上，ExpRL相比SFT、稀疏奖励GRPO和自蒸馏方法，能提供更强的RL初始化效果，并且为后续的稀疏奖励RL提供更好的起点。此外，混合领域实验表明ExpRL可以扩展到数学之外的领域。

Conclusion: ExpRL通过利用问答数据作为奖励脚手架，实现了更自动化的RL中期训练策略，有效提升了LLM在复杂推理任务上的表现，并具有良好的跨领域扩展潜力。

Abstract: Sparse reward reinforcement learning (RL) has become a standard tool for improving LLM reasoning, but its success depends critically on the coverage present in the base model. In practice, models are often primed for RL through \emph{mid-training} on curated reasoning traces that teach useful primitive skills such as decomposition, verification, or self-correction. Although effective, this strategy requires manually specifying what the model should learn, and it remains unclear whether such primitive coverage is enough for much harder problems, which require combining these skills into broader solution strategies. We study a more automated approach: \emph{RL-based mid-training} using large corpora of human-written question-answer data. Rather than treating reference solutions as targets to imitate, our method, ExpRL, uses them as \emph{reward scaffolds}: references are hidden from the policy and used only to construct problem-specific grading rubrics for judging on-policy reasoning traces. The policy samples from the original problem prompt, while an LLM judge compares the sampled reasoning trace against the reference solution and assigns outcome-level or process-level dense rewards. This lets ExpRL reinforce partial progress, useful intermediate reductions, and productive reasoning behaviors that sparse final-answer rewards often fail to upweight. On challenging math reasoning tasks, ExpRL yields stronger RL priming than SFT, sparse-reward GRPO, and self-distillation, and provides a better initialization for subsequent sparse-reward RL. Additional mixed-domain experiments further suggest that ExpRL can extend beyond the original math-only setting.

</details>


### [724] [HAMON: Passive Optical Sequence Mixing for Long-Horizon Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17028)
*Alper Yıldırım*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HAMON是一种被动衍射光学预测核心，在长期时间序列预测中性能优于许多数字基线，通过光学传播完成预测而不需要数字序列混合层。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究表明，长期时间序列预测的核心算子往往是低复杂度且近似线性的，无需Transformer那样的稠密叠加表示。这引出一个问题：是否一定要用学习到的数字时序混合来实现？作者希望探索一种基于无源光学硬件的替代方案。

Method: 将历史值编码到光学孔径上，未来位置保持暗场，通过级联的可训练相位掩膜和自由空间衍射直接在输出场中形成预测结果。推理时仅需一次无源光学传播，无需任何可训练的数字序列混合层。

Result: 在ETTm2上所有预测范围优于最强数字基线，在ETTh2上除最长范围外均优于基线，MSE最高降低14%。在Weather数据集上有竞争力，在其余ETT设置及高通道Traffic和Electricity上略逊于最强基线。

Conclusion: 无源光学核心能够有效进行时间序列预测，为光学硬件和无源物理序列混合提供了具体目标。消融实验和交叉模拟验证了预测来自承载数据的光场而非数字预测头。

Abstract: Simple linear and frequency-domain models remain surprisingly competitive in long-horizon time-series forecasting, and recent mechanistic evidence suggests that standard forecasting benchmarks may not require the dense superposed representations that make transformers powerful in other domains. This raises a substrate-level question: if the core forecasting operator is often low-complexity and approximately linear, does it need to be implemented as learned digital temporal mixing? We introduce HAMON, a passive diffractive optical forecasting core in which historical values are encoded onto an optical aperture, future positions are left dark, and cascaded trainable phase masks with free-space diffraction shape the forecast directly in the output field. At inference, prediction is performed by a single passive optical propagation pass with no trainable digital sequence-mixing layer.
  Across standard benchmarks, HAMON outperforms the strongest digital baselines considered on ETTm2 at all horizons and on ETTh2 at all but the longest horizon, improving MSE by up to 14\% and doing so consistently across horizons rather than at isolated points. It is competitive on Weather and trails the strongest baselines on the remaining ETT settings and on the high-channel-count Traffic and Electricity datasets. Phase encoding, intensity-compatible readout, and phase-scrambling ablations, together with a TorchOptics cross-simulator check, indicate that the forecasts arise from the data-bearing optical field rather than from a digital forecasting head. Because the passive core uses standard Fourier optics, HAMON defines a concrete target for optical hardware and for passive physical sequence mixing.

</details>


### [725] [Your Privacy My Cloak: Backdoor Attacks on Differentially Private Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.17035)
*Xiaolin Li,Ning Wang,Ninghui Li,Wenhai Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文挑战了“差分隐私（DP）天然增强联邦学习（FL）鲁棒性”的假设，发现DP反而会掩盖恶意更新的统计特征，使现有防御失效。作者提出RING攻击，利用DP掩盖恶意贡献，在四个数据集上对六种防御达到平均90.3%的攻击成功率，揭示了DP-FL中的根本性安全漏洞。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前研究认为差分隐私（DP）能天然增强联邦学习（FL）对后门攻击的鲁棒性，但作者通过实证分析发现这一假设存在根本性问题：遵守DP会掩盖恶意更新的统计特征，使现有防御失效，而绕过DP反而容易被检测。因此需要重新审视DP-FL的安全基础。

Method: 提出RING攻击，利用DP的掩蔽效应：恶意客户端协同构造对抗性扰动，在聚合过程中重建强后门信号但不触发异常检测。RING作为扰动层，与底层后门技术无关，可广泛组合现有攻击。

Result: 在四个图像和文本数据集、非独立同分布设置下，RING在中等隐私预算下对六种最先进防御的平均攻击成功率达90.3%，比基线策略提升高达26.08倍。

Conclusion: DP-FL存在根本性的安全漏洞：DP在提供隐私保护的同时也掩盖了恶意行为，使得现有防御失效。缓解该威胁需要付出显著的效用权衡，揭示了DP-FL部署中的安全困境。
